The boy is born naturally small, but he lives with a family with no other male relatives, so the boy’s mom(s), sisters, aunts, grandmothers, and/or friends pitch in to take care of him.

Where will the setting of this route take place?

A Nice Suburban Neighborhood: The boy lives in a suburban neighborhood where the neighbors, close or distant, are all females. Aside from his mother and any other female family members, the boy will find there are no other males in the neighborhood, so he makes due with the neighborhood girls who tease him and treats him like a doll, or the other feminine neighbors who want to coddle him or subject him to their whims.

A Wealthy Mansion: The boy is the son of a wealthy woman and lives in a luxurious mansion, where the maids wait on his tiny body hand and foot. The mansion is either aristocratic where the children grow up to be proper lords and ladies, or a mansion where any other kid would grow up similarly to how middle-class children grow up.

-or-

A Co-Ed Apartment Complex: The boy and his female family members live in a co-ed apartment with their roommates, all of them female. The place is either a room in an apartment building or a two-story house built for up to seven people. Despite his initial protests, the tiny boy must share his living space with his giant female roommates and try to avoid becoming their personal toy or slave.
121.title: Tiny in a Normal-Sized Family

122.content:
The boy is born naturally small, but he is also an orphan.

Which of these scenarios will apply to the tiny-born boy?

Abandoned: Because he was born tiny, the baby boy is dropped off the side of the road in a certain location in the middle of the night. The boy could have been dropped off in the backstreets, at a residential neighborhood, or at the doorstop of an orphanage which accommodates only girls (which may or may not coexist with the Orphanage route down below).

Orphanage: The boy is born tiny, but his father died months before the boy's birth date. In the boy's early childhood years, his mother and only living relative perished in a fatal automobile accident, leaving the tiny orphaned boy to be taken by Social Services and assigned to an orphanage that accommodates only girls run by a maternal matron. The boy's life in the orphanage is explored up until he is adopted by a normal-sized woman.

Foster Family: Much like the Orphanage route above, the boy is born tiny and is orphaned at a young age. Not long after the death of his mother, rather than staying at the orphanage, the boy is given custody to a foster family, a distant female relative, or even his godmother. The boy struggles to adjust to his new life living in a family full of giant women without his mother.

-or-

Alone: Much like the Orphanage and the Foster Family route above, the boy is born tiny and is orphaned at a young age, but unlike either route, he has no orphanage or family to take him in. The boy survives his gigantic environment by scavenging discarded objects and/or living within the walls of a human home. Despite his efforts to survive, the boy deeply yearns to have a family. In this route, the boy's wish comes true in the most unexpected and gigantic way!
122.title: The One-Inch Orphan

1221.content:
The boy is born naturally small, but because of this, he was abandoned in the middle of the night.

Which of these areas will the tiny-born boy be abandoned at?

A Residential Neighborhood: The tiny boy is dropped off at a random home in a residential suburban neighborhood. The boy will be found on the doorstep by a normal-sized woman living there, so she takes him in and adopts him. The woman who adopts him is a single mother with two daughters, so he will become the brother the two girls always wanted. The neighborhood is also occupied by an unmarried bachelorette office worker, a married lesbian living with her partner, a middle-aged woman whose children have left for college, or a lonely elderly woman who desperately wished for children, all of them friends with his adopted mother.

The City Backstreets: The tiny boy is dropped off in the backstreets of a city, near the entrance of one of the more dangerous alleyways. The boy will be found in a box with a note telling whoever finds him to give him a good home. The female character who finds him is either a cougar-aged stripper recently off the clock, an immigrant police officer on midnight patrol, a runaway teenager looking for a safe place to sleep, a party girl returning home from celebrating her night out with her friends, or a drug addict looking for their next rush. Despite their questionable positions and the neighborhood they live in, one of these ladies will take the boy in as her own.

An All-Girls Orphanage: The tiny boy is dropped off at the Sunshine Smile Orphanage for Girls, an orphanage which only accommodates girls. Although, in recent years, the orphanage has accommodated another tiny boy who was sent there by Social Services because they felt a mixed orphanage or an all-boys orphanage would be considered dangerous for his tiny size. The tiny boy grows up with the girls, their plump caretaker, and the other tiny boy with whom he looks up to as an older brother figure. (A/N: This route will coexist with this route: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive...)
1221.title: Abandoned

12212.content:
Name: Benny
Age: 1 month old
Eyes: Green
Hair: Black
Height: 2.5"
Weight: 2.5 grams
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Benny was born to normal-sized parents, but because of his tiny size, he is placed in a box and dropped off at the city backstreets at midnight. The baby will be taken in by one of the women nearby, but he will become curious about his adopted maternal figure's gigantic size, which will only lead him into trouble. Despite this, the following maternal figures will never give him up unless they had no other choice.

Main Story:
It was just after midnight, when there were hardly anyone roaming the city streets after dark, except for the streetwalkers, the partygoers, and seedy individuals lurking in the shadows like predatory nocturnal animals. In one particular street at around this time, a suspicious vehicle pulled up to the side of the street, stopping near the opening to an alleyway with the squeak of the breaks. A dark figure stepped out of the car and carefully placed a small box big enough to fit a coffee mug near the opening of the alleyway, right before returning to the vehicle and beating a hasty retreat.

As the vehicle's tires squealed away into the distance, violating the city's speeding law in the process, the sound of a baby's cries echoed through the streets. It turned out that the contents in this box was a little baby boy the size of a female adult's thumb. The boy slept in a bed of cotton, a scrap of a soft silk blanket, and a little beanbag for a pillow. Taped on the outside of the box was a folded letter which read: “This is Benny. He was born this way. Please give to a good home.”

This particular street was seldom active at midnight, save for certain individuals who would pass by this street and discover the small box, containing a tiny-born baby who would grow up to grow curly black hair and a curious personality, but abandoned by his birth parents who abandoned him not long after his arrival on planet Earth. The only question is, who on this street will discover little Benny at this time of night?

1.) Angela "Mama Angie" Bennett: A veteran stripper at the XXX Bombshells Club who recently clocked out of her shift.
2.) Police Officer Carmen Diaz: A Hispanic police officer patrolling the streets during her midnight shift.
3.) Elizabeth Harper: A runaway in her late teens who was sleeping in the alleyway nearby.
4.) Rachel Addison: A drunk party girl who was returning to her apartment after a night out clubbing at the XXX Bombshells Club.
5.) Jodie: A punk drug addict who was trying to find her next rush so she wouldn't feel the withdrawal symptoms.
12212.title: The City Backstreets

122121.content:
Name: Angela "Mama Angie" Bennett
Age: 40 years old
Eyes: Black
Hair: Black
Height: 5' 10"
Weight: 182 lbs.
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Angela Bennett is a lead stripper in the XXX Bombshells strip club in the red light district. A veteran stripper and dancer, she earned the moniker "Mama" after teaching and nurturing the younger dancers. Her thick assets, her D-cup breasts, and her luscious lips arouse her customers' fantasies. After her shifted ended at midnight, Angela would discover a certain baby boy, abandoned on the sidewalk, born the size of her thumb. She'd soon find another meaning to her stripper name "Mama Angie."

Name: Sayori Tanaka
Age: 67 years old
Eyes: Brown
Hair: Black
Height: 5' 5"
Weight: 169 lbs.
Ethnicity: Asian/Japanese
Backstory: Sayori Tanaka is an elderly Japanese immigrant who moved with her family to the United States from the Kanto region of Japan in the late 1960's/early 1970's. Ms. Tanaka lived a difficult life in the poorer backstreets of the city and being the target of discrimination, but she became happy later with her husband and her daughter until he passed away from a fatal heart attack. Since then, Ms. Tanaka's become cold, bitter, and often hostile towards her tenants... that is until she inevitably discovers Angela Bennett's adopted tiny-born son.

Main Story:
It was around midnight when Angela walked back home after a long night. Her D cup-sized breasts and her assets large enough to fit inside a large salad bowl jiggled with every click of her black heels. Her bulging belly stretched her lingerie to her buttons. Her great, pink lips parted as her mouth opened wide to let out a roaring yawn. She flipped her dark, pitch-black hair over her shoulder, the bangs cut across where her eyebrows should have been. It was a hell of a night, Angela figured, and she made plenty of money for a pole dance and a few lap dances. Those rolls of cash in her purse was evident enough.

Angela was a stripper who worked at the XXX Bombshells Strip Club in the back streets of the city. She had a reputation for living up to the strip club’s name because she was an absolute bombshell of a woman for her age and figure. At the same time, she also had a reputation for being welcoming, motherly, and arousing. She was pretty much the great leader of the other girls in the club even though her manager was the one calling the shots. If there was one thing that any girl wanting to strip off their clothes and dance around the pole would want, it was to be her.

As Angela turned down the street to her apartment at the far end, she passed by the alleyways when she heard a baby's wailing. She stopped and tracked the noise where it came from, case in point, inside a little box. She spotted the note taped to the outside of the box, unfolded it, and read the letter. A sick feeling ran through her gut as she carefully uncovered the box and gasped. There she saw the little baby, laying in a makeshift bed, crying and reaching his tiny little hands up to the opening of the box. Angela felt her heart break from the mere sight alone; who could've abandoned such a beautiful baby in a dangerous place like this?

“You poor baby, come here,” Angela cooed as she gently scooped up the box and cupped it to her breasts. She gently shushed the baby, rocking the box back and forth and bobbing in place to soothe Benny's crying. If there was one true perk to her nickname "Mama Angie" aside from her being the maternal figure to her younger strippers at the club, it was how she used a soothing, sultry voice to melt the customer's nerves and feel like putty in her hands.

“There there, it’s okay, little one. There’s no reason to be afraid,” Angela continued to soother the distressed baby. "Mama Angie's here. Mama Angie will take care of you. She won't let anything bad happen to you, I promise."

The baby eventually stopped crying. Benny opened up one eye, and the first thing he saw was the gigantic face of a mature giantess smiling down on him the same way a mother would her child. The baby's instincts immediately imprinted itself onto the mature stripper, seeing her as his new mother unlike his biological mother who callously dropped him off in this dark place. He burbled and giggled, reaching his stubby hands towards the giantess. Angela responded by dipping her giant finger into the box, close enough for Benny to grasp both hands on the ridged edge of her finger alone.

Feeling tired and fatigued after being left by his real mommy and being acquainted with his new mommy, Benny yawned and fell into a warm sleep. Angela's heart melted to see the baby sleep happily in the box, but she was also worried about where she was and where she found him. “Poor baby, he shouldn’t even be here,” Angela told herself as she gently closed the box. “I’ve got to get you out of here, Benny. Whoever put you here obviously hasn’t realized we’re next to a bad neighborhood.”

Taking the box under her other arm, Angela quickly hugged the box against the top of her breasts and quickly strode down the street and away from the alleyways, the movement of her footsteps and the rocking of her D-cup boobs rocking the baby deeper into slumber.

She reached the end of the street, to a slightly run-down apartment building, occupied only by her and her cranky older landlady of Asian descent. She unlocked the front door and carefully walked in, hoping that her landlady, Ms. Tanaka was totally fixated on her international soap operas and nothing else. As she closed the door behind her, what happened next?

1.) Angela returned to her apartment without incident.
2.) Angela encounters Ms. Tanaka, her strict and cranky landlady.
122121.title: Angela "Mama Angie" Bennett

choices: The First Day of a New Mother's Life
1221211.content:
Angela was fortunate that Mrs. Tanaka was so fixated on her Japanese soap operas that she didn't notice or hear her walk in the front door. Just to be safe, Angela slipped off her shoes and carried them with her purse with one hand while cradling the box that contained the tiny baby boy against her bosom in the other. She snuck past the landlady's office barefoot and climbed a set of stairs leading to the second floor. She ventured through the hallway to the fifth door on her left, where she stayed.

After unlocking the door, Angela entered inside the apartment, which consisted of a living room, a kitchen, a bedroom, and a little bathroom. The room itself was big enough to hold up to three, maybe four occupants, but Angela figured it would help shelter the tiny-born baby resting against her thick bosom.

Exhausted from her night of exotically erotic dancing and the climb upstairs, Angela settled into her favorite sofa, propping her sexy, plump feet on the ottoman. Her toenails were painted dark navy blue, and they gleamed in the night. After setting her purse and shoes down, the thick stripper gently opened the lid of the box so to not disturb the baby inside. Benny slept in a peaceful sleep, deepened by the rocking of his giant savior's footsteps and her bobbing breasts. The stripper couldn't help but swoon over how adorable Benny was, from his adorable diminutive form wrapped in its makeshift blankets down to the little tuft of black hair growing at the top of his head. She was so enamored by the sight that she gently scooped the tiny baby from his "bed" and raised him up to her pursed lips, gently pecking him on the head, covering it with rouge lipstick.

This sparked an instantaneous reaction from Benny, as he began to burble and cry. Angela gasped and quickly moved him down to her breasts, gently cradling him in cupped hands as she rocked him back and forth and bobbed her body to help lull him back to sleep. "Shhh... it's okay, Benny. Mama's here, Mama's got you," she cooed, using her sultry signature voice to soothe the baby's nerves. "Please, don't cry, baby, Mama's here. She'll keep you safe and drive away your fear. You may be young and you may be small, but Mama's love will never change at all."

Angela continued to sing and hum until the baby's crying began to diminish. Finally, just like when Angela found , Benny steadily fell back to sleep. Angela heaved a sigh of relief. If the baby had cried a little longer, then the few neighbors on her floor would have heard the screams and they would've called Mrs. Tanaka on her. If that cranky Japanese landlady found him, she'd lose him in a heartbeat, and she couldn't let that happen, not while she promised to not let anything happen to him.

Angela gently placed Benny back in his ox and carried it over to her nightstand. Then, when she had settled the box on the nightstand, she went to get ready for bed. She stripped off her clothes down to her silk D-cup bra and panties. She relieved her bowels and bladder in the bathroom then went to brush her teeth. Afterwards, she turned off the house lights, climbed into bed, and turned off the nightstand lamp. Then, in the darkness, she laid on her back, trying to clear her mind so she could drift away into slumber.

Except, she couldn't fall asleep, and for good reason, too. She turned to her nightstand where the box sat, the baby sleeping in his makeshift bed, her mind aflutter with so many questions. She couldn't help but contemplate who would drop that adorable miracle of life in a cold, cruel, and unforgiving place, and she couldn't help but wonder why. Angela may have been a stripper working in a place of lust unsuitable for children, but she could never treat a child the way anyone else would treat their children, or any children at that.

Suddenly, everything was made clear for her. It would only make sense Benny's birth parents were the only people close to him who would dare leave him out in the open like that. They must have despised him for being born with his condition, so they dropped him at the back alley in the middle of the night and drove away. Angela was glad to have passed down the street when she did, but the thoughts of what could have happened to Benny infuriated her. The baby would have most likely starved to death or catch his death of cold. Someone would have found him on the streets and take him away, to be used or sold for slavery, or any unforgiveable profit in the black market. He would have been taken by some punk drug addict, or a bunch of party girls too inebriated to carefully handle him. She would have been fine if it was a police officer or a good Samaritan, but anyone else would show the baby no mercy.

Quietly, Angela sat up in her bed and reached into the box. She gently curled her fingers around the tiny little bundle and carefully lifted him out, bringing him to her breasts again. She made sure he was face-up, as it was common knowledge to keep a baby lying on their back to avoid suffocation. Her heart melted at his innocence and obliviousness to the dangers he was put through tonight, but it was replaced by a newfound love for the boy: the kind of love a mother would reserve for their children. with one hand cupping him, Angela gently stroked Benny's body with the other.

"It's going to be okay, Benny. Mama's not gonna let anything bad happen to you," the thick giantess said, bringing him up to her puckered lips and gave him another loving peck, this time not waking him up. "I'm gonna be the best Mama in the world. I'm gonna take care of you, watch you grow up into a fine, little man, and no one is going to take that away from me. You'll always be safe with me, Benny. I promise."

Instead of putting him back in the box, Angela kept her gentle grip on the tiny baby in her hand as she laid down on her side. Her fingers were firmly curled around Benny's body, providing him comfort and security. Her eyes fluttered shut, a long and content sigh escaping her nostrils as she instantly drifted off. Angela had the tendency to sleep with her enormous mouth open, allowing hot gusts of breaths to blow from her wide-open maw.

This concluded the first night between the voluptuous stripper and her newfound tiny-born son.

What happens next?

12212111.content:
The morning sunlight shone through the apartment window, it’s shine reaching the bed of a certain voluptuous brunette stripper sleeping peacefully on her side. Her D-cup breasts was covered with a lacy red bra, squished together like two giant mounds of pudding pushed together. Her crimson coated lips were parted into a gigantic shape of an “O”, expanding and shrinking with each gargling breath she took.

When at last, the sun’s rays shine into her eyes that Angela was stirred awake by the brightness. She inhaled through her nose, turned on her back, and gave a gigantic yawn which reverberated through her apartment room. Wiping her eyes, she felt a little tickle somewhere deep between her massive mammaries, which made her giggle a little. She gently reached two fingers into her cleavage, pinched the ticklish little bulk by her fingernails, and pulled it out.

Held between two gentle giant fingers was Angela’s five year-old adopted son, Benny. His head of hair grew longer and as black as Angela’s hair color. He giggled childishly along while the giant hand which held him curled upwards, making him roll down her gigantic fingers and into her soft palm the size of a king-sized bed.

“Good morning, Mama!” Benny shouted.

“Good morning, my cute little buggy.” Angela brought her tiny son up to her massive pillowy lips, which pursed as she used said pillowy lips to kiss the top of Benny’s head. “Did you sleep well?”

“Uh-huh. Your boobies are so soft, they’re the best bed I’ve ever slept in!” the tiny boy disclaimed, laying in the softness or his mother’s giant hand.

“I’ve heard that before,” Angela said, standing up from her bed and placing him on her shoulder. “Come on, lets go have breakfast. Does my cute little buggy want something special?”

“Blueberry pancakes!”

Angela couldn’t help but laugh at the boy’s enthusiasm. “Blueberry pancakes it is.”

The stripper-turned-mom placed Benny in a special high chair on the table, strapping him in so he couldn’t escape or topple over while she went and prepared breakfast for the both of them.

It seemed that only yesterday that Benny was a baby abandoned on the street when Angela found him. Thanks to the support of her boss, Meryl, and her fellow strippers, Angela was able to make it to five years being an adoptive mother to a tiny-born boy. The first couple of years involved her teaching him to crawl and walk, as well as incubating him and helping him adapt to the warm and dark sanctity of her stomach, which was where he mostly slept.

The next two years involved teaching Benny not only to read, write, speak, and count, but to also teach him to sleep outside the sanctity her belly. To Angela’s credit, Benny was smart for his own age. One time, Angela slept with her mouth wide open, prompting the young curious Benny to crawl into her mouth and was promptly swallowed by his giant mother figure. He received a good scolding the next day after he was carried through his mother's digestive system to her curvy rear end.

At the age of five, Benny began to use Angela’s body as his personal playground. He’d try to wrestle his mother’s giant toes, climb up her mountainous body and over her breasts, and slide down her backside. Sometimes, Benny would engage in a game of Rampaging Giant with his gigantic mother, trying to run away from her as much as he could until he is stamped by her giant barefeet or snatched up and “eaten” by her. Angela would never swallow Benny now unless he needed a time-out inside her body.

Every so often, Angela and Benny would receive a visitor, mostly the women who worked with her at the XXX Bombshells strip club. Meryl would try to spoil little Benny with gifts and showers of love like the loving grandmother figure she presented herself. Angela’s co-workers, Benny’s “aunties” would normally come over to babysit him while Angela would be out on important errands. And when Angela was busy every night at the strip club, she would have her Japanese landlady, the widowed Mrs. Takahashi, look after him. Mrs. Takahashi was old, usually cranky, but she always had time to watch over Benny and found a certain fondness for the sweet tiny-born kid.

Now on this day, five years after the beginning of Angela’s established role as a mother, the now forty-five year-old stripper cooked up pancakes for herself and her tiny child. She created the pancake from mix and added in blueberries to liven up the flavor. Angela learned to make blueberry syrup as part of her growth as a mother, and she always doused Benny’s pancakes in that syrup the way he liked it.

Angela added a tiny drop of mix to be proportionate to Benny’s tiny stature. She added two more in case he was really hungry. When all was done, both the curvaceous stripper mother and her tiny adopted son sat down to a small stack of blueberry pancakes each, much to the boy’s childish glee. The blueberry syrup was poured, the orange juice was served in different sized glasses, and both Angela and Benny were about read to dig into their morning meal.

What happens next?

1.) Angela and Benny eat their breakfast without any interruptions.
2.) Angela and Benny eat their breakfast, but a knock on the door interrupts them.

The morning sunlight shone through the apartment window, it’s shine reaching the bed of a certain voluptuous brunette stripper sleeping peacefully on her side. When at last, the sun’s rays shine into her eyes that Angela was stirred awake by the brightness. She inhaled through her nose, turned on her back, and gave a gigantic yawn which reverberated through her apartment room. In her right hand, her fingers gently curled around the tiny form of her newfound tiny baby son. She turned her head to gaze at her palm where little Benny slept, wrapped in his blankets like a miniature burrito wrap.

It warmed the stripper's heart to see the bite-sized baby resting in her hand. She felt like a motherly goddess recently appointed to watch over the growth of the world's children, and Benny was her initiation into such an appointment. She sat up on her bed and lifted Benny's form up to her lips in cupped hands, giving him a gentle good morning kiss on his head. In response, the baby began to wiggle and cry, prompting Angela to gently cradle the baby and gently shush him.

"Shhh, it's okay, Benny," Angela quietly cooed her diminutive child. "It's me, it's your Mama."

Benny ceased his crying under the calmness of Angela's soothing voice. He opened his little green eyes and beheld the sight of the giantess who took him in the previous night. As his first childish instincts kicked in, Benny began to burble happily as he reached his little arms out to the giant stripper, his hands open and begging to clasp onto the motherly giant. Angela leaned her face in until the tip of her nose was within Benny's reach. It was surreal, feeling tiny baby fingers grab onto the tip of her nose, since the use of her fingers were too big for him to grab onto, and the sheer size of her nails could cut the baby by accident.

Benny felt around his new Mama's nose, eventually reaching to the inside of her nostril. One touch of her nasal hair prompted Angela to gasp and pull her nose back, wiping and snorting to get the ticklish feeling out of her nose. Benny giggled at the display, and Angela couldn't help but smirk and giggle too. "You little rascal, you. Are you trying to make me sneeze? You'd be flying in the air if you did make me sneeze, you know."

Benny once again giggled as Angela brought him up to her lips once more for an affectionate kiss, giving him a gentle peck on the side of his cheek. "Come on, let's get breakfast. I don't have any baby food for you or know how to feed you at your size, but we'll have to improvise somehow."

With cupped hands, Angela carried Benny into the kitchen and set him lying face-up on the table. She quickly whipped out her phone and searched how to feed tiny-born babies. There was a scientific page on the Internet that told her that any woman who gives birth to, or adopts a tiny-born infant will trigger a maternal affection towards the baby, which somehow activates the lobules in the woman's breasts which causes them to produce milk. The ducts were as big as the baby's head, but according to that page, a few squeezes of the breast will produce a few drops which, compliant to the infant's size, will be considered a full meal to it

The thought of breastfeeding seemed weird for Angela, but in a different perspective altogether, a few squeezes into Benny's mouth will keep him well-fed for the next few hours. At least her D-cup breasts would have a better use than attracting the ogling eyes of her customers. Sighing, the stripper gently cradled Benny in her hand brought him to one of her naked breasts, holding it with the other hand to help squeeze the lactation out. Gently, Angela held Benny's mouth to her nipple and gently squeezed. It was a weird tingle, feeling the creamy liquid leave her breasts in tiny drops, which flowed gently out of the duct in a suspended drop. Benny gently slurped and swallowed the drop, taking as much of it as a baby would take a whole bottle of formula.

After the drop was completely drunken up, Angela remembered that babies needed to be burped after being fed. She gently turned Benny over in her palm and held him over the edge, using the finger in her other hand to pat his back repeatedly. After several good pats, a tiny baby-like belch escaped Benny's stomach. Angela gushed from how adorable it was.

"You're a little piece of work, aren't you, Benny?" Angela asked. "You're pretty high maintenance for someone so small. I'm gonna need some help if I'm gonna take good care of you."

Angela searched the Internet on her phone about the basic steps about raising a tiny-born baby. There were a lot of steps condensed into smaller paragraphs, with an extensive list of supplies needed for any tiny-born infant to survive, including basic baby supplies, a smaller crib, a special spoon small enough to fit into the infant's mouth, and even a special chute designed to shrink to the smaller nozzle and give a tiny-born infant its required amount of liquid nourishment, which could be attached to a funnel or a breast pump. Angela sighed and ran her hand through her hair, wondering what she got herself into.

She was a stripper who worked late nights until midnight, living under a roof of a run-down apartment filled with poor and sometimes shady occupants, watched over a cranky middle-aged landlady like a hawk. Her new position couldn't exactly afford to have her bring Benny to a place that only twenty-one year-olds could go drink and watch the curvaceous ladies slip their clothes off onstage and dance lustfully around a tall, metal pole. That wasn't a good place for a child his age to hand around. She knew that much.

Angela heard the happy garble of the tiny baby lying on her kitchen table. She smiled and gently rubbed her finger over his body, eliciting a happy giggle from him. She took comfort in his innocence and his laughter, but there wasn't much she could do at the moment. She needed time to think who could help her. Someone who knew their way around raising a tiny baby. Someone who was the very figure of patience and understanding of childbearing.

3.) There's a knock on the door; it's police officer Carmen Diaz!

4.) There's a knock on the door; it's one of Angela's coworkers at the XXX Bombshells Club!

Main Story:

Angela knew this was a bad idea as she strode to the XXX Bombshells, her enormous boobs jiggling with every step, carrying the box containing Benny's tiny form inside. Earlier that morning, she was at a crossroads, debating whether or not she could bring Benny to the club, seeing as how he was a baby and a minor. Unfortunately, she hadn't trusted anybody in the apartment, not even her cranky Japanese landlady. So she went for broke and carried the tiny baby to the club in the red-light district.

Angela entered through the rear entrance of the strip club, an access to the dressing room. When she entered the dressing room, five of her “girls” -all young women who were younger than 35 that she personally taught and trained in stripping and dancing- were all getting ready for their graveyard shift. Currently among them was Shanice, the African-American woman with a larger asset than Angela's; Sofia, the thick Latina who was currently humming her native country's music; Mary, the lovable ditz who was having trouble with her makeup, not remembering which eyeshadow was a darker color; and Emily, the cute redhead who was practicing her sensually flexible movements.

As Angela walked in, Shanice took notice of her in the mirror as she applied her mascara. "Well, look who's showing up so early in the evening," the black woman "greeted" her mentor. "What's wrong, Mama? You couldn't afford to pay the bills, so you decided to come in an hour before your shift?"

"I can manage my finances, thank you, Shanice," Angela responded with the same snippiness as her second-oldest coworker. "Is Meryl here? I really need to talk to her."

"You just missed her, mamá. She stepped out to get a coffee from the store just a few minutes ago," Sofia answered, totally focused on her false eyelashes in her reflection. "She'll be back soon."

“Dammit. Well, I guess there’s no other way around it," Angela murmured. "Girls, could you come around, please? I need to show you all something.” The other four strippers assembled at Angela's desk, but Sofia went and dragged the oblivious Mary away from her eyeshadow crisis to the desk. Angela set the box and carefully opened the lid to the box, revealing the palm-sized boy sleeping inside.

“Aaaaaawwwwww!” the strippers all exclaimed, their hearts melted by his cuteness.

"Ssshhhhh! Not so loud, girls! He's sleeping!" Angela quietly urged the younger women.

“What’s his name?” Sofia asked.

“His name is Benny. That’s what it said on the note, anyway,” Angela answered.

“Note? What are you talking about?” Shanice asked.

Last night, when Iwas walking home after work, I heard him crying in this exact same box you see here," Angela explained. "In it was a note telling someone to give Benny a good home and nothing else. It was cold, dark, and the alleyways were prone for wild animals and muggers, so I had to take him home with me so he could be safe."

“You mean he was abandoned?” Mary gasped.

“Oh, that poor thing,” Sofia cooed sadly, gently rubbing Benny's head with her sand-colored finger, careful not to wake him up. “Don’t you worry, chico, because your new Mama is going to take care of you, like she took good care of us."

"But that's the problem, Sofia, I'm not sure how to take care of him," Angela clarified. "I only came in to talk to Meryl because she's had experience raising her daughter and helping raise her grandson and I need her help to do it." The maternal stripper gently rubbed her thumb on Benny's head, feeling the warmth coming from the soft texture of his skin. "Plus, this isn't a safe environment to raise a child in, and I can't trust anyone in my apartment with taking care of him because he'd either be kidnapped or legally taken away, so..."

"So you need Meryl to give you tips and pointers on how to raise him," Shanice curtly finished.

"That's right," Angela said with a nod.

"You never thought of calling us or asking us for help?"

"I did, but everyone else has too much on their plates to make time to babysit a tiny baby, and..."

"Why don't we just pitch in and see if we can take turns looking after Benny?" Mary asked, and everyone turned to her incredulously. "What? Benny needs someone to watch after him, and she shouldn't have to be the one to do it all alone."

"Yeah! I mean, I already have a babysitting gig that pays me hourly," Emily explained, "but for Angela, I'd be willing to watch him for free."

"Like it or not, even though we strip ourselves and dance naked in front of a drunken crowd, we're not gonna let some kid grow up without a mom in his life," Shanice explained, crouching over Angela's shoulder and watching the tiny bundle of joy sleep in the little box. "Trust me, I grew up without my mama and I haven't exactly turned out for the better. Trust me, that boy needs his mama, and that mama has to be you, Angie."

"That's kind of you to share, Shanice," Angela said, "but I'd rather have to hear what the boss has to say about this first."

Just then, the door opened, and in walked in the manager and the owner of the XXX Bombshells strip club, over twenty years Angela's senior. Her white hair was pixie cut and parted over to her left side, her wrinkles hardly noticeable from a distance. “Places, girls, this is gonna be a busy night,” Meryl, the bombshell GILF said as she walked in with a hot cup of coffee in her hand right before she noticed the newer arrival. “Oh, Angela, you’re here early. Is there something I can help you with?”

"Meryl, we need to talk," the older brunette stripper started, skipping the pleasantries. "I was on my way home last night, and on the street, I saw..."

Meryl's gaze was diverted to the smaller box sitting on Angela's desk. "What is this?" she asked. She approached the box, caught a first glimpse of the tiny boy in the box, and covered her mouth with a large gasp. “What is that..?”

"This is exactly what I needed to talk to you about," Angela said urgently as she rushed to her boss's side. "Please, you have to listen to me!"

It has been a year and a half since Oliver was first admitted to the Sunshine Smile Orphanage for Girls. A year and three quarters since his mother died and was taken in by the friendly caretaker of the orphanage. Not that there was anything wrong with the orphanage. The tiny-born boy liked it there. Miss McCormick has been very kind to him, and so have the girls living there, but he didn’t want to stay there forever. He missed his mom terribly, and he wanted to have a new family with a mom who loved him unconditionally like his mom did.

At this time, it was the third Adoption Day since Oliver had been brought to the orphanage, and every time, it was the same thing: He’d watch helplessly as all the fortunate girls get accepted by a new family and leave the orphanage for good. Then he’d wait until the next Adoption Day at the orphanage six months later.

Poor Oliver watched the girls he befriended and grew up with leave him behind, all alone and brooding. He wanted to go with the girls so badly, but Valerie had the eyes of a hawk when it came to him. She’d know when a girl was trying to smuggle him out and intervened before they succeeded. Still, at least they kissed him goodbye, but it didn’t make the pain of loneliness go away.

Three Adoption Days, and Oliver still hadn’t had a family come to him. Nearly all of the girls he knew were gone and he couldn’t see them again. He began to realize the futility of finding a family. The loneliness began to eat away at him, so he kept himself alone and away from everyone else. He mostly kept to his room, curled up in his bed in his dollhouse, and that’s where he stayed for the past week.

One day after the first week, Oliver laid in his bed, facing the wall and brooding over the possibility of not being adopted. She gently hugged little Oliver with her giant pudgy fingers curled around his tiny frame and gently massaged his head with her thumb.

“Oliver? Are you okay, honey?” she asked.

Oliver shook his head. “No. Everyone I love is already going away to a new family and I won’t have a family to live with. A real family.” He felt the urge to sob rising in his chest. “I don’t wanna be alone! I wanna have a new mommy who loves my like my mommy did!”

“Oh, sweetie.” Valerie scooped up the tiny boy in his palm and cradled him against her gigantic breasts. Filtered through her organs, muscles, and skin, her muffled heartbeat brought the tiny boy some comfort as he sniffled and sobbed. “I’m sorry you feel this way, but you don’t have to worry anymore because I have some good news for you: You’re gonna find a new family today.”

Instantly, the boy’s sadness melted and lifted brightly on his young features. “Really!?”

“Yes. They heard about you and your condition, so they already filled out the paperwork and they’re ready to meet you.”

For the first time in a year, Oliver felt genuine hope for his future. Valerie cradled the tiny boy against her breasts as she made her way down to the meeting room where a certain woman waited for them. This particular woman was…

1224.content:
The boy is born tiny and is orphaned at a young age, but he is alone with no other family or any orphanage to take him in. Despite being young, he learned to survive in his gigantic environment by scavenging discarded objects and/or lives within the walls of a normal-sized human's home.

The only question is, where does the tiny-born boy learn to survive?

Inside Someone's Home: The boy sneaks into the normal-sized home belonging to an all-female family. Learning from the mice who taught him to scavenge in the wilderness, the boy quietly sneaks around when no one is home and "borrows" some of their discarded objects and food while taking refuge inside the walls. Eventually, one of the giant female family members will catch on and try to catch him, or hire a female pest control officer.

Inside a Restaurant: The boy sneaks into a restaurant run by an all-female staff. Similar to the above route, the boy will try to sneak into the pantries and refrigerators to "borrow" their food and eventually grab the attention of the managers and employees working there. This story route will feature the most prominent types of eateries, from a café and ethnical restaurants, to chain fast foods and fine dining bistros.

Inside a Five-Star Hotel: The boy sneaks into a pristine, five-star hotel where the female managers and some of the female staff mistake him for a mouse, mostly due to how he wears a makeshift mouse costume to disguise himself. The boy must try to survive his stay at the hotel while avoiding the female gusts, the female staff, and eventually the female pest control officers they hire at some point.

-or-

Inside an International Airport: The boy sneaks around a busy international airport where he steals the food and avoids being spotted by the security cameras. At some point, the boy will be accidentally brought onboard an airplane via a woman's luggage and taken to destinations unknown, either nationally or internationally.
1224.title: Alone

choices: More than one of the above options
123.content:
The boy is from a naturally small race of tiny humanoid boys.

According to legend, there are many races of tiny people who have hidden themselves away from the human world due to their fear of their malcontent, including fairies and borrowers.

Fairies have been often depicted as small humanoid figures with beautiful dragonfly wings. They are even-tempered, behave like normal human beings, and they dress like them too. They have a love for cheese and fruits, and they are allergic to silver. They bestow happiness, intelligence, and wealth to those they love and love them back.

Sprites, on the other hand, are smaller, more mischievous than fairies who prefer to pull pranks on their giant human hosts. They are often depicted with pointed hats, butterfly wings, and pointed ears and shoes. They have a love for nectar and pollen. Pixies are known to be ferocious fighters, often fighting for the people they love and love them back. Like their fairy counterparts, pixies are allergic to silver.

Borrowers have often been depicted as humanoid figures, and they are sometimes depicted with a rat's tail. They are as small as their fairy and pixie counterparts, often taking shelter in the walls of a human abode, whose scuttling noises make the occupants believe a mouse is crawling the walls. They often take (or "borrow") discarded objects like clothing scraps. Borrowers must remain hidden from the human eyes, and rarely do stories tell of a borrower being spotted by a human.

Which of these races of tiny people will you choose?

Fairies

Sprites

Borrowers

-or-

More than one of the above options

1251212.content:
Name: Parvus
Age: 5
Eyes: Blue
Hair: White
Height: 3"
Weight: 220 grams
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Parvus was found in an abandoned village as a baby by the Big Babe Bandits who decided to raise him. Parvus seeing the different bandits as mother, aunt, and big sister figures, his primary mother figure being the leader of the Big Babe Bandits.

Name: Rulvu the Voracious
Age: 34
Eyes: Amber
Hair: Black
Height: 7' 6"
Weight: 246 lbs.
Race: Orc
Backstory: The leader of the Big Babe Bandits, an all female group of criminals which is made up of several races. She has incredibly large breasts and a huge doughy rear end. Rulvu also sports a massive pot belly. The rank in the Big Babe Bandit is determined by size; the larger one is the higher the rank but the larger the bandit is the more skilled she is.

Main Story:

"Well ladies looks like we had another successful raid!" Rulvu announces holding up her mug of mead in the air with a grin. The other bandits followed suit, holding up their mugs and cheering wildly. Rulvu and the other bandits had taken up residence in an abandoned village, the same one where Parvus was found. Five years ago, while looking for a new mark, the Big Babe Bandits discovered a village completely devoid of life except for a white haired baby boy that could fit in the palm of your hand. Rulvu decided the best course of option would be to take him in and raise the baby.

The ladies continued to party and drink as they enjoyed themselves. Young Parvus was sleeping in another room, thankfully being quite the heavy sleeper, which was a great thing since the Triple Bs' partied often and partied loud. However even with his impressive ability to sleep, sometimes the partying would get so intense Parvus would be awoken.

Parvus awoke startled, looking back forth, noticing it was still incredibly dark. He then tried to go back to sleep but finds that he isn't tired enough to do so, but what woke him up in the first place?

(note with the options it can be Rulvu or a bandit in general)
1251212.title: The Big Babe Bandits

choices: Little Bandit Boy on the Table
Drowning in the Drink (Another Bandit's Table)
12512121.content:
The room where Parvus slept in was a storage room. It was quieter inside, it had a desk with a window for illumination, and it was where the Big Babe Bandits kept their food.

To accommodate their growing little boy, Rulvu forcefully commissioned and woodcarver to construct a little miniature house fit for a doll-sized boy like Parvus, so he would have to live like a normal-sized being and not scavenge and scurry for food and risk being stepped on. On that note, the woodcarver constructed a walkway along the walls so Parvus wouldn't always have to rely on his surrogate giant family to carry him around.

However, despite the storage room being quieter, all it could do was muffle some of the partying going on outside the door. This proved fruitless because in the middle of a dreamless sleep, a loud, earth-shuddering belch resonated throughout the entire house... no, the entire village, echoing out the countryside. This was followed by a momentary, awkward silence, and a clamor of cheer from the female bandits. What they didn't account for was they woke up the little white-haired boy who was startled awake and couldn't get to sleep because of the noise.

After a few minutes of trying to go back to sleep, another loud belch, not as loud as the one that woke him up, prevented him from falling back. With a moan, Parvus slipped out of bed whilst wearing his pajamas and walked along the walkway into the main hall.

Everywhere he looked in the main hall, he saw the top-ranking members of the Big Babe Bandits celebrating their recent raid of some poor, defenseless village, sharing in the glory of the riches and the fermented taste of mead. All of them were gigantic women of different races from all over the world, but his adopted mother, Rulvu was an orc and as big as a mountain.

Case in point, she and her fellow bandits guzzled down their mead and enjoyed their drunken merriment, the table and floor littered with tens of mead mugs all over. Parvus was familiar with the game; it was a drinking game, and Rulvu hardly ever lost any drinking game with all manner of fermented drinks. Currently, she was engaging with a few of his surrogate aunts and sisters, top-ranking members of the Triple B's below Rulvu. Among them were Broga the Destroyer, Malma the Cunning, and Leopraeda the Swift Blade.

Broga the Destroyer is a runt among goliaths, a giant humanoid race. To prove the other taunting goliaths otherwise, Broga became a member of the Triple B's and consistently challenged Rulvu for her position as their leader, Despite Broga being stronger, Rulvu always won each duel with her skill. She's become Rulvu's second-in-command ever since, and she's used her brute strength to destroy the structures of the villages with a single tackle. Parvus was always uneasy with her, seeing how she as stern, and Parvus was always afraid of stern giants.

Malma the Cunning was a dark-skinned human and the top strategist for the Triple B's, planning out the bandits' raids on the villages and any contingencies should any of the villages show any sign of resistance. She wore a suit armor crafted by the bandits' female blacksmith, and was proficient with a sword. She was also a substitute for Rulvu's motherly guardian roles when the orc was busy with other matters and Parvus needed attention, leading the boy to rate Malma as his favorite aunt, out of all the other bandits.

Leopraeda the Swift Blade, though while smaller than her fellow bandits, earned her moniker for her speed and ferocity with a blade. As a leopard tabaxi, a race of catlike humanoids, Leopraeda was naturally gifted with speed and agility, making her the perfect scout and warrior. Leopraeda initially wanted to eat Parvus since he was as tiny as a baby mouse, but after Rulvu took him in, she naturally grew to accept him as family and not deliberate food. She taught Parvus how to walk and run, and to best use bladed weapons against larger opponents, like any living creature larger than his body, which was kind of redundant. Parvus looked up to her as his surrogate big sister since.

Parvus arrived in the main hall just in time to see Malma guzzle down another mug of mead, slam the mug down, and released a nauseating belch. While the other bandits in the hall applauded it, Parvus slapped his hands over his ears to drown out the noise. It was fortunate then that the walkways were built next to the table where Rulvu and her bandits were stationed at. The only problem was trying to get their attention while everything was so loud, no one would hear his voice.

The tiny-born boy scurried along the walkway until he was just across from the table, watching Leopraeda down another mug and belch like how a human would belch, mixed with a cat's purr and meow, amusing the other ladies present. "Excuse me?" Parvus called out to the giantesses, only to receive no response. "Excuse me? Mama? Auntie Malma? Auntie Broga? Big sis Praeda? Can you hear me?"

The noise was too loud for anyone to hear the child, and the giantesses were intoxicated by the amount of mead they guzzled down. With a tired whimper, Parvus ventured to the edge of the walkway and tried again. "Excuse me!? Mama!? Can you hear me!? I'm trying to sleep, and you woke me up! I can't go back to sleep!"

Parvus got a little closer to the edge of the walkway and tried again. "Hello!? Can you hear me!?"

What happens next?

1.) Parvus gets the attention of Rulvu and the other bandits, and they bring him over to their table.
2.) Parvus is accidentally knocked over by a passing bandit bumping into his walkway, and into a full mug of mead for Rulvu's table!
3.) Parvus is accidentally knocked over by a passing bandit bumping into his walkway, and into a full mug of mead for another bandit's table!
4.) Parvus is accidentally knocked over by a passing bandit bumping into his walkway, and he falls on the floor at the mercy of the giant bandits' feet!
12512121.title: An Earthshaking Belch

125121212.content:
Before Parvus could speak any loud, one of the passing bandits carrying a bunch of mead-filled mugs by the handles in each hand, was sideswiped by another passing bandit, bumping her rear in the wall. The vibration caused Parvus to stumble and lose his balance, and then fall off the safety of the walkway screaming to the floor.

Then all of a sudden, he fell into a lake of lukewarm water, the bubbles tingling his skin. Parvus quickly swam back up the surface, and spat out the liquid. The water had a particular strong earthy and sweet taste, like grains and fruit mixed with fermented honey. Then a horrific chill passed through the tiny boy's body as he looked up and saw a circular opening within a round greyish wall.

He had fallen into a mug of mead!

Suddenly, the entire drink went turbulent, like swimming at sea during a particularly bad storm. Parvus screamed as he struggled to surface above the mead while the bandit that knocked him over carried him to Rulvu's table. With a strong slam of the mugs, Parvus was sunk under the surface of the frothy golden liquid momentarily. When he surfaced again, he felt the entire worldlifting up as he heard the giantesses above him speak.

"You drink too much, Rulvu!" came the guffawing voice of an inebriated Malma.

"When you come back with a wagon full of gold and riches, you just have to celebrate!" came the deep, booming voice of Rulvu, followed by a collected laughter from her companions as she and the other bandits at the table lifted their mugs. "Here's to another rich village in shambles, ladies, and to another few weeks living the easy lives! Cheers!"

"Cheers!" came the collected reply of the table, along with the other bandits in the hall.

Parvus coughed and sputtered while he was caught in the turbulent sea of mead. Suddenly, the current began to flow to another direction while the entire mug tilted backwards. Parvus turned his gaze around, and to his horror, the enormous view of _______ appeared at the rim of the mug, taking in all the mead she could down, each gulp of the drink sent downwards with the fluctuation of the tongue with her eyes closed and oblivious to the five year old she was about to drink..

"No, don't drink me! No!" Parvus screamed for his life.

1.) Rulvu
2.) Broga
3.) Malma
4.) Leopraeda
5.) Pravus's voice reached the bandits' ears, and they all stop before he was swallowed.

Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Kacella was a young villager whose village was recently plundered by the Big Babe Bandits. During her escape, Kacella and her big sister bumped into the bandits' leader, Rulvu the Voracious, who gobbled her up while her second-in-command gobbled up her sister. Since Rulvu has a strong stomach, Kacella's struggled to escape has proved futile.

Main Story:

"H-Hello? Whose voice is that?"

An unlikely voice spoke out in the darkness of Rulvu's stomach. To Parvus's surprise, it was a young girl's voice, and it seemed three years older than he was. The entire stomach shifted from the inside, splashing and sloshing around as the owner of the voice moved around to get more comfortable.

As she did, Parvus was suddenly caught from below the surface of the stomach acid by five fleshy, bulbous objects, and he screamed as he was pinned between those bulbous objects and Rulvu's stomach walls. Parvus did what Leopraeda taught him to do at a time like this, and bit the bulbous objects. Suddenly, he heard the girl's voice exclaim in pain and was then pinned in between the objects.

"Ow! What just bit my toes!?" the girl's voice demanded to know. The owner of the toes, her figure still a silhouette in the darkness of Rulvu’s stomach, reached to her foot and grabbed Parvus by the sides. Parvus screamed as he was lifted and carried over the marsh of the stomach acids and was suddenly dropped in a flat, fleshy plain. His young eyes adjusted to the darkness well enough to see that he was in the palm of the girl's hand, and he got a better look at the girl herself.

She was a young girl who took up most of the valuable space inside the stomach walls. She had shoulder-length hair, wet and matted down with fluids and saliva. Her eyes brightened up as she beheld the little boy in the palm of her hand. "You must be the voice I heard!" the girl gasped. "Did you get eaten too?"

"Uh-huh," Parvus said, "but it was an accident. I fell into a mug of that icky water and I got drunken up!"

"Oh, poor little fairy. I'd never wish a grimmer fate such as yours." The girl gently reached her finger and rubbed her back, inspecting it rather than massaging it. "You're too small to be a fairy, and you're way too small to be a halfling," the girl openly observed. "Were you shrunken down by a witch's spell and captured by the bandits as part of some dark trade?"

"No, I was born this way," Parvus answered, clearly confused by the accusation.

"Then you were still captured by the bandits?" the girl asked.

"No, these bandits are my family," Parvus explained. "They found me when I was left behind when they visited this village, and they've been my mommies, aunties, and big sisters for my entire life. Actually, we're in my mama's tummy. I going to tell her and my aunties that they woke me up and I fell into the mug my mamma drank."

Everything suddenly went quiet following a sharp little gasp. "Then, the orc whose tummy we're in right now, she's your mama?" the girl questioned. "The same orc who led the bandits that burnt my village, killed my mommy and daddy, and swallowed me whole as a game?"

"Uh-huh."

The girl's breathing started to get agitated. She suddenly clenched her hand instinctively, trapping Parvus within her fist as a million thoughts and doubts raced across her head. "No, no, I don't believe it! I don't wanna believe it!" she screamed. "This orc burnt down my home! Her bandits killed my mommy and daddy when he was trying to save me and my sister! We tried to run, but the orc found us, grabbed me and stuffed me down her throat while the goliath did the same with my sister, as part of a game!"

"Let me go! Let me go!" Parvus screamed as he struggled within the compacting pressure of the girl's fist. Her hand squeezed, and Parvus's breath was taken away.

"I'm gonna die! I'm gonna die!" the girl cried out to no one. "This ugly, disgusting orc swallowed me, and now I'm gonna die inside her tummy!"

The girl was becoming hysterical. She curled up into a corner of Rulvu’a stomach walls, and sobbed into her knees, her crying accompanying the surrounding sounds of the orc's groaning stomach. The girl's hand unfurled around the boy, and Parvus climbed up her arms and onto her shoulder. He gently approached her cheek and reached out to touch the girl's skin.

"I'm sorry," Paervus said. "My mama's really a nice person. If I knew she did that to you, I would've told her, 'No mama, don't eat her and her sister!' and then you wouldn't have been eaten. Maybe if we work together, we can get out of here and we can have Borga spit your big sister out, too."

What happens next?

1.) The girl accepts Parvus's friendship and becomes friends with him.
2.) The girl is angry and wants to punish Parvus for being Rulvu’s son.
3.) Rulvu feels a commotion going inside her stomach she demands to know what's going on.
12512121214.title: Companionship for the Gobbled Girl

choices: Back to Bed, Little Bandit Boy
Sleeping with One of the Other Triple B's
Between the Big Babe Bandit Boss's Boobs
Merriment with the Massive Motherly Muggers
1251212125.content:
Leopraeda's feline ears swiveled as they picked up the sounds of a child crying. "Wait, my sisters, and listen!" the leopard tabaxi urged her fellow female comrades before they could take the full swig. They put their mugs down while Leopraeda listened for the sound. "I hear something! It sounds like Parvus is weeping, but he sounds close! Very close, like he is somewhere at our table!"

"Impossible! I put him to bed myself!" Rulvu barked, looking around the table.

She, and Borga, Malma, and Leopraeda quickly searched the surface of the table, and underneath it at their feet. By chance, one of the bandits at the table looked inside the mugs, and immediately spotted the little figure of Parvus splashing about in their mug of mead. "I found him! He was in our mugs, nearly drunken up! He must have fallen into them!"

Rulvu quickly took the mug, and with her pale, meaty hand, reached in and scooped her tiny adopted son in her palm. Parvus fell on all fours and coughed and choked the mead from his throat. He hated the taste of mead, and hated how it burned inside his throat. "Parvus! What happened to you, boy!? How did you end up swimming in our drink and nearly sent to the boiling ovens of our bellies!?"

After Parvus coughed up the last bit of mead, he began to cry. "I was woken up by someone belching, and I couldn't sleep, so I tried to tell you to be quiet, but one of the bandits bumped into the walkway and I fell inside the mug!"

"Our belching contest has awoken you from your slumber?" Rulvu gasped. "But you are such a heavy sleeper, and you've rarely woken up in the middle of the night!" The orc brought her tony son to her face and nuzzled him against her cheeks, cradling him against her pale, yet soft and warm flesh. "Oh, child, I am deeply sorry. You were nearly swallowed because of our merrymaking, and it nearly cost you. Please forgive me."

Parvus returned the cuddling with an embrace of his own, kissing her cheek flesh. "It's okay, mama. It's my fault too because I was too close to the edge of the walkway."

"No, Parvus, it's our fault for waking you up in the first place," Malma retorted. "We were being too loud and you were sleeping. We should've known better. We're sorry, baby." Malma reached out and gently stroked her favorite nephew on her head, and the boy returned the favor by nuzzling her gigantic, dark fingers.

"I'm sorry too," Broga gently thundered.

"Me three," Leopraeda purred regretfully.

Despite the major size difference, Rulvu reached down and gently stroked the top of Parvus's head, gently rubbing the tiny-born child's hair and rustling it all up, making him giggle. She always loved that smile and giggle; it was a clear indication everything would be okay. "How're you feeling, Little Bandit Boy?" Rulvu gently asked. "Are you ready to go back to bed yet?"

What happens next?

1.) Parvus feels sleepy; Rulvu takes Parvus back to his bed.
2.) Parvus feels sleepy; he asks one of the other bandits at Rulvu's table to sleep with them.
3.) Parvus feels sleepy; he asks Rulvu to keep him in her cleavage while she and her table enjoy their spoils.
4.) Parvus doesn't feel sleepy; Rulvu allows him to join in the merrymaking at her table and enjoy their spoils.
1251212125.title: Saved Before the Swallow

choices: Knights in the Dead of Night
12512121251.content:
Parvus opened with a little yawn, the adrenaline rush finally wearing out. "Uh-huh," the little boy said in answering the question to Rulvu's question. "Can you carry me back to bed?"

"Of course, Little Bandit Boy, I'm always happy to carry you around anywhere I want," Rulvu happily said. She cupped her hands and showed him off to Borga, Malma, and Leopraeda. "Now, say goodnight to your aunties and sisters, Parvus."

"Goodnight," Parvus tiredly said, waving at the other giantesses.

When all of the other bandits said their goodnights to Parvus, the motherly orc woman took her adopted son away, pretending to not hear the other bandits' gushing and giggles over how cute Parvus was when he was tired. Rulvu the Motherly was her secret nickname among her closest friends, and it stayed no further than their circle to maintain their reputation. If word had gotten out that Rulvu the Voracious was raising a tiny boy she could eat in one bite, their enemies would take advantage of her through Parvus.

Rulvu escorted the young boy back to the supply room and lowered him to his bed. The boy gently hopped off the edge of her fingers and crawled right in, tucking himself under the covers while Rulvu squat down and watched her son get settled. She assisted in tucking the sheets in so Parvus was nice and secure under the covers.

"There. Are you comfortable, Parvus?" the orc woman asked.

"Yes, mama," Parvus said, with a yawn.

"Good. Now I will be outside the door if you need anything," Rulvu said. She brought her lips down to kiss her son, enveloping his head in two fleshy little mounds before she pulled back.

"Mama, can you tell me a bedtime story?" Parvus asked.

"A bedtime story?" the orc woman inquired.

"Yeah. I can't fall asleep without you telling me a story."

"A story, huh? Hmmm..." Rulvu thought deeply until an old fable came to mind. "You know, I think I might have a story you might like, Parvus. It's called, 'The Giantess and Her Human Sons'." The orc woman gently sat down on a stoop and began to tell the story. "Once, there was a mountain giantess who was cast out for being too small in giant terms. She was as tall as a tree, much like my pinkie finger is a tree to yourself, Parvus. She hid alone in a cave, only feasting on the meat of deer and unfortunate hunters who sought her head."

The boy shifted to his side, listening to the tale his giant orc mother told him. "One day, as she was hunting for food, the mountain giantess came across a young human boy, covered in dirt, and wearing tatters. She picked him up and was about to eat him for supper when the boy begged, 'Please, mountain giantess, spare my life! I am but a poor slave boy who escaped his cruel masters, and now my fellow slaves are being sent to death!'

"The mountain giantess took pity on the boy, for she too had been the subject of cruelty among her fellow mountain giants," Rulvu continued. "So the giantess and the boy pursued and found the slavers, dragging the other boys by a chain. With her size, she scared the cowardly slavers away, while their hired bodyguards were stamped under her feet. She removed the human boys' chains and took them into her cave where she loved them and raised them like her own children.

"The news of the mountain giantess spread to a nearby kingdom where a prince without an heir took interest. He took his men with him and found the cave where the giantess was roasting deer over a fire. The prince said unto her, 'Mountain giant! Your deeds have reached my ears! You have saved these children from torment and slavery, so I shall ask your hand in marriage if you assist me in ending this cruel act upon the children! In exchange, you will be my queen, and we shall make the children you raise ours as well.'

"The giantess then agreed to his terms," continued the motherly orc. "Soon, the giantess and the prince tracked down the slavers to a rotten town full of bad people: Thieves, rogues, and anyone who was far worse. They entered upon a slave-trading house where the leader of the slavers were auctioning off not only human children, but members of all races for their pleasure. With the giantess's might and the prince's sword, they fell many a rogue, but the prince fell in a duel with the slave-trader. Enraged, the giantess killed the slave-trader. With his last breath, he beckoned, 'Mountain giantess, I am fatally wounded. Please take my crest to my kingdom along with these unfortunate slaves, and tell them you have been chosen to lead my kingdom. Go forth, and rule my kingdom, my wife.'

"The prince fell dead, and the giantess wept for him for so long, her tears flooded the town and washed it away from the lands. The giantess took all of the slaves to the kingdom and fulfilled the dying prince's kingdom. Days later, the giantess was made their queen and ruled over the land like how she raised her children with love. The slaves were given homes in the kingdom, and there was peace and plenty during the giantess's reign. Her birth children, and the children after them would later rule the kingdom in her stead."

Rulvu turned to Parvus's form, turned over in his bed, sleeping. The orc woman smiled warmly as she bent over and gently kissed her tiny adopted son full on the body. "Someday, the day will come when you will have to take my place as the boss for my bandits, my Little Bandit Boy," the oversized orc woman said.

Rulvu quietly got up and walked out of the room, her thick hips and buns juggling with each step before she closed the door, leaving Parvus sleeping in the darkness of the supply closet, the moonlight shining through the window hardly illuminating the inside.

What happens next?

1.) Skip to the next morning; Parvus has some training to do!
2.) Skip to the next morning; Parvus wants to spend some time with Rulvu!
3.) Skip to later in the night; the Triple B's are attacked by a legion of female knights!
4.) Skip to later in the night; a sly female rogue sneaks into the supply room and snatches Parvus!
12512121251.title: Back to Bed, Little Bandit Boy

The boy is born tiny in a science fiction setting.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the tiny-born boy?

Field Research: A tiny alien boy doing field research for an assignment where he is supposed to go to another planet, he's about to be in over his head.

Adoption... But Aliens!: A tiny boy is adopted by female aliens.

How about some more options such as....

Kingdom Animalia: A tiny human boy with female anthros.

13.content:
A normal-sized boy lives among women who are taller than the average-sized adult.

Which of these scenarios will apply to the normal-sized boy?

A Giant Family: The boy is born normal-sized, but he lives with a family full of giantesses. In one route, he is born without his mother's hereditary gigantism and is teased constantly by her and/or the other female members of his family. In another route, the boy was an orphan, but he is adopted by a giantess who introduces him to a family full of giant women.

Welcome to Giantess Park: An excited boy visits the world's largest zoo for his birthday, housing giant female anthropomorphic animals whose genetic codes and size were accidentally tampered by an experimental chemical. The popular tourist attraction keeps anthropomorphic giantesses in captivity, including anthros from the jungle, from the sea, and even from the fossils.

The Giantess in the Woods: A lonely young boy travels into the woods and encounters a 50 foot giantess, who takes immediate infatuation with the boy. The giantess hides away from the rest of humanity due to their fear of her immense size and would possibly want to hunt her down. Despite a rocky beginning of their relationship, the boy and the giantess and the boy develop a close friendship with each other.

-or-

Queen of the World: A giantess rules over Earth as it’s queen, either as a dictator or a benevolent ruler. The main boy character happens to be related to the giantess, but he’d rather much keep it a secret from the rest of the world because some people have a dislike for the queen, and therefore extends to other members of her family. The giantess is either good, benevolent, or neutral.
13.title: Normal-Sized Among Giantesses

132.content:
Name: Henry Michaels
Age: 8 years old
Eyes: Green
Hair: Black
Height: 4' 8"
Weight: 96 lbs.
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Henry Michaels is a wondrous boy who received tickets to Giantess Park, the premiere zoo housing the worlds anthropomorphic giantesses normally seen in a zoo or an aquarium. Henry is also easily excitable, which gets him into occasional trouble, and his life-changing visit to Giantess Park will be no different.

Main Story:

Giantess Park is the world’s largest and only leading menageries to specialize in the conservation and research of giant female anthropomorphic animals. This park is roughly the size of two New York Cities where it houses some of the world’s biggest anthros. Products of an experimental lab accident when an experimental growth serum, mixed with the XX chromosomes, was accidentally released into the Henry Dooley Zoo, Giantess Park was quickly established by the UN to house these feral animalistic giantesses with the express purpose of researching their biology all while becoming the world’s most popular attraction.

Families from all over the world can enjoy riding among the wildest anthros in the Safari Park, or take a big splash with the humanized fish in the Aquarium, get close and personal with the gigantic humanized farm animals in the Petting Zoo, or even take an educational tour through the Extinction Enclosures featuring extinct animals revitalized and humanized through the park’s top leading scientists. For those wanting more exciting and thrills, then families should visit the Amusement Park featuring some of the most heart-pounding thrill rides in the world.

Enter eight year-old Henry Michaels, a young boy with slightly messy black hair with a wondrous personality, who was given season tickets to Giantess Park for the summer for his birthday a week prior. Ever since he watched the commercials for the park, Henry was enraptured by the giantesses and wanted to go so bad, his mom, Jennifer practically caved in and ordered the tickets. Today was the first day he’d visit the park for the summer and he wanted to explore every inch of the park himself. Today, he wanted to explore...

The Safari Park (featuring African wildlife, a savannah, a jungle, and a watering hole)

The Aquarium (featuring exhibits for marine mammals, fish, and other members of the marine ecosystem)

The Petting Zoo (featuring farm animals such as cats, dogs, horses, cows, etc.)

-or-

The Extinction Enclosures (featuring exhibits for revitalized extinct animals, such as dinosaurs, mammals, birds, etc.)
132.title: Welcome to Giantess Park

1321.content:
The Safari Park was the largest section of Giantess Park. Based around the African Savanna, the Safari Park featured wild anthro giantesses based on the African wildlife, ranging from carnivores such as the lions, the cheetahs, and the hyenas, to herbivores such as the elephants, the rhinoceroses, and the giraffe. The elephants were the biggest species in the park, standing as big as sixty feet compared to the other fifty-foot African wildlife.

For safety precautions, the guests rode in a special double-decker vehicle equipped with reinforced paneling designed to withstand a giantess’s crushing weight. Henry and Jennifer entered the vehicle as it plus the other visitors were boarding at the station. The employee with the public-address microphone gave the standard routine introduction, the usual safety procedures (“Please keep your arms and legs inside the vehicle” and all that), and then with the hiss of the brakes’ release, the vehicle was off on its intended route.

Since the Safari Park was the biggest section of Giantess Park, it had to be divided into various subsections: The Savannah, where most of the giant anthros roamed; the Jungle, where the giant anthros lurked in the trees and the bushes; and the Watering Hole, where the anthro giantesses peacefully drank from a giant freshwater lake. In that order, that’s the route the vehicle took, and it took the vehicle a half-hour to complete its route.

Which of these subsections does this particular story route take place?

The Savannah
Carnivores: Lions, Cheetahs, Hyenas
Herbivores: Giraffes, Gazelles, Impalas, Elephants, Rhinoceroses, Zebras

The Jungle:
Carnivores: Leopards, Pangolins, Mambas
Herbivores: Elephants, Antelope, Okapis

The Watering Hole:
Carnivores: Lions, Cheetahs, Leopards, Hyenas, Crocodiles
Herbivores: Hippos, Elephants, Antelope, Gazelles, Impalas
1321.title: The Safari Park

135.content:
Which of these scenarios will apply to the normal-sized boy?

Stranded on an Amazonian Island: The boy (and possibly other boys) survives a shipwreck at sea and wash up on the shores of a remote island not found anywhere on any map! As the boy explores the island, he discovers that the only people who inhabit it are a tribe of Amazonian women, with the adult women standing 10 feet tall, and the girls his age standing as tall as an average-sized adult! The boy is taken in by this tribe, and how they'll react to the boy's presence is entirely up to you.

Ruler of the Giantesses: One day, the boy encounters a giantess who informs him that he is the newest young king to a race of giantesses hidden from the human race, and discovers that he has the power to control the giantesses. With his newfound royal title and power, the boy is given a new family among the giantess race and uses his power to make the giantesses do what he wishes.

Close Friends with a Giantess: When he was younger, the boy befriended a giantess and became close childhood friends with her. The boy's close friendship with the giantess is explored, from the moment when they first encountered each other, to the earlier years of their friendship and their many misadventures, to the boy developing feelings for his gigantic companion. (A/N: The main characters in this route is age-variable, so you can decide their ages, so long as they stay within the age range.)

-or-

Kidnapped!: One day, the boy is kidnapped by a huge giantess and is taken to someplace far away from human civilization (a different dimension, a different planet, a hidden lair, etc.). The giantess has plans for the boy involving some form of torture, but what that torture is, the boy doesn't want to find out. (A/N: This route focuses mainly on an evil giantess torturing the boy, but be sure to follow the rules.)
135.title: Continuing with Normal-Sized I
