13551.content:
(Written by Dolphinman; story and last two options edited by ejones312)

Names: Harvey Portson
Age: 7 years old
Height: 3” 9
Weight: 50.5 lbs.
Hair: Platinum Blonde
Eyes: Light Blue
Ethnicity: white
Background: A quiet and gentle boy who often keeps to himself, Harvey doesn't really have friends due to his quietness. He wishes that he has friends, though, but accomplishing it is easier said than done.

Main Story

“Your father and I will only be gone for a week Harvey. You’ll be staying with the babysitter at her home,” Mrs. Portson said as she and her husband drove to the home of the babysitter. Mr. and Mrs. Portson were going on a business trip, so they were leaving young Harvey with a babysitter, an anthro whose size alone was as massive as their house, maybe even bigger.

“Okay, mom,” Harvey said softly as he held his bag to him.

"Don't worry, honey, the babysitter will take wonderful care of you," Mr. Portson said. "She's a top-rated babysitter who loves watching over human kids, and the kids love her too. This'll be a good opportunity for you to open up while you're staying with her."

The boy said nothing and looked out the car window, and watched as they passed the massive buildings designed to accommodate the giant anthros. Eventually, the Portsons arrived at the home of the babysitter. They approached the massive front door and rang the small doorbell designed for human guests. The door swung open, revealing the babysitter.

The only question is, who is the anthro babysitter?

(A/N: Even if you pick only one character, you can still feature the other characters listed in the options below.)

Raksha
Age: 26 years old
Eyes: Reddish-Brown
Height: 58'
Weight: 512 lbs.
Ethnicity: Tiger
Background: Raksha is an energetic yet lazy tomboy tigress who is quite hefty with very large breasts and a huge doughy belly. Raksha’s best feature is her butt, which jiggles like jello and is pliable like fresh dough, which she is incredibly proud of. This is her first time babysitting someone who isn’t a relative (and fir herst time babysitting for pay), so she is eager for this opportunity.

Luna

Eyes: Gray

Weight: 483 lbs.
Ethnicity: Wolf
Background: Luna is a fat, grey, gothic wolf girl who's only babysat younger, more rambunctious anthro children, so she welcomes the chance to babysit a quiet human child. Like her fur, Luna is quite soft, having big breasts, a large gut and a fat butt. She often likes things quiet, but she gets paid well for babysitting.

Belle

Eyes: Brown

Having babysat younger anthros and humans packed with energy, Belle keeps the kids in the straight and narrow with their antics, but is always willing to help them whenever possible.

Siobhan
Age: 30 years old
Eyes: Gold
Height: 40'
Weight: 375 lbs.

Siobhan's scales are as smooth and red as a smoothed ruby stone, but she has large breasts and a dome-shaped belly covered in warm, cushiony cream-colored belly scales. Siobhan likes to play with the children and doesn't mind playing Knights and Dragons with the human children, but she does sometimes accidentally slip and land her assets on them.
13551.title: Adventures in Babysitting

choices: The Good Ol' Hide and Seek
In the Big Raksha Candy Mountains...
135511.content:
A large flabby orange tiger girl opened the door, she owned a large protruding gut which was sticking out underneath her white T-shirt which had the word “Mondays” printed on it. The tiger also had quite large breasts which rested upon her gut. She was also wearing short-shorts which encapsulated her gigantic rear end. “Heyo, Portsons, I am really happy that you guys were willing to let me babysit your kid," the tigress said with a grin.

“Of course, your mother is such a sweet woman and we knew that any relative of hers would be great for looking after our little Harvey,” Mrs. Portson said putting a hand on her boys shoulder. The Portsons lived next to Raksha’s mother, an old tiger woman who suggested to the Portsons to go for Raksha to babysit.

“Now we made sure to put everything you need to know in the email and of course if there is any trouble at all make sure to call us," Mr. Portson said.

“Got it, you guys have nothing to worry about, Harvey will be safe with me like a bug in a rug,” Raksha assured. Harvey’s parents then said their goodbyes before driving off, leaving the boy alone with the massive tigress. Raksha lowered herself and placed her hand on the ground for Harvey to get on. “Here’s nothing to be afraid of kiddo, you can trust me.”

Harvey gingerly walked over and stood on the fat woman’s hand. Raksha cupped her hands together and gently walked into the house making sure the kid is safe but he can still see. Harvey noticed in the kitchen, there were dozens of empty pizza boxes. “Did you have a party?” Harvey asked quietly, getting a small chuckle from the babysitter in return.

“Not quite. Every couple of months, I do host an eating contest with some friends of mine from high school, I just haven’t cleaned up from yesterday’s mess."

Raksha then headed to her room, which had a variety of different objects and decorations, but the bed was also not made and there were some clothes lying on the ground. “This is where you’ll be sleeping. I do have a guest bedroom, but since you’re so small I think staying with me would be best." The tigress took Harvey’s bag and set it on the night stand. She held the boy up to her face to get a closer look and sniffed. “Man, you smell pretty good, you probably use some pretty nice shampoo.”

“Now, it’s still pretty early in the day doubt you’re tired. I’ll admit this is my first time babysitting a human, so I am not entirely sure what I can do with you, but I am sure I can figure it out,” Raksha sayid looking at the little quiet boy.

“Oh wait, I know!” Raksha exclaimed.

What is Raksha’s idea?

1. Watching a streaming service; one of the movies on Raksha's watchlist is about a fat anthro and a young human boy.

2. Raksha decides to play a game of hide and seek with Harvey.

3. Raksha has a leftover box of pizza in the fridge, so she and Harvey eat some for lunch.

4. Raksha lies down and watches Harvey explore her blubbery body.

5. Raksha invites a friend(s)/lover(s) to her house and they have a house party with Harvey (and other boys below 15).
135511.title: Raksha the Tiger

1355111.content:
"How about we watch a movie together?" Raksha suggested. "Do you like movies, Harvey?"

"Yes," Harvey meeped.

"Good, because I know a streaming website where we can watch all kinds of movies." Raksha lowered herself onto the couch, which Harvey notice had an indent from where she had been sitting. She set the little boy down on her enormous belly, turned on the TV to her favorite streaming site, Anthflix, and scrolled through her watchlist.

"Here's a movie that I've been meaning to watch for a while," Raksha said eagerly, scrolling onto a movie poster with a boy Harvey's age standing in the palm of a kitsune. "It's called 'Amaterasu: Bonds Transcending Through Life'. It's about a boy who discovers that he is the reincarnation of a young shrine priest who befriended a kitsune, a fox spirit, and unlocks her from her prison inside a cave. It won a lot of awards at the Anthro Film Festival last year, and I feel you might like it too."

Harvey didn't say anything as Raksha played the movie. The film itself wasn't all that bad. The film opened with Seiya, an eight-year old boy Japanese boy who was riding with his parents through a rainstorm when another truck swerved in the rain, causing them to crash off the side of the steep hill with only Seiya as the survivor.

Seiya was then sent to live with his grandmother at a shrine, accompanied by a shrine maiden under her tutelage. The grandmother was loving and accommodating, but the shrine maiden was also strict, so Seiya worked himself to the bone under the shrine maiden's watch. After a week of tireless labor, the frustrated Seiya wanted to run away, but someone slipped a stone key and a note giving him directions to a sacred cave, the Amano-Iwatu.

Seiya secretly marches up to the Amano-Iwatu and uses the stone key to unlock a stone door, leading to a single stone lantern. When Seiya lit the lantern, he released an oversized, but regal fox spirit, Amaterasu. Seiya was frightened by Amaterasu's appearance, but Amaterasu, while holding the frightened boy, took a liking to him, since he was the descendant of a priest of befriended the fox goddess in a past life. Amaterasu explained to Seiya that the priest, though young, ultimately sealed Amaterasu away in the lantern for reasons unknown to them. The two became fast friends, but Seiya kept Amaterasu a secret from everyone else, except for his intuitive grandmother.

Harvey watched the film with interest as Seiya bonded with Amaterasu, who took the form of a spiritual feral fox, and allowed Seiya to ride with her through the night sky while remaining invisible. The shrine maiden started becoming suspicious of Seiya's activities, but the grandmother kept the maiden at bay by brushing off her suspicions.

There came a point in the film that terrified Harvey when three bullies from the school Seiya transferred to followed him up to the Amano-Iwatu and beat him up senselessly. This ticked off Amaterasu, who proceeded to gobble up two of the bullies, leaving the last bully left for her to devour, but Seiya stopped her and begged her to release them. Despite her protests under the basis of her loyalty to the boy, Seiya threatened to seal Amaterasu back up if she didn't comply. Amaterasu regurgitated two of the boys and warned them about the consequences the next time they even looked at Seiya or even speak of her presence. The Japanese boy and the obese fox spirit engaged in a fiery argument, which drove a rift between the two.

Meanwhile, one of the bullies went for the shrine maiden for help and learned the connection between Seiya and Amaterasu. The shrine maiden confronted Seiya about the fox spirit and locked him in a closet so she could place a permanent seal on the lantern where Amaterasu resided within. She gathered the priests and maidens and marched to Amano-Iwato where Amaterasu confronted them. Seiya's grandmother reluctantly aided them. Seiya, while trying to break the lock, finds an old box containing mementos of the young priest and his feelings for Amaterasu and why he sealed her away. Having regrets about the argument, Seiya used a tool in the closet to pry the door open and hurry over to Amano-Iwato. Before the shrine maiden could perform the seal, Seiya tackled her and professed his feelings for Amaterasu as a dear friend.

Seiya explained the reason that the priest sealed Amaterasu in the lantern was because he was sick, and he didn't want to see the kitsune who loved him to see her beloved young friend die. He died at the young age of 15 while his older wife carried his child within her, strengthening the family tree. Amaterasu read the priest's mementos and cried. She lifted Seiya to her lips and kissed him full on the face, thanking him and the spirit of the priest inside him for the gift. She and Seiya exchange a tearful goodbye as she ascended into the heavens, leaving Seiya for the spirit world. Seiya's grandmother then admitted she gave him the stone key unlocking Amaterasu's seal because he needed someone to help ease the ache of loss in his heart, just like the priest, but Seiya replied that he had her and Amaterasu in his heart as they looked up into the starry sky, a star twinkling in the night sky.

Harvey stretched as the film ended and the credits rolled. This was his first ever anthro film he's ever watched, as well as his first foreign film altogether, and he loved it. He could relate to Seiya, how he was young and thrust into a situation featuring a giant anthro woman changing his life. The part where Amaterasu devoured the boys would later haunt him for a couple of days, but he'd get over it.

With the film finally ending, what happens next?

1.) Raksha asks Harvey if he wants to watch another film/TV show on Anthflix.
2.) Raksha asks Harvey if he would like to do something else other than watch TV.
3.) Raksha is asleep, so Harvey tries to wake her up.
1355111.title: Movie Time

1355112.content:
"Why don't we play hide and seek?" Raksha suggested. "I'll be it, and you have to go and hide while I try to seek you. If I don't find you in ten minutes, then you win the round."

"Wh-what happens if you catch me?" Harvey shyly asked, afraid of what he'd get for an answer.

His fears were reaffirmed when Raksha sported a playful, toothy grin, her fangs glistening inside that smug smirk. "Well, if I win, I get to decide what to do with you," the tigress said with a mischievous twinge in her tone, "but that all depends on whether or not I can find you. Now..." Raksha gently placed Harvey on the floor before her massive feet paws. "I'm gonna count to sixty, and you go run and hide somewhere, but not where I can't reach you."

Raksha turned around so she was facing the wall, covered her eyes, and began counting. Harvey took the first three seconds as the signal to start hiding. He didn't know where to go. Everything was so big, and he didn't have the strength to climb up any giant furniture. Ultimately, he had to settle for hiding somewhere on the ground where she couldn't see him.

"...26... 27... 28... 29..."

Raksha's counting was halfway done, and Harvey felt the panic weight down on his feet. He didn't want to stick around and see what the giant fat tiger had planned for him if she found him. He whipped his head around, trying to find a perfect hiding spot. Then he found the perfect hiding spot...

1.) ...underneath the couch.
2.) ...inside of Raksha's discarded shoes.
3.) ...inside a half-empty bag of cheese snacks.
4.) ...but was too late; Raksha finished her countdown!
1355112.title: The Good Ol' Hide and Seek

13551122.content:
Harvey scurried across the floor as he tried to find a place to hide. Under the couch? No, that's too obvious. Inside that open bag of cheese snacks? No, he didn't want to get eaten. He silently considered whether or not to hide in there but decided against it. Finally, Harvey noticed Raksha's incredibly large shoes lying on their side and decided to hide inside them.

Harvey quickly ran towards the opening of one of Raksha's sneakers. As he reached the rim, the boy was hit with an unpleasant smell of stale sweat, sour foot powder, and feet. The child cringed and drew back from the shoe. He quickly reconsidered his choice of hiding spot since it was too stinky for him to survive for five minutes, let alone one.

"41...42...43...44..."

Harvey had fifteen seconds to hide, and since all the other hiding spots were too far away for him to run to, he had little choice in the matter. The blonde boy quickly climbed over the rim and made his way to the toe tip of the shoe. The boy crouched at the tow area and hid in the shadows, hardly any light shining in except for the one cast by the entrance into the shoe.

The smell of Raksha's feet became more potent and pungent. Harvey covered his nose and held his breath while he heard the telltale signs of the last five seconds being counted off by his giant babysitter.

“56…. 57…. 58…. 59….. 60! Alright, ready or not, here I come!”

Raksha turned from her corner and crouched down, crawling on all fours to seek out the boy, like the tiger she was stalking her prey. "Oh, Harvey~! Come out, come out, wherever you are~!" she cooed. She loved stalking humans, and the young boy she was seeking was no exception to her nature.

Harvey felt and heard Raksha come loser to his hiding spot, holding his breath. "Are you in... here!?" he heard Raksha say as she looked into the bag of cheese snacks. "Nope, he's not here. Such a shame, he'd be delicious with cheese."

The last five words rang through the frightened boy's head; the giant tiger woman wanted to eat him! That was the reason she wanted him here, he assumed. Harvey saw a shadow cast over the light shining inside the shoe. He felt Raksha getting closer to the shoe and heard her purring.

"Maybe... he's in here!?" Raksha whipped her eyes under the couch, but she couldn't find him there. "Nope, that'd be too easy."

The tiger giantess stood up and pondered. "Hmmm... if I were a little human boy and wanted to get away from a giant, where would I be hiding?"

Raksha's golden cat eyes turned to her shoes lying on the floor.

What happened next?

1.) Raksha checks her shoes and finds Harvey!

2.) Raksha puts her feet inside her shoes; she's aware Harvey is in there!

3.) Raksha puts her feet inside her shoes; she's unaware Harvey is in there!
13551122.title: Shoe, Shoe, Harvey!

135511221.content:
Raksha said nothing as she walked over to the pair of shoes on the ground. The incredibly fat tiger putting a hand in the one Harvey was in and feeling around until she found the blonde child, grabbing him and pulling him out of the shoe with no difficulty.

“Found you Harvey! I win!” The woman exclaimed victoriously with a grin on her face. However it soon vanished when she saw Harvey whimpering and tearing up. “P-please don’t eat me” Raksha was confused for a moment, about to ask why he would ask that before coming to the realization that the boy must have heard her while he was hiding in the shoe.

“Hey, hey, Harvey calm down buddy, I was making a joke earlier about eating you, I swear on my life I won’t hurt you, okay?” Raksha said in a soothing voice trying to ease the boy’s worries.

“O-okay” Harvey said, wiping the tears from his face as he looked up at Raksha, “Now the deal of the game was that since I find you I get whatever I want, but I am going to make sure it is enjoyable for you as well,” the fat tigress said.

What is Raksha gonna do?

1. Have Harvey snuggle up to her humongous doughy belly.

2. Take off her shorts and have Harvey cuddle with her fat butt

3. Put Harvey in her cleavage so he is snug between her breasts.
135511221.title: Not-So Sneaky Sneaker

135511222.content:
A knowing smirk spread across the tigress's muzzle as she marched over the shoes lying on the ground. As fat and lazy as she was, she was still smart, and she was smart enough to know that only a young human would be small enough to fit inside one of her shoes.

Raksha's footfalls created tremors as Harvey crouched into the shadows of the sneaker's toe section. He held his breath and silently wished for the tiger giantess to overlook the shoes and search in another room. Unfortunately, Harvey's wishes wouldn't come true as he felt the sneaker he was in tip over, making him tumble in the center. The light that shone inside the sneaker darkened as four orange-furred toes with black leathery pads slipping inside.

The boy screamed as he ran for cover at the very tip of the shoe. Before Harvey could jump for cover, he was suddenly squished under those leathery pads bumping from the white-furred soles of the obese tiger giantess. The toes twitched and scuffled, turning Harvey over until he was on his back and flattened underneath the pads. The boy could only scream and cry as his movements were restrained by the weight of the toes holding him under.

From outside the shoe, Harvey heard Raksha giggle before he was suddenly caught in a sudden upward swing of the shoe, the tiger giantess lifting up her foot to examine the little boy she felt underneath her toes. "Gotcha, Harvey!"

"Let me out! Let me out!" Raksha's feline ears picked up on Harvey's screams from inside her wide footwear. "Please, let me out!"

"Mmmm, nope. Sorry, can't do that," Raksha playfully replied. "You hid in my shoe and I've found you, so as per our game rules, you're going to do what I want you to do, and what I want to do..." Raksha wiggled her toes, subjecting her young babysat to further torment. "...is keep you under my toes for half an hour."

"What!? Nooooo!" Harvey wailed underneath the tiger giantess's toes, but was silenced when a simple wiggle of the padded toes muffled his mouth.

"But since half an hour is such a long time, we need something to do to pass the time," Raksha said. "But what to do, I wonder? Hmmm..."

The obese tiger anthro crossed her legs and bobbed her foot, knocking Harvey around inside. Despite how soft the sole of the shoe and the foot was, Harvey was bounced around roughly inside the giant footwear. To Raksha, he felt like a little pebble she enjoyed bouncing around underneath her foot. The tigress was no doubt enjoying this playfulness at his expanse.

Then Raksha had an idea.

What was Raksha's idea?

1.) Raksha wants Harvey to worship ad pamper her feet.
2.) Raksha wants to go for a walk with Harvey inside her shoe.
135511222.title: An Irregular Shoe-In

13551123.content:
Harvey scurried across the floor as he tried to find a place to find. Under the couch? No that's too obvious. Harvey then noticed Raksha’s incredibly large shoes. He silently considered whether or not to hide in there but decided against it. Finally, Harvey noticed a bag of cheese puffs on the floor and decided to hide inside of it. The young boy shuffled himself past the wall of cheese snacks and hid in the back so the snacks were between him and the outside world.

“56…. 57…. 58…. 59….. 60! Alright, ready or not, here I come!” Raksha grinned as she walked around the house, humming and swishing her tail as she looked for the blonde boy. “Oh where, oh where could my Harvey be?” Raksha said in a sing-song voice as she looked under the couch.

“Nope not here,” she said but she wasn’t discouraged as she got up and went over to her shoes to see if Harvey was in there. “Still not there, but I still have plenty of time to find the kid.”

Raksha stood up, her body jiggling as she did. Raksha took a deep sniff and let out a content sigh as she turned around and noticed the bag of cheese puffs on the ground. She licked her lips as she walked over. “Ooh, I almost forgot about these! Come to mama.”

Raksha picked up the bag and started to pour the cheese puffs into her mouth. Harvey let out a frightened squeak as he felt his surroundings fit and lift upwards into the air. He gasped as he felt himself and the cheese snacks fall into the open mouth of the giant tiger anthro. The boy squeezed his eyes shut and braced himself for the worst.

Harvey let out a squeak as he could feel his surroundings move around as the bag was lifted up into the air and he gasped as he could feel himself fall. The boy closed his eyes as he braced himself.

What happens?

1.) Raksha catches Harvey; she knew he was in there.

2.) Harvey falls into Raksha’s mouth; the tiger unaware he was in the bag.

3.) Harvey falls into Raksha’s mouth; she knows the boy was in the bag.

4.) Harvey misses Raksha’s mouth and lands on another part of the body; she doesn’t know he was in the bag.
13551123.title: A Cheesy Place to Hide

135511231.content:
Harvey suppressed a muffled shriek as he fell with an avalanche of cheesy puffs to the opening of the bag, falling into Raksha's wide open maw. He had his eyes squeezed shut and braced himself for the worst as he fell over the rim of the bag and into the open air, falling towards the tiger anthro's open mouth.

Suddenly, a giant orange-and-black-striped paw with an opposable paw thumb snatched the child before he could pass through her lips, encasing him in a dark tomb of cheese snacks, fur, and leather pads. Harvey felt the paw overturn so the palm was facing upwards and the fingers opened up, revealing the smirking face of the tiger anthro looking down at the little boy like a plump goddess, her intent on toying with him all too clear.

"Well, whaddya know? I empty out my cheese snacks, and I find a little surprise inside," Raksha quipped.

"H-How did you know wh-where I was?" Harvey asked, shaken by the experience.

"Remember how I got a good whiff of you earlier?" Raksha asked. She tapped her nose with her free paw hand. "I followed your trail into the bad. You can't escape this, no matter how many times you bury yourself in cheese snacks."

"Th-then why did you try to eat me?"

"I couldn't pass up an opportunity to scare you like this, since you tried to hide in my food," Raksha answered. Harvey huddled up against the leather pads under the tiger anthro's smirking gaze. "And since I caught you, fair and square, I get to decide what to do with you."

Harvey felt his heart drop and his blood freeze at the millions of horrifying thoughts and scenarios of being subjected under the tiger giantess's size. After pondering what to do, an idea ran across Raksha's head. "Oh, I know what to do with you," the tiger said, holding Harvey up to the level of her eager golden eyes.

What does Raksha do to Harvey?

1.) Tease him by lapping him up with her tongue on her palm.
2.) Put him in her cleavage and squish him between her massive boobs.
3.) Put him in the back of her pants and grind him underneath her rear end.
4.) Play hide and seek again, but Raksha is still it!
5.) Play hide and seek again, but Harvey is it
135511231.title: Caught Orange-Handed

135511232.content:
Harvey suppressed a muffled shriek as he fell with an avalanche of cheesy puffs to the opening of the bag, falling into Raksha's wide open maw. He had his eyes squeezed shut and braced himself for the worst as he fell over the rim of the bag and into the open air, falling towards the tiger anthro's open mouth.

Harvey fell past the rubbery lips, through the gateway of razor-sharp teeth, and landed on the surface of the tongue with a splat. Not long afterwards, the teeth closed with a clack, leaving the poor boy in a dark, humid place. All of a sudden, the maw went to work, the tongue pushing the food against the crushing molars where it was crushed and compacted, turning into mush with a mixture of saliva.

Harvey screamed as he was tossed with the food, narrowly missing the jaws that threatened to cream him into a crimson, coppery paste. He tried to resist the tongue, but it was too powerful for him to push against. Raksha's voice hummed in satisfaction, apparently more aware of the cheesy flavor of the snacks and unaware of Harvey's presence. Harvey didn't know it, but by pushing himself through the cheesy snacks, he sealed his fate by accumulated the cheese flavoring.

"Mmmph, so good," Raksha moaned, almost sexually from the stimulation of the junk food's flavor. "Too bad Harvey is trying to hide because he'd really enjoy this snack."

Ironically, the tiger anthro didn't realize that Harvey was closer than she thought, inside her mouth, and tossed around with her tongue and nearly crushed by her powerful carnivorous jaws. As the cheese snacks turned to mush, and Harvey was sent to the middle of the tongue, Raksha was ready to send the food to the next destination inside her body.

She guided the cheese snack bolus and Harvey to the back of her tongue until he hit her throat. Before Harvey could scream, the tongue jolted, sending the cheesy mush down down Raksha's esophagus with a mighty swallow. As for Harvey, when he was sent to the back of the tiger giantess's throat...

1.) ... he was swallowed alive along with the food.
2.) ...he quickly grabbed the uvula just before he was swallowed alive.
3.) ...he quickly grabbed one of the rear molars before he was swallowed alive.

Harvey fell past the rubbery lips, through the gateway of razor-sharp teeth, and landed on the surface of the tongue with a splat. Harvey screamed as he was tossed with the food, narrowly missing the jaws that threatened to cream him into a crimson, coppery paste. 135511233.title: The Knowing Tiger's Maw

135512.content:
The babysitter was a large wolf anthro, with grey fur with patches black on the tip of her ears, and white fur on her belly. In that topic, her belly and assets were as big and bloated as the Hindenburg, and her breasts were as large as two hot air balloons. The belly was hardly fully covered up by the giant wolf woman's extra-large (to her) black T-shirt since they were held up by her colossal breasts, and her gut flowed over the waistline of her black leggings.

The giant's size wasn't what scared Harvey in place. It was her appearance that frightened him; she reminded him of a witch. Her canid ears and bottom lip were pierced with black hoop earrings, her hair was dyed black, and she wore dark eyeshadow and nightshade lipstick. Her black T-shirt depicted a white skull and crossbones, her black leggings were really shaggy jeans with metallic skull and crossbones, and she wore black high top sneakers over her feetpaws.

The wolf giantess took one look at Harvey and his family with her piercing grey eyes, and simply held up a greeting hand. "'Sup? You must be the Portsons, right?" she asked in a kind, monotonous tone.

"Yes, and you must be Luna, the babysitter my friends recommended to me," Mrs. Portson delightfully replied. "It's a pleasure to meet you at last."

Her gaze moved over to the shuddering boy. "Then I take it the kid must be Harvey?"

"That's him." Mrs. Portson gently took Harvey's hand and led him closer to the wolf giantess. "Don't be rude, Harvey. Say hi."

The frightened boy looked up to the giant wolf anthro. He had only reached up his hand to greet her, but the nervousness choked him from completing his task. He quickly ducked behind the safety of his mother, who scoffed. "You'll have to excuse him. He's just normally shy and quiet, especially around strangers," Mrs. Portson quickly apologized as she gently stroke his back.

"It's okay. This must be his first time he's ever been close to a giant, so it's only natural that he's afraid of me." Luna gently went down on one knee, bent forward, and presented an outstretched palm to him. Harvey backed away from it, but then he looked up to Luna's eyes, and they were gentle. "It's okay, Harvey. Trust me."

Harvey didn't know why, but he felt at ease with the gothic giantess's presence. He slowly stepped forwards towards the outstretched finger and gingerly reached for it. When his hand touched that fur, he instinctively took it back, but then he tried it again. The fuzzy fur on her fingers was soft and warm. He liked the sensation, and he couldn't let go of it. The boy looked up into the anthro's eyes, not knowing what he was feeling, and the wolf smiled back at him.

"These sorts of things take time to get over," Luna explained to the parents, not taking her eyes off of the boy. "Besides, since Harvey is quiet, it'd be a nice takeaway from having to babysit more energetic kids."

"Good to hear, because our flight leaves in an hour," Mr. Portson said, looking at his watch. "If anything changes while we're gone, we'll let you know ahead of time."

"We've left you a list of Harvey's needs and our emergency numbers in the email we've sent you," Mrs. Portson said while her husband unloaded their son's luggage for the week. "If anything happens to Harvey, don't hesitate to call us immediately."

"Don't worry Mr. and Mrs. Portson, I won't let anything happen to your boy," Luna said. "He's in capable hands... in a manner of speaking, of course."

Mrs. Portson went over to her son and kissed him on the forehead. "Goodbye, sweetie. We'll be back in a week," she said, hugging him.

Mr. Portson quickly hugged Harvey and tousled his platinum blonde hair. "See you next week, sport. I'll bring you something good from our trip. I promise."

Soon the Portsons went in their car and drove away while Harvey shyly waved at them goodbye. He turned up to the wolf giantess, who reached down with her other paw and gently scooped him up into her own hands and lifted him up. Harvey whimpered and hyperventilated from the adrenaline rush of the sensation of being lifted up like he was in an elevator thrill ride at a theme park, and his next stop was the wolf giantess's muzzle.

Luna brought the tiny boy up to her nose and took a few deep whiffs. Each whiff threatened to pull Harvey into her large nostrils with the force of tornado's suction. After the third whiff, she sighed contently and held him out for her to see him better. "Sorry about that, Harvey. Had to get your scent. You'll never know when your smell might come in handy."

Luna took the boy back into her house and shut the door behind her. Harvey held on tightly while he was carried in Luna's gigantic palms. He noticed how with each step Luna took, the flab on her breasts and her belly jiggled like jello. The way the blubber bounced underneath all that fur was visually appealing to him, and he didn't know why it was mesmerizing.

“Since you’re going to be staying with me for a while, Harvey, I'll give you the official tour of the place,” Luna said, snapping Harvey out of his trance. With a silent nod, the boy was carried around Luna's house in her fuzzy hands. She showed him the kitchen, the living room (which consisted of two couches, a coffee table, and a TV with the usual equipment and the movie players), and the bathroom.

"...and this is the bedroom where I sleep," Luna said as she walked into the bedroom. The bedroom consisted of a typical queen-sized bed with a closet and a set of drawers. The walls were decorated with a bunch of posters featuring anthro heavy metal rock bands, and there was a bass guitar leaning against a speaker, sitting beside the bed and the drawers.

"You'll be sleeping with me since I'll know you're safe and close by," said Luna. "Maybe you'd like to see exactly where you're sleeping, or maybe you'd prefer to wait until later tonight after we hang out and have dinner?"

Harvey shook his head. “No, I’m not tired. I wanna wait until later.”

“Smart choice. Even I wouldn’t know where we would be headed if I showed you,” Luna said, feeling slightly relieved. “Although, this gives us plenty of time to hang out in the house and get to know each other a little better. How about it, Harvey? Do you have a preference where you wanna hang out?”

Where in Luna’s house does Harvey want to spend time with his babysitter?

1.) Her bedroom; Luna plays a little tune with her bass guitar and explains her gothic lifestyle.
2.) The kitchen; Harvey is hungry and Luna provides a little meal for him, while Harvey is curious about her enormous figure.
3.) The living room; Harvey and Luna watch TV together while Harvey becomes curious about climbing her body.
135512.title: Luna the Wolf

choices: As Cool As Cold Cow Milk
135513.content:
The babysitter was a large cow woman, white with brown spots, and flowing brown hair. Originally from the countryside, the giant cow anthro wore a flannel shirt tucked into her tight blue jeans, which surprisingly help up well against her large breasts and behind. Hardly anyone could say much for her pudgy middle, since it was overshadowed by her assets.

"Howdy, y'all must be the Portsons, right?" the anthro cow inquired, speaking in a country drawl.

"Yes, and you must be Belle," Mrs. Portson said. "Our friends, he Andersons told us about you. You babysat their son, Johnny, and they said you managed to get him to behave despite him being, uh... loud and obnoxious?"

"Yep, that li'l boy was a real spitfire," Belle confirmed. "I can't stand kids who are rambunctious and loud, so I put them on the straight and narrow and I always make sure they stay there for their folks."

"Well, you won't have any trouble with Harvey. He's as straight as any kid can get," Mrs. Portson said, rubbing her scared stiff son gently on his shoulders, nudging him forward. "Of course, he's a bit shy, but I assure you, he won't give you too much trouble. Don't be rude, Harvey, go up and say hello to your new babysitter."

Another gentle nudge from his mother, and Harvey was standing at the toes of Belle's country boots. He watched as the giant oversized cow anthro bent down to get a better look at him, her gigantic brown eyes focused entirely on him. All he could do was whimper, "hi" and awkwardly wave.

"Howdy, little one. You must be Harvey," Belle gently said. Harvey "eeped" and retreated behind the sanctity of his mother, holding him close to her but also giving him a disapproving eye. "Aw, it's alright, little one. I know you're just too shy and I may seem too big for you to handle, but I'm a gentle giant. Honest. If I really wanted to scare you, it's because I'm teachin' ya some manners on misbehavin'."

"Go on, Harvey," Mrs. Portson gently begged. "Give her another try."

At his mother's gentle urging, Harvey reluctantly and cautiously approached the anthro cow giantess. Belle gently lowered her hand to the ground, palm up. Harvey went up and slowly reached for the tip of Belle's middle finger. He grasped it once, pulled back, and then reached for it again. This time, he managed to hold on to the giant fingertip tightly and gently shook it.

"See? I'm not so scary, am I?" Belle asked rhetorically.

"N-No, not really," Harvey squeaked timidly.

Mrs. Portson checked her watch as her husband brought Harvey's luggage from the trunk. "We've gotta go, our flight leaves in less than an hour," Mrs. Portson said. She quickly approached her young son and gave him a farewell kiss and a hug. "Bye, Harvey. We'll miss you, but we'll be back in a week."

"No! No!" Harvey began to weep; he hated it when he had to say long goodbyes to his mother, and immediately clung to her. "Mommy, please don't go! I wanna go with you!"

"I'm sorry, baby, but you can't come with us," Mrs. Portson said, prying her son off of her jacket and gently holding his wrists in anticipation of further resistance. "This is the only place we'll know you're safe. I'll call you when we land, okay? I promise."

"No!" Harvey wailed, desperately trying to break free from his mother's claps on his hands. " I don't want you to leave, mommy! I don't want you to leave!"

"Alright, now, I think that's quite enough there, little one," Belle gently scolded as she gently wrapped her massive fingers around Harvey's body, pulling him away from his mother and rearranging her fingers to form a wall where he couldn't escape from. Harvey wailed and screamed and cried, but he couldn't escape from Belle's gentle, firm grasp. "Don't worry, Mrs. Portson, I'll make sure he calms down. He'll have to get over it very soon."

"I'm counting on you, Belle," Mrs. Portson said, quickly walking back to the car. "Goodbye, Harvey! Mommy loves you!"

"Mommy! Please don't go! Mommy!"

Harvey cried as he watched his parents pull away from Belle's apartment and drive off into the horizon. The boy continued to cry, even after his parent's car disappeared, and even more so when Belle carried him and his luggage back inside. Even when Belle closed the door behind them, Harvey wouldn't stop crying.

"That's enough now, Harvey," Belle admonished delicately. "Your ma and pa are gone now, but they'll be back. Until then, you're going to be bunkin' with me for the next week, so I don't want you to cry no more."

But Harvey couldn't comply. His separation anxiety was reaching levels beyond anything normal than his mother dropping him off at first grade school. He continued to cry and wail, and Belle was losing her patience. "Now Harvey, I need you to stop cryin'. If you don't I'll have to punish you, and I wouldn't want to tell your ma that I had ta punish you as soon as she left."

What happens next?

1.) Harvey stops crying; Belle explains the rules once he's calmed down.
2.) Harvey doesn't stop crying; Belle administers her punishment.

1355132.content:
Harvey couldn't stop crying; his separation anxiety prevented the young boy from thinking rationally, including obeying the cow giant's firm orders to stop his crying.

With a stressed sigh, Belle reached for the boy in her palm, plucked him between her massive car-sized fingers, and lifted him up to her impatient face. "Harvey, I'm givin' you five seconds to stop this cryin' nonsense before I will punish you, and I'm not takin' much delight in that, either."

Belle counted those five seconds, and Harvey wouldn't stop crying, over the normal reaction to humans held between an anthro's mighty fingers. Belle had worked with some loud and out-of-control children before, but this little human really took the cake. She remembered babysitting a Monte Iberia frog child who had a similar problem, and decided to administer a similar punishment.

"Okay, time's up, and you still won't stop cryin'," the cow anthro said. "Now I have to put you in a time out until you can calm down."

With that, Belle moved her fingers and little Harvey towards...

1.) ...her open mouth; Belle will either keep Harvey in her mouth or swallow him, both methods hoping to contain Harvey until he calms down.
2.) ...her breasts; Belle will keep Harvey trapped between her massive boobs, hoping their cushioning sensation can hug Harvey's anxiety out.
3.) ...her backside; Belle will keep Harvey trapped in the seat of her panties, hoping the cushioning sensation of her massive rump can hug Harvey's anxiety out.
4.) ...her boots; Belle will keep Harvey pinned under her foot, hoping that being restrained underneath her plump soles or toes can calm him down.

13551321.content:
Belle recollected when she first administered this particular punishment towards a tiny child who fit into he palm of her hand. When she started her babysitting gig, she was kind, motherly, and always giving her young charges the benefit of the doubt. She had no trouble with being patient with the more rambunctious children she babysat for, anthros or humans.

Then one day, she received an email from a Monte Iberia frog family about babysitting their son for a couple of weeks while they were out on business. Monte Iberia were among the smallest species in the anthro animal kingdom, the children of said species growing up around the same size as an average adult human being. Belle, given how big and gentle... and buffer she was then, thought it would be a pleasure to look after the young frog.

She was wrong there. After day one, her patience was tested with the little frog's behavior, the least of them being running around and screaming. Belle offered to be the maternal figure for the tiny frog child, but the frog refused to listen, and his behavior got worse. Throwing food around, resistance to bedtime, and even biting her fingers and toes became problematic for Belle with each passing day.

On the eleventh day, the frog boy was having an episodic tantrum over his food. As Belle gently admonished the frog for not eating his dinner, the frog threw the plate into her eye. Belle was in pain, and the frog boy enjoyed it. That's when the cow snapped, yelled at him with the fury of a country goddess, and administered the punishment that would not only frighten and change the frog's outlook, but possibly Harvey as well.

"Sorry, Harvey," Belle said as she lifted the boy up by the back of his shirt, over her bovine face, "but you need a time-out until you can cool yourself off, and this is the only way."

Belle ran her tongue between her lips and parted them open like they were the gates to Hades themselves. Harvey's separation anxiety suddenly transformed into fear as he gazed down into that dark, pink maw. Her maw didn't have any incisors in her upper jaw, but she still came with the incisors at the bottom jaw, molars at the back and to the sides deeper inside her mouth, and a tongue that snaked its way over the bottom incisors, beckoning the young human inside with it.

Harvey screamed and cried, the words and pleas for mercy failing to be formed into words at the apex of his horror. Belle had him scared. Good. She needed him to feel the fear of being eaten alive, to be at her mercy, to see she wasn't fooling around anymore unless he was willing to cooperate. For extra measure, she would have to take another drastic step.

Belle gently separated fingers, and let Harvey fall straight into her mouth.

The cow giantess clapped her lips together, trapping the boy in a dark, humid place between her smooth tongue and the overhead roof. Harvey cried as his eyes adjusted to the dark, taking in the slight details of the cow's bumpy tongue, the shapes of her bottom incisors and her back molars, and worst of all, the slippery slope leading down the esophagus, and to a very bad place.

Harvey gripped the surface of the tongue hard, buried his face in the spongy texture, and cried. He was scared. He was going to be eaten! Chewed up like a pile of grass and be swallowed alive! Become her nutrients for being a bad boy! He was too scared to feel sorry or regret. He just wanted out!

Suddenly, the tongue began to move, and Harvey was moved...

1.) ...to the back of the throat where Belle would swallow him whole.
2.) ...underneath her tongue where Belle would have him endure her mouth's functions without being swallowed.
3.) ...towards her lips where Belle would spit her out into her open palm.

The door opened, revealing an incredibly large skunk girl with shoulder length white hair and purple eyes. She was wearing a black crop top that fitted her massive perky breasts quite well. Her stomach was exposed and looked engorged as if she had just eaten a massive meal. There was white fur on her fat stomach contrasting the black that was on most of her body. Mrs. Portson then slapped him gently motioning her head towards Harvey as if to say to not talk about money in front of him.

It took a good deal of willpower to not freak out about this, what kind of babysitter charged seven thousand dollars to look after a kid for a week!? Ramona then got a brilliant idea: she’d go along with this and look after the kid so she can get the money for herself. Besides, if this Mona person is so expensive, she’s probably rolling in dough and wouldn’t care if one family abruptly changed their minds.

“Of course, I’ll make sure to take great care of your little sugar snack,” Ramona said with a grin as she took a knee to make herself lower; however, the movement caused her body to jiggle a good amount.

“Alright, Harvey, we’ll see you soon. I love you.” Mrs. Portson gave Harvey a kiss on the cheek and a hug.

“See you later, kiddo. I’m gonna miss you,” Mr. Portson said, hugging his son and tousling his hair before heading off to the car with his wife and driving away.

Harvey noticed that Ramona didn’t necessarily keep a tidy home. Empty junk food containers were strewn about the floor mostly by the couch in the living room. The couch itself looked worn having an actual imprint in the shape of Ramona’s fat butt. The living room had a large TV mounted on the wall with gaming consoles set up connected to it. Ramona sat down, setting little Harvey on her right leg as she grabbed a controller and put on a pair of headphones with a mic attached to it.

“Yeah, yeah quit your complaining there was someone at the door. I’m sure you guys were able to handle yourselves for a little bit,” Ramona said as she resumed the game she was playing before the unexpected arrival of the the Portsons.

“Man you really are nosy, I had a delivery, not that it’s any of your business, now come on you grubs! Are we gonna finish this or what!?” Ramona growled as she aggressively pressed buttons on the controller while barking orders to her teammates. After a couple of minutes Ramona won the match and let out a whoop. “Yeah, take that losers!”

Ramona then felt a rumbling in her stomach before letting out a massive...
1355151.title: Ramona the Skunk

13551511.content:
Ramona let out an earth shattering belch, laughing as she heard the people she was playing with react in a variety of ways, ranging from disgusted groans to laughs. Somewhere within that mixed range, she heard someone crying, and she giggled.

"Really, you guys, you're crying over a simple burp?" she taunted.

"Uh, what are you talking about? We don't hear any crying," one of her friends said, followed by some murmurs of agreement by some of the others.

That's when Ramona realized what had happened. “I gotta go, I'll talk to you all later.”

The skunk girl took her headset off, turned off her games, and turned her attention to the little boy on her leg.

Harvey was crying from how loud Ramona's belch was too much for his little ears to handle.

“Hey, hey, hey,” Ramona said softly, leaning down so she was closer to the child. “I didn’t realize that was too loud for you, I’m sorry”

This apology didn't work that well as Harvey kept crying. Panicking, Ramona grabbed the boy and set him onto her fat furry belly, gently pinning him against it. Almost immediately, Harvey stopped crying. The belly was so soft with its fur and so warm, it calmed him down. “There we go, much better. I am sorry for burping so loud, won’t happen again.”

So far, Ramona knew that Harvey liked her soft body, so she knew how she could use it to help her look after Harvey.

1.) Have Harvey explore/snuggle up onto her belly while she watches TV.
2.) Gently insert Harvey into her cleavage and snuggle him up against her massive boobs while she goes around the house.
3.) Take the job as babysitter literally and keep Harvey comfy under her massive cheeks to muffle any noise she makes while playing games.
4.) There's a knock on the door; it's Mona, one of her neighbors who was supposed to babysit Harvey for the week!

1355153.content:
A giant brown-furred grizzly bear anthro stood at the doorway, darker hair covering her right eye. As per her species' physical appearance, the bear anthro was massively built, but she was built in a way that she was also blubbery. She had a massive rack which most of her face from down below, and she had a great potbelly that mostly obscured the giant rack. She wore a T-shirt and a pair of lunge pants, but was also barefoot... or bare paw, in the giant ursine's case.

Harvey read up about bears, and the very image of a real-life bear frightened him. He felt his body shudder as the giant bear woman looked down and gave a satisfied smile. "Ah, you must be Portson family, yes?" she said with a slight Russian twinge to her speech. "I am Annika, the babysitter. It is nice to finally meet in person for the job."

"And it is nice to meet someone who was willing to sacrifice their week to babysit out son," Mrs. Portson said gratefully. "Your expertise is being punctual, correct? You make sure the kids stick to their schedule and be as happy as they can be?"

"Yes. It is something my parents did for me growing up, and I have implemented such in my babysitting gig," Annika said. "To encourage the children to be well-maintained to routine and discipline, I have arranged a schedule that gives them time to play, time to eat, and when to go to bed on time. Any who fall out of line, I will punish them accordingly."

"Oh, Harvey here won't fall out of line," Mrs. Portson said, rubbing her son's shoulders. "He may be shy, but he knows his routine, and so do you."

"Yes. Very insightful for you to send me his schedule through email," Annika acknowledged. "Do not worry, I won't fail with my duties, nor shall I let anything happen to him. You have my word."

"I'll trust you on that," Mrs. Portson said, kneeling down to Harvey's height. "Can I trust you to be a good boy and do what Annika says for the next week?"

"...I'll try," Harvey answered.

"Don't just try, just do, and we'll get you something special when we get back." Mrs. Portson kissed her son's forehead and hugged him. "Goodbye, Harvey. I'll miss you, but I promise I'll call you when we land, okay?"

"Okay, mommy," Harvey said, returning the hug.

Mr. Portson brought out the luggage and gave his son a hug of his own, with one arm. "See you later, sport. Try to be good for the babysitter."

"Okay, daddy. Bye."

The Portsons then drove off into the distance, disappearing into the streets while Harvey and Annika watched. The giant bear woman kneeled down and offered her pawed hand for the little boy. "Come, we must get you settled," Annika insisted. "There is no schedule for the rest of the morning, but we must make time for me to show you around my house before the afternoon."

Harvey was reluctant to climb on the hand of the giant bear, most because bears were scary and the story of them eating defenseless people and pets scared him. However, seeing as he had no other choice, he climbed onto Annika's padded finger while she picked up his luggage and carried them both inside.

What happens next?

1.) Annika shows Harvey around the house.
2.) Skip to the afternoon; Annika has planned for them to play.
3.) Skip to the evening; Annika has planned for them to watch a movie together before bedtime.
4.) Skip to the next morning; Annika has a whole day planned for the two of them.
5.) Someone unexpectedly drops by!

1355331.content:
In the times of of the Arabian nights, in the middle of the night, there was a caravan pulled by camels. Sitting in the back was a pale 8 year old with white hair named Albin who was both incredibly cold and tired. The boy was forced to stay up late at night since he was so pale that sun would burn him to an absolute crisp. His parents had died from a disease and he had to be taken in by his uncle Roland, who wasn't big into parenting. Uncle Roland was a major con artist; in fact, the reason Roland had dragged Albin into the desert was because he had tricked an Arabian merchant into trading a real treasure map for a massive but fake diamond.

“Here it is Albin, X marks the spot!" Roland said, reading the mad with greedy ambition. "Come on out here I am gonna need your help for this!"

Albin knew there was no arguing with his uncle. Roland saw that there was a hole in the ground that was extremely deep but too wide for him to go through, while there was supposed to a puzzle to widen the hole some more. Roland didn’t care about that. He knew that Albin could fit through the hole, so he threw the rope into the hole and anchored it tight around a rock.

"Get climbing, Albin!"

The young boy said nothing as he reluctantly obeyed his uncle and began climbing down the hole. Once he was deep enough that Roland couldn't see him, the hole suddenly snapped closed, cutting off the rope.

"Ah, that's a real damn shame," Roland said, knowing there was nothing he could do. "Oh well, best to move on, then."

Albin screamed as he fell, bracing himself for the killer impact. However, rather than falling on the ground, Albin fell flat onto a large fancy pillow, in the depths of the dark earth. As soon as Albin recovered, he soon discovered that the cavern he was trapped in was filled with hills of glimmering gold, jewels, and other treasures piled up as high as an elephant.

At the center of the cavern, there was a round stone table reaching slightly higher than the mound of gold. Resting on the flat surface was a fancy gold lamp encrusted with jewels. For whatever reason, Albin felt the need to reach that lamp. The boy took it and inspected it, observing an unintelligible language at the bottom covered in dust. He rubbed, and all of a sudden, smoke bellowed from the spout. The entire room was quickly filled with sparkling spout as a female genies was released, screaming contently as she was freed from her prison.

Who comes out of the lamp?

1.) Anna: A blue skinned genie who takes the appearance of a young woman. Anna is a delightful genie who is full of playful energy, which she releases using her magic with comical effect. She has been used by many different masters in the old Arabian times, but Albin will never have a friend like her.

2.) Jade: A curvaceous Caucasian genie whose green-colored hair matches her name. The subject of may sexual whims, Jade is used to having a perverted master, but none of them were as young as Albin. Now she wants to use the boy as the subject of her own perverted whims, all of which involves her being dominating and larger than life.

3.) Sharah: A massive Caucasian genie with a fat body shape and absolutely power hungry. As per the mythology of her species, Sharah always twists her master's wishes for her own benefit. With Albin's innocence, however, all of the wishes he comes up with would be harder for Sharah to twist to her advantage.
1355331.title: A Boy and a Genie

13553312.content:
Reference: https://www.writing.com/main/redirect?ht...

Out of the billowing smoke appeared a large curvaceous woman, whose hips and breasts were inflated as a balloon, and just as jiggly too. She was naked, save for the tiny string barely covering her crotch and the breast plates only covering her nipples. Her hair was short and green, styled into a pixie cut. She was also adorned with gold and jewelry accessories.

What surprised Albin was that the woman stood at ten, maybe fifteen feet tall. She was the largest woman he had ever seen! He couldn't help but feel flustered by how half-naked this giant beauty was. His cheeks changed to a vermillion color as the giantess sighed contently, stretching like she had waken up from a very long nap.

"Mmmmm... oh, yes, it feels so good to be outside of that cramped little lamp~" the green-haired giantess said with a sultry tone. She looked down and cradled her massive mammaries like a babe. "Mmm, you girls are still as soft and squishy as ever, but I suppose that's what my last masters liked in a genie girl like me. So, where is my new master?"

The giant genie woman heard a frightened whimper nearby. She turned her head down and saw the young human sitting on the floor, frozen by the genie's sudden appearance and her exhibiting her half-naked body to him. The genie blinked. "Well, this is certainly a surprise. I never expected a young boy to be my master..."

A lustful smile stretched across the genie's beautiful features. "But then again," she said as she laid down on her belly, her boobies squished underneath her weight like a couple of giant water balloons, "experimenting with a young master would be a nice takeaway from all the other masters twenty years your senior."

The genie giantess reached out her hand and scooped the little boy, who elicited a surprised yelp. He was elevated to her face, her hazel eyes peering down at the little albino boy amorously. "It's nice to meet you, master. I am Jade, your personal genie here to fulfill your needs for a price three wishes," Jade the genie woman said, her voice set to an erotic, tempting voice. Her hot breath washed over the boy, making his entire face flush beet red.

"And what is your name, my young master?" Jaden asked the young boy.

"A-A-Albin," the young child said. "My parents named me because of my condition."

"It doesn't bother me what kind of condition you have, master. Whatever you heart desires, I'll grant it in a quick snap. No questions asked," Jade assured. "If you wish to be a young king who rules over his subjects, I'll grant that wish. If you wish to be surrounded by beautiful women who want to make you feel like a man, I'll be more than happy to provide you. Or... if you just want to use me to fulfill your young perverted needs, you just name it, and I'll make it happen. "

Albin looked at the giantess who held him with some slight hope. "A-A-Anything? You can grant any wish?"

Jade pondered the question. "Well, I can't bring people back from the dead, I can't make anyone fall in love, and I can't kill people. Those are the only rules a genie must follow, you know."

Albin felt a bit of hopelessness with the rules. He wanted so bad to see his parents again, to hug them, and cry into their chests. He would've wanted tell his father about Uncle Roland's disregard for his young life. He would've wanted to hear his gentle mother caress him and tell him how special he was in her eyes. No with them gone, he was forced to live without them at an age that a child couldn't afford to live without them.

"Then, I wish..." Albin hesitated, nervously gripping his shirt. Then he mustered the strength to speak his first wish. "I wish you would grant me wishes indefinitely until the day I die!"

Jade's eyes widened. "What? You wish for me to be your eternal servant, to grant you all the wished you want until you die!?" She covered her breasts and felt a stirring in her tight loins. She crossed her legs tightly and whimpered as an climactic sensation overwhelmed her. "No one's ever asked me to be their servant forever before. Oh, the things I can picture you doing to me. All the perverted, insufferable things you would make me do, or all the things you want me to do to you... ah, it's already too much! Oh, master!"

Jaden breathed deeply as the erotic sensation flowed through her body. Albin was feeling a bit uncomfortable with where the genie was headed, but eventually, Jade calmed down but she had a wide, ambitious smirk. "You want wishes for your life, you've got it!" Jade snapped her fingers, the sound echoing off the earthly chamber. "There, now you can have all the wishes in your lifetime. So, what's your first real wish, Master Albin? Do you want to be a king? Do you want to be surrounded by pretty girls? Or do you want me?"

Albin intended on having Jade fulfill all the wished he desired because there was only one thing that came to mind. One that would require indefinite wishes. "Jade, I wish... I wish..." Albin gulped. "I wish you were my mommy!"

The words echoed off the chamber walls. Jaden looked at the little boy in her hand with stunned silence. Albin cringed in the giantess's palm, his eyes squeezed shut and tightly holding his breath. When he looked, the giantess's shock turned to lust. "Oh, I get it. You're into that, aren't you?" Jade assumed. "Okay, I'll be your mommy, if you let me breastfeed you and teach you the intricacies of S-E-eh..."

"No!" Albin screamed, then remembering to use his indoor voice.. "No, it's not like that! I mean... I... I lost my mommy and daddy nearly a year ago and I had to stay with a mean old uncle. He wanted me to find some treasure down here, but I fell, and he's never come down to find me. I can't go back up because the sunlight hurts me. I... I... I miss my mommy so bad!"

Jade felt her heartbreak. The child's story was so heartbreaking, it overwhelmed her initial sexual feelings towards the boy. Instead, it was pity, and now she knew what to do with him. "Oh, you poor baby! You shouldn't have to suffer like this! Come here..."

Jade held the boy in her massive cleavage, against her tightly as she hugged away the boy's sorrow. It made her sad to see her cute little master cry like this, and now she had to fulfill his wish... his wish to become his surrogate mom. With one arm, the genie kept her hold on the boy tight, while with the other, she snapped her fingers.

Suddenly, the gold and jewels in the cavern melted, and transmogrified into kitchen appliances, the precious stones acting as the dials. The stone table where Jade's lamp stood was now a regular table made to accommodate both the giant genie and her newly adopted son. The cushion Albin landed on when he entered the cavern were magically divided in two, one cushion transforming into a very comfortable sofa, the other into a bed fit for two. For easier accommodations, one part of the stone walls was hollowed out into a hearth.

Albin watched the magic happen when he heard Jade snap her fingers, and he was frozen, awestruck. Suddenly, he felt two giant fingers pinch the back of his shirt and lift him from Jade's cleavage up to her face. "What did I tell you, young master... or should I say, my son?" Jade questioned. "Didn't your mommy tell you she could make it happen?"

"You did! You did make it happen! Thank you!" Albin joyously squealed, tears leaking from his eyes.

"It's no problem. I'd do anything for my special little boy. Now that that's settled, why don't you come to mama?" Jaden brought the boy to her enormous lips and kissed over three quarters of his body. She licked her lips, tasting the tears the boy was leaking from his eyes. She kissed him twice... three times... and four until she couldn't taste the tears on her lips, and the boy in her palm giggling from the affectionate attack.

Now that Jade was playing the giant mommy for the young master, she could indulge in her new role all she wanted.

What happens next?

1.) Jade wants to be the "playful mommy" and play with Albin on the couch.
2.) Jade wants to "snuggle up" with Albin on the bed just like a mother and her son would.
3.) Jade cooks dinner for herself and Albin, and teases him with foodplay.
4.) Jade invites a few of her genie friends to "meet and greet" her new son.
5.) Jade materializes a few tall female tutors to educate him.
13553312.title: Jade

choices: A Different Part of the World
A Different Era in the Past
14.content:
A normal-sized boy accidentally creates a portal into space-time where everything is big and the women are bigger.

Where does the portal lead him to?

A Different Part of the World: The portal leads into a different part of the world, but the portal is tiny on the other side, so the boy automatically shrinks. He could have been transported in his own home, in a completely different home, in the home of the previous entries in different story routes, or in the home of an important female figure.

A Different Era in the Past: The portal leads into a different era in the past, but the portal is tiny on the other side, so the boy automatically shrinks. He could have been stuck in an earlier time when his mother, his grandmothers, or his female ancestors lived. He could also have landed in the house of a giant woman during ancient times, such as the ancient civilization of Egypt, the global domination of Rome, the Renaissance Era, or the early history of the United States.

A Science Fiction World: The portal leads into a science fiction-like world where everything is science fiction, including but not limited to space travel, space colonies, and extraterrestrial life. The boy (either shrunken or normal-sized among giantesses) will travel to different planets and civilizations where he has to survive when everything else is bigger than him.

-or-

A Fantasy Realm: The portal leads into a magical realm where everything is reminiscent of J.R.R. Tolkien, C.S. Lewis, or George R.R. Martin novels. The boy is transported to a typical area where most fantasy stories take place, including a prospering kingdom with a castle, an enchanted forest either evil or benign, or an evil fortress with lava and brimstone, all of them populated with female characters, including monsters, demi-humans, anthros, witches and sorceresses, etc. (If the boy is transported into a tribe of giant women, he is still normal-sized).
14.title: Transported to Another World

144.content:
The boy is transported into a fantasy realm.

Which of these scenarios will apply to the boy?

Name: Arno Maskins
Age: 9 years old
Eyes: Brown
Hair: Light brown
Height: 3' 4"
Weight: 90lbs
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Arno was your average kid. He enjoyed games, cartoons and his family. One day, however, he stumbled upon something strange in the park and when he picked it up he was transported to a fantasy world. When he arrived there he noticed everything was much bigger than him and that he also appeared in a monster village where all of them are women. He hopes they'll be friendly towards him.

Name: Ryan Lakin
Age: 12 years old
Eyes: Blue
Hair: White
Height: 4'
Weight: 120 lbs
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: After a family dispute he ran away from home and fell into a hole in a forest. When he stopped falling, he noticed he arrived in a gigantic castle and was in the princess' bedroom (feel free to choose what she is.) He now has to choose if he should let himself be seen or stay hidden.
144.title: A Fantasy Realm

145.content:
What other worlds would the portal lead the boy to?

A Great Big Parallel Universe: The portal leads into a parallel universe where his counterpart isn’t born but everyone and everything else is bigger, including his friends and family. The parallel universe could also be the home to a new world order where the female population establish dominance by either growing bigger or shrinking the males down to size. Or maybe the boy is the only male in that universe where only the females populate the Earth.

A Different Media World: The portal leads into another world inside his favorite forms of media, such as television, movies, video games, comic books, or literature books, but the portal is tiny on the other side, so he automatically shrinks. The boy might also accidentally merge the different forms of media together or inadvertently assemble a harem of giantesses who either befriend him or enslave him.

An Anthropomorphic World: The portal leads into a different world where it is inhabited by anthropomorphic animals, but the portal is tiny on the other side, so he automatically shrinks The anthropomorphic animals live in lifestyles similar to those of humans (reminiscent of Zootopia), but humans do not actually exist. The boy must survive in this world where even a pygmy marmoset (the smallest mammal in the world) stands as tall as a two story building.

-or-

A Spooky, Monstrous World: The portal leads into a world where it is inhabited by monstrous giantesses, such as vampires, mummies, werewolves, gargoyles, or anything else from various monster movies or mythology with similar lifestyles to humans. The boy, shrunken to the size of one inch, is too frightened by the appearance of the monster giantesses to realize who is docile or hostile towards the tiny human kid.
145.title: Continuing with Another World I

What kind of media does the character appear in?

Television: There are a lot of television shows featuring young male characters from different live-action shows (such as Henry Mills from Once Upon a Time, Sheldon Cooper from Young Sheldon), animated series (such as Lincoln Loud from The Loud House, Steven Universe from Steven Universe, and Ben Tennyson from Ben 10), and anime (such as Yugi Muto from Yu-Gi-Oh!, Naruto from Naruto, and Ash from Pokémon).

Movies: There are a lot of movies featuring young male characters from different live-action films (such as Nick Szalinski from the Honey, I Shrunk the Kids film series, Harry Potter from the Harry Potter film series, and Anakin Skywalker from Star Wars: The Phantom Menace), animated films (such as Lucas Nickle from Ant Bully, Fievel Mouskewitz from the American Tail film series, and Miguel from Coco), and anime (such as Sosuke from Ponyo, Sho from Arrietty, and Aoyama from Penguin Highway).

Video Games: There are a lot of video games featuring young male characters such as Young Link (from The Legend of Zelda series), Sora (from the Kingdom Hearts series), and the male Pokémon Trainer (from the Pokémon game series).

Books: There are lots of books featuring young male characters from literature books (such as Jack from Jack and the Beanstalk, Tom Thumb from Tom Thumb, and Spiller from The Borrowers), and comic books (such as Damian Wayne/Robin IV from DC Comics, Peter Parker/Spider-Man from Marvel Comics, etc.).

Animated Shows: The boy is a character from animate shows, such as Lincoln Loud (from The Loud House), Steven Universe (from Steven Universe), and Aang (from Avatar: The Last Airbender).
