1512222.title: The Loud House/The Casagrandes

15122221.content:
The Loud House focuses on the main protagonist, Lincoln Loud, the middle child and only brother of the predominantly female Loud family who must endure the everyday chaotic situations of his family. His family consists of his mother, Rita, his father, Lynn Sr. (who will not be appearing), and his ten sisters appearing from oldest to youngest: Lori, Leni, Luna, Luan, Lynn Jr., Lucy, Lola and Lana, Lisa, and Lily.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to Lincoln (and possibly his friends)?

Shrinkin' Lincoln (and/or Friends): Lincoln (and/or his friends) is shrunken by accident by either Lisa’s discarded chemicals or a shrink ray that was accidentally activated, or is shrunken by a dark magic ritual performed by Lucy. Either way, Lincoln (and/or his friends) is shrunken down to the size of Lily's pinkie finger, small enough to get stepped on or eaten alive.

Born Tiny: Lincoln is one of the billions of children born tiny due to the genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome, so in a family of ten sisters, he is either doted on by the giant girls in his life, or he is seduced by them. He is aware of the dangers posed to his size, so basically, it’s like any other day in the Loud House, but much, much bigger.

Great Big Parallel Universe: Lincoln stumbles into Lisa’s portal which sends him to an alternate universe where he is tiny, but his parallel universe mother, sisters, female friends, or female friends of friends are all giants. In this universe, the boys are completely under the whim of the giantesses in the world, and Lincoln discovers that he is no different from the boys his size!

-or-

Attack of the Fifty-Foot Sisters: Lisa’s experiment with size-alteration accidentally goes haywire while Lincoln is out. Instead of Lincoln shrinking, however, the Loud sisters grow by fifty feet tall, along with some other girls that might have been in range of the experiment's reach. The Loud sisters wreck havoc on Royal Woods and the world, and their focus is mostly shifted on Lincoln and any boy under the age of fifteen.
15122221.title: The Loud House

151222211.content:
Lincoln Loud (and possibly his male friends) is shrunken down to the size of Lily's pinkie finger.

The only question is, how does Lincoln (and/or his friends) shrink?

Shrinking Spring Cleaning: During the annual Loud House spring cleaning weekend, Lincoln is chosen to clean out the attic by collecting boxes full of unused junk. When Lincoln tries to move a box full of Lisa's discarded experiments, he accidentally tumbles everything down, resulting in him being accidentally doused with a mixture of chemicals that shrink him to the size of a bug, but he is rendered invulnerable to physical damage. Things get worse when his mom or one of the older Loud family sisters come up and investigate the noise.

Lucy's Dark Magic: Lincoln and his best friend, Clyde McBride, are hanging out together when they are approached by Lucy, who is desperate for help to finish the rhyme scheme of her latest poem. Sickened by her brother's insistence on hanging out with Clyde and even overhearing how creepy she is, Lucy lures them into her room where she performs a magic spell that shrinks both boys to tiny size. Now Lucy wants Lincoln to hang out with her more often, but he and Clyde plan on running from her.

-or-

A Small Sleepover: Lincoln invites his friends, Clyde McBride, Zach Gurdle, Liam, and Rusty Spokes to a slumber party after school. When the boys accidentally break the TV remote, Liam rushes to find some new batteries and returns with Lisa's shrink ray, to which he accidentally shrinks the boys before Lincoln could stop him. While the shrunken boys panic over their diminutive size, they have to survive Lincoln's ten sisters and/or their female friends they invited for their sleepover party too.
151222211.title: Shrinkin' Lincoln (and/or Friends)

1512222111.content:
It was another weekend in the Loud House, only on this particular spring day, it was a very busy weekend. The entire Loud family was doing their annual spring cleaning where the family members were given a raffle to see which of the chores each Loud family member given.

While the Loud sisters and the parents all did their part with the downstairs, a certain white-haired boy was too busy hauling boxes filled with bulky materials to the open attic door. He grunted as he carried the two-ton box over to the door and dropped it.

“Whew, that’s another box down, only twenty-seven more to go,” Lincoln sighed, wiping the sweat from his head before turning to face the audience. “Spring cleaning is as hard as hard work gets when you live in a big family like I do. And when you live in a big family, getting randomly selected for a spring cleaning chore is like getting a box of chocolates: You’ll never know if you’re gonna get one that’ll leave a bad taste in your mouth.”

Lincoln cringed and felt nauseous. “Bleeuugh, coconut,” he said with a shudder. “Every year, my family drops a name in a hat and we get picked for the chore we have to do. Case in point, I was given the arduous chore to bring down all of the boxes in the attic so we can clean them, polish them, and sell them for our upcoming garage sale... which believe me, it’s not easy as it looks given how my sisters love to cling to the past and not let it go.”

Lincoln went over and picked up another box, this one heavier than the others. “Now if I could just get this downstairs... WHOA!”

By lifting the box, the shifted weight inside caused Lincoln to fall backwards and crash into small tower of stacked boxes, all of the boxes and everything inside to come crashing down all at once. One particular box, labeled “LISA’S EXPERIMENTS” spilled its contents over, knocking out some of Lisa’s old defunct experiments. A few of the contents were glass beakers containing an odd-colored liquid which splashed all over Lincoln just as he was caught in an avalanche of junk.

Lincoln cringed and cowered in a fetal position as everything crashed around him. When he opened one eye, he saw he was still alive but laying in a green puddle. “Huh? What happened to me? Am I still alive?” Lincoln patted his body, then his face, then shone a big smile of relief. “I’m alive! That’s a relief. For a second there, I thought Lynn’s giant bowling ball was gonna crush me!”

Then Lincoln froze on the spot; something was terribly wrong. “Wait... a giant bowling ball?”

He turned his nose up to see a familiar bowling ball looming over him. The severe cracks around the finger holes where Lynn threw a particularly hard throw during a bowling tournament where she earned first prize because the judges wanted her out before she could cause anymore damage.

“But wait... that’s impossible... that’s Lynn’s bowling ball and I don’t remember it being so huge! It couldn’t have grown in size unless...” At a horrible realization, Lincoln looked around and saw everything was huge. The ceiling looked as high as the sky, the floor looked like it was in an extreme close-up view with high definition, and everything else stood over him as tall as the house itself, even taller.

“I’ve shrunk!? How is this possible!?” Lincoln inspected the large puddle he was laying in, then to the cracks of the shattered beaker dripping with the liquid, and the answer came to him in an instant. “Of course, Lisa’s chemicals! She put the chemicals in the attic because they were inconclusive on their own, but combined, they must've created a shrinking chemical that shrunk me, and now I can’t get back to normal size! And then that means...”

Lincoln hurriedly three off his clothing until he was in his underwear and inspected his body. “Oh no! I got doused with Lisa's discarded chemicals! How do I look!? Is my skin different!? Do I have some wings or a tentacle sprouting out of my arm!?”

Lincoln quickly checked his reflection in a nearby shard of broken glass, and sighed contently. "That's a relief, I thought I was turning into a monster. Still, there's the same problem, though. How am I supposed to return to my normal size?"

“Lincoln, what was that noise!?” The tiny white-haired boy stopped as soon as he heard a familiar female voice coming up from the base of the attic steps. “You’d better not be screwing around up there ‘cause you’re gonna be in big trouble if you don’t get your chores done!”

He heard the attic steps creak and felt the footfalls as the giantess climbed up into the attic.

Who was it that climbed into the attic?

1.) His mother, Rita Loud, who heard the commotion as she was passing under the attic door. She came up to investigate the noise and saw the mess, but Lincoln was nowhere in sight, so she swept up the broken glass and threw it in the recycling outside, unaware that she also tossed Lincoln into the recycling as well. Lincoln has to survive the gigantic outside world, as well as the other Loud sisters working outside for their chores.

2.) His eldest sister, Lori Loud, who heard the commotion as she was vacuuming the top floor of the house. She came up to investigate the noise and saw the mess, but Lincoln was nowhere in sight, so she threatened to toss out an old stack of Lincoln's Ace Savvy comic books. Desperate to save his collection of vintage comics, Lincoln tries to get Lori's attention, which may or may not end well for him.
1512222111.title: Shrinking Spring Cleaning

15122221111.content:
The mother of the Loud family, Rita has often been one of the biggest overseers of the Loud family's annual spring cleaning. With her husband currently inconvenienced, she and her eldest daughter, Lori were the only ones left to look after the other kids do their randomized chores while participating in the cleanup as well.

Rita was currently using the broom and dustpan on the top floor when she heard the crash coming from the attic. Knowing her only son was involved, she climbed up into the attic and into the dusty den, her flats slapping against the wood. To the tiny-sized Lincoln, unbeknownst to his now giant-sized mother, it was like multiple explosions happening at a rhythmic pace.

"Lincoln, what was that noise!?" came the voice of Lincoln's mother, Rita as she climbed into the attic. “You’d better not be screwing around up there ‘cause you’re gonna be in big trouble if you don’t get your chores done!”

As soon as she spotted the mess on the floor, she quickly strode over to the area, creating multiple earthquakes which toppled Lincoln’s movements as he narrowly dodged the giant black shoes threatening to crush him. "What is this mess!? Lincoln, you'd better get in here and clean up this mess, mister, or else you're grounded from comic books and video games for a week! I'm not kidding!"

Lincoln could only look up and estimate Rita's height in comparison to his. Before his mother's feet, he was an insignificant little mite, smaller than an average-sized house ant. If Rita had walked in here barefoot, her toes would be the size of different houses, her middle toe as big as the Loud family house, and her big toe the size of the ritzy mansion where his rich lookalike lived.

Luckily for Lincoln, Rita was a caring and understanding mother, and that was the incentive he needed to grab her attention. If it had been Lori, she'd crush him on the spot. "Hey! Mom, I'm down here! It's me, Lincoln!" the boy screamed, jumping up and down and waving his arms to Rita's attention, but his size and his voice were too small for the giantess to notice him.

"Fine, if Lincoln doesn't want to come out and clean this mess, then I'll just have to do it myself," Rita said as she whipped out her broom and dustpan, letting it fall on the floor, creating a powerful shockwave that knocked Lincoln off his feet. "And when he comes back, I'm gonna give him the hardest grounding of his lifetime."

Angry at her son's "abandonment" of his post, Rita began to sweep up the mess. Unbeknownst to the giantess, as she was sweeping away the glass, she was also sweeping up her son. Lincoln didn't have time to run when he was caught in a sweeping forest of broom bristles gliding against the dusty surface of the floor, along with the broken glass. Lincoln screamed as he was carried along this dangerous thrill ride and into a pile of hazardous glass, bracing himself for the moment he'd get horribly skewered.

Miraculously, he was swept into one the broken beakers instead, but it didn't change the fact that he was tumbling with a pile of broken glass onto the dustpan. The only boy of the Loud family was momentarily disoriented by the experience, but as he recovered, he felt himself and his temporary shelter being lifted up by the dustpan. Rita scooped up the broken glass she could find, making a mental note to clean up Lisa's leftover chemicals after she safely disposed of the glass first. She quickly went down the attic, then returned with a garbage bag for the broken glass right before dumping it.

Lincoln witnessed and felt his colossus of a mother dump him and the glass into the garbage bag. Rita tied the drawstrings up, leaving Lincoln in darkness, amidst a labyrinth of razor shar glass. He was thankful that he was in a position where he was sheltered from the glass.

"Oh no, Mom's taking me out to the trash can outside, and it's garbage day! If I don't escape this bag, then I'm gonna get tossed in the dump!" Lincoln gasped, grasping the fabric of the garbage bag, digging his fingers. "Come on, come on, Lincoln! You've been in tougher spots before, and this is just like any other tough spot! Except I'm small! I'm smaller than a bug! I'm smaller than Lily's toes!"

Lincoln felt the fabric come apart with his efforts; he created a tear to help him escape the garbage bag!

"Yes! Sweet freedom!" he shouted as he jumped through the tear.

What happens next?

1.) Lincoln drops through the tear and onto the floor; Lori, Luna, Lucy, Lola, and Lisa are doing indoor chores.
2.) Lincoln drops through the tear and onto Rita's shoes; he's climbing up her body to get her attention.
3.) Lincoln drops through the tear and onto the front yard; Leni, Luan, Lynn Jr., and Lana are doing outdoor chores.
4.) Lincoln drops through the tear, but doesn't escape the trashcan in time; Lana is scavenging through the trash.
15122221111.title: Big Mama's in the House!

choices: Supreme Sibling Strives to Squish Smaller Sibling!
Supreme Sibling Sweeps Away Smaller Sibling
Enter the Other Loud Family Female(s)
15122221112.content:
The eldest sister and child of the Loud family, Lori was always the one giving out commands and being bossy for most of the time. Right now, she was in charge overseeing the spring cleaning from the upstairs floors and the attic while her mother, Rita oversaw the cleaning from downstairs. She didn’t tolerate any slacking off from her younger siblings when it came to chores being done around the house.

The crash she heard coming from the attic was one of those moments when her tolerance was at an all-time low. She climbed up the attic stairs and into the dusty den, her flats slapping against the wood. To the tiny-sized Lincoln, unbeknownst to his now giant-sized eldest sister, it was like multiple explosions happening at a rhythmic pace.

“Lincoln, where are you!? If you’re slacking off on chores, then not even mom is gonna save you from becoming a human pretzel!” Lori threatened! She spotted the mess on the floor and stroller over to it, creating multiple earthquakes which toppled Lincoln’s movements as he dodged the giant cerulean Mary Janes threatening to crush him.

Lincoln could only look up and estimate Lori's height in comparison to his. Before his oldest sister's feet, he was an insignificant little mite, smaller than an average-sized house ant. If Lori had walked in here barefoot, her toes would be the size of houses, her big toe as big as the Loud family house. “Oh great, now look at this mess! It’s literally gonna take forever to clean this all up!” Lori scoffed irritably. “Lincoln, you’d better get your butt out here and clean this mess or I’m gonna burn all of your Ace Savvy comics and cancel your subscription!"

“Ahh! No, not my Ace Savvy comics! I gotta get her attention!” Lincoln screamed as he rushed over to Lori’s feet, pounding on the tip of the shoe and the surface of her foot skin. “Lori! Lori, I’m down here! Please help me! Don’t burn all of my comic books!”

Lincoln pounded his sister’s foot as hard as his scrawny little muscles could allow it, but Lori didn’t quite feel what could have been small tapping. The tiny boy then leapt up onto Lori's gigantic foot and climbed over the tip of the shoe and began pounding. He stamped on Lori's shoe surface, punched the surface of Lori's foot skin, and even went so far as to bit it. In Lori's perspective, she felt a tiny bug bite the exposed surface of her foot and yelped in pain.

"Ow! My foot!" she screamed as she instinctively brought her foot up at breakneck speed to inspect the bite. The sudden liftoff of his giant eldest sister's foot flung Lincoln off the surface and landed hard on the attic floor. While he quickly recovered, rubbing the back of his head, a shadow eclipsed over his small frame, and he looked up to see Lori's colossal figure looming angrily over him.

"You stupid little bug! You literally just bit my perfect feet!" Lori screamed at the bug, lifting her flat-clad foot in the air and over Lincoln. "If you really want my feet so bad, then maybe you should be squashed underneath it!"

"Lori, noooo!"

Lincoln could only scream as Lori brought her foot down.

What happens next?

1.) Lincoln dodges Lori's foot just in time, but Lori chases him around while trying to squish the "bug".
2.) Lincoln dodges Lori's foot just in time, but Lori gets over it and sweeps up the mess.
3.) Lincoln doesn't dodge Lori's foot in time, but Lori hears something unusual and gets a closer look at the "bug."
4.) Lincoln doesn't dodge Lori's foot in time and he's flattened underneath Lori's shoe, but he survives thanks to the chemicals!
5.) One or more of the other Loud House ladies enters the attic.
15122221112.title: Big Sister's in the House!

151222212.content:
It was just another day in Royal Woods, Michigan, as the sun rose over the quaint suburban neighborhood, waking up its inhabitants for the day. The sunlight shone through the windows of a certain old house slowly coming apart at the woodwork, shining through a circular window leading into a certain white-haired boy's bedroom. The light made the boy's eyes flutter open, and he sat up in his bed, yawning and stretching. He then licked his lips, scratched his back covered by his pajamas and turned to the audience reading this chapter.

“Oh, hey, you guys! Good morning!" Lincoln Loud greeted the audience through his usual fourth wall-breaking ability. "Sorry, I didn't know you were coming over this early. If I had known ahead of time, I would've put something more decent on. Excuse me."

Lincoln Loud hopped out of his bed, dug through his dresser, and pulled out his signature orange button shirt and blue jeans. He quickly threw his orange pajamas off of himself and slipped his daily attire on. He opened the door to an empty bedroom and slide on the railing downstairs, relieved that he was the only one who occupied this space. More specifically, as the camera zoomed out, he lived in a dollhouse sat on a desk in a closet-turned-bedroom which highly resembled his dollhouse bedroom.

"Okay, so I bet you're wondering why I'm so small and living in a dollhouse like I was living in Gulliver's Travels?" Lincoln addressed the audience. "Well, it's a common genetic deficiency found in male infants that makes us born this small while the other females keep their normal size, but to boys born this size, it's like we're living in a different world full of giant girls! And when you're living in a family with a mom and ten sisters, being this small can be chaotic. Take my sisters, for instance. There are times when they just love to dote on me to butter me up..."

-FLASHBACK-


Lincoln’s second eldest sister, Leni, a regular ditz but a kind-hearted fashionista, finished putting the final stitches in her latest fashion line. It was a snazzy leather jacket with sparkling glitter, just about her little brother's size. She then showed it to Lincoln, who was genuinely surprised by the design. “Here, Linky! I saw this style trending in Young Fashion magazine! It may be a bit snazzy and sparkly, but I guarantee that when the girls at school get a good look at you, they’d just want to eat you up!”

Lincoln graciously took the shirt and instantly popped it on. “Wow, Leni, this is so cool! Thanks!” he said excitedly, admiring his look while the giant ditz of a sister handed him an equally tiny pair of sunglasses. He posed like a cool kid, but the fun stopped when he realized what Leni just said. "Wait, wait, wait, what? The girls at school wanna eat me up? But I'm already having enough trouble trying to avoid the girls in this house who're trying to eat me!"

"Oh, come on, Lincoln, you've got to see the positive side to this suit," Leni waved off her brother's worry. "Think about it, you'd look so cool, the girls will be too distracted fighting over you to even want to eat you!"

Just then, Lori, the eldest and bossy sister of the family, walked into the bedroom, her eyes locked to her cellphone as per usual. “Hey, Leni. Mom says not to cut anymore fabric from the..." Suddenly, Lori gasped and froze in place as she caught a vision of Lincoln wearing his latest jacket. "Wow, Lincoln, you look so cool that I literally just wanna eat you up right here and now!"

"What!? No way, I wanna eat Lincoln first!" Leni protested, getting into Lori's face.

"Back off, ditzy! I'm the oldest, and you already ate him the last time!" Lori rebuked.

"Because I'm the sister who loves him the most!"

"Because you're dumb enough not to see or hear him in your mashed potatoes!"

The two oldest sisters began to butt heads, and a very worried Lincoln began to back away. "I guess Leni's right about one thing, this suit does keep the girls from eating me, but it's stirring up another sister fight!"

Lincoln quickly jumped off the bed and into his toy car, which he turned on and quickly drove away from his two giant sisters, who just noticed him driving out of their bedroom door.

"Lincoln, come back!" Lori squealed as she gave chase.

"I just wanted to give you something nice!" Leni shouted, following the chase.

-FLASHBACK-


One of Lincoln's older sisters, Lola, entered Lincoln's newly redecorated bedroom and placed a two-story dollhouse on the nightstand table. Lincoln watched as the drama queen unfolded the front of the dollhouse, revealing a girly pink exterior. "You like it, Lincoln? This was the dollhouse mom and dad got me a couple years ago at Christmas, but since I hardly play with my dolls anymore, I thought this would be your perfect little home away from home. You can decorate it however yoiu like."

Lola scooped up her tiny big brother and placed him inside, the boy looking around the interior with admiration. “Wow, Lola, this is perfect! I get to decorate my crib, play my video games, read my comic books on the roof in my undies! I don’t think I can ever pay you back for this!”

“Oh, don’t mention it!” Lola dismissed modestly. “It’s the least I can do for retrieving my earring opal from a certain someone’s belly who had no business eating disgusting frog eggs in the first place!” she growled loudly out the door.

“Hey, it’s not my fault you kept losing your dumb earrings!” argued Lana, the other twin who was more of the dirty tomboy of the twins, popping her head from behind the door frame. “Which reminds me. Hey, Lincoln! If you ever want to do a Fantastic Voyage video of our digestive system, I’m always free!”

“Thanks, Lana, but... I’ll pass for now,” Lincoln gently refused, nauseated by the last time he went into Lana’s stomach to retrieve Lola's opal earring she accidentally swallowed and found some of the most disgusting half-digested mush and goop in her acids.

“Aww, okay, but my offer still stands!” Lana called, ducking behind the door frame. “Oh, look, termites!”

“What!? Termites!?” Lola screamed, zipping out of Lincoln’s room in an instant. “Lana, don’t you dare keep those termites in this house! We are not going to endure another weekend with Aunt Ruth and that's final!"

At his sisters' behavior, Lincoln slapped his forehead and groaned.

-FLASHBACK-


“Here you go, bro. My first music player from when I first started rockin' out,” Luna, the third oldest sister and rocker said as she gently set her old miniature music player in Lincoln's dollhouse bedroom, which, at his size, was as big as a normal-sized flat-screen TV. She also plugged in a couple of earphones and twirled them around the player. “And as an added bonus, these old earphones will act like your own personal stereo, so you should be really rocking’ to hours of entertainment in your new bedroom!”

“Really!? Cool!” Lincoln pressed the play button, and SMOOCH blared through the headphones like a mega stereo. The force was so loud and so great, Lincoln was knocked backwards and landed in Luna’s shirt and in between Luna's breasts. The rocker sister was initially surprised, but as Lincoln struggled to climb out, it tickled her where she was laughing nearly uncontrollably. The tiny white-haired boy scrambled up to the collar, popped his head out of the torn collar, and gasped for air.

"Wow, bro, I didn't realize that you really had it in ya." Lincoln looked up to Luna's towering amorous face, and his was flushed a beet red. "If you really want a good time, I can call up Sam and her brother over, and we can have a real playdate."

"Wait, Luna, it's not like that!" Lincoln stammered. "It was an accident! I didn't mean to...!"

Lincoln was interrupted by a pair of giant fingers pinching him from the back of his shirt and lifting him up to Luna's smiling face. "Aww, come on, bro, I'm just joshing with you, you know that," the Loud family's rock star said, clenching her tiny brother in both hands and snuggling him against her freckled cheek. "But, if you ever want to join in the fun with Sam and I, I'll be here when you're ready to roll with the changes."

Luna kept her hands clenched as she brought him to her pursed lips, enveloping his face in a kiss and covering him in saliva.

"LUNAAAA!"

-END FLASHBACK-


"Oh yeah, and if you live in a big family like I do with nothing but a mom and ten sisters, then you'll be the object of everyone's desire," Lincoln informed the audience, "but that's just another average day in the Loud house. Every day for kids born with the same shrinking condition like me is an adventure or a struggle to survive an entire world that's big enough to eat you or squash you flat. Luckily for me, I can't be killed by those means, but that doesn't make them any less painful."

At that point, as the narration ended...

1.) Lincoln drives his car to the bathroom through a chaotic, sister-infested hallway.
2.) Rita Loud enters; it's time for breakfast, and she's carrying him and Lily downstairs.
3.) One of Lincoln's sisters enters; it's time for their scheduled hangouts.
151222212.title: Little Born Lincoln

choices: Lincoln goes to the mall with Leni.
Lincoln doesn't go to the mall with Leni.
Start a new storyline with another Loud sister.
1512222123.content:
Suddenly, the door to his room opened and Lincoln saw one of his older sisters enter. He looked out from the dollhouse's window on the first floor and then went out it's front door to see who it is. Much to his relief, it was his second oldest sister, Leni, who had a joyful smile on her face and carried her purse over her shoulder. "Hey Lincoln. I hope you're having a good day because I know a great way to make it even better," she said in a cheerful tone. "Hi Leni, what is it?" he asked.

"Well, since it's, like, my turn to hangout with you I was planning on going to the mall and I was hoping you could come with me. What do you think?" Leni asked. Lincoln thought it over for a second and didn't think it was a good idea, considering that Leni is likely to lose him and he could be in danger around a crowd of so many larger people. "I don't know Leni. It doesn't sound like a good idea."

"Huh, Why not?" she asked, confused by his response. "Well, there's a good chance that we might get separated and with so many big people in the mall, I might get hurt or someone might accidentally step on me, or even worse." Leni knew Lincoln made a valid argument, but she still didn't want to lose her turn to hangout with her miniature, little brother. Leni kneeled down on the floor and folded her arms on the nightstand in front of Lincoln with a sad look on her face.

"You're right about all that Lincoln but you know that I would never let anything like that happen to you, right?" she said in a caring tone. "I know Leni. Look it's not that I don't like hanging out with you it's just..." he paused before Leni interrupted. "I know, I know Lincoln. But still, I'd never let you get hurt. And besides, it won't just be me. I was going to meet some of my friends from school there and I was hoping to introduce them to you. I'm sure they would totes love to meet you and they would definitely get hooked on how small and adorable you are." Leni said as she pet Lincoln's head with her index finger.

Leni stood back up and regained her big smile. "Come on, Linky. It'll be super fun! I know we probably wouldn't find any good clothes at the mall in your size, but it would still be worth it to hang out with my friends," Lincoln thought about what Leni said, however, he also took into account how his sisters always swoon over him over how cute he looks as a tiny person, and sometimes make him a little bit uncomfortable by treating him like a stuffed animal to squeeze too much or a plaything that they can do whatever they want with. Lincoln thought that if his sisters went overboard with him at his size, Leni's friends would probably do the same.

Lincoln turned around as a nervous look grew on his face. He looked back up at Leni and thought about it. "Leni, I'm sorry but I just don't think it's a good idea," Leni didn't like his answer and had that same sad look back on her face with a touch of disappointment. Lincoln realized he messed up and tried to fix it as best he could. "No, no Leni! Don't take it like that. I wouldn't mind hanging out with you it's just, just..." he hesitated before finally coming clean. "Look, I just don't know if I want to be squeezed to death or drooled over if your friends really find me adorable," he answered.

Leni understood where Lincoln was coming from but that didn't stop her from trying. She pinched Lincoln's shirt with her index finger and thumb and lifted him up onto the palm of her left hand. Leni leaned against the wall bringing Lincoln up to her for him to see a nice, caring look on her face. "Lincoln, you know that we can't help it. After all, we are your sisters. We only dote on you all the time because we love you, not just because you look cute at your size," Leni said in a playful tone as she tickled Lincoln's chest with her right index finger.

Lincoln giggled falling onto his back on Leni's hand. "I know Leni, and no offense but... well I know that you're my sisters and it's okay for you to do it, but sometimes it just makes me feel a little... uncomfortable." "Aw, it's okay Linky. That's just us being good sisters. You know that we always look out for you, and my friends won't be any different. I get that you don't always like it but that's what we're here for. So if you don't want to meet my friends, that's okay, we can do something else together. But if you do go, I think you'll really like meeting them. They're totes fun to hang out with and if they ever make you feel uncomfortable, then I can totally help you out with that. So what do you say?"

Lincoln looked at Leni's eyes and took her kind words to heart. He got up on his feet and thought about it. Lincoln knew how kind-hearted and really caring Leni could be, even if she wasn't the sharpest tool in the shed. He could always count on her to be nice to him and think about his safety and well-being. "You're really sure it'll be ok Leni?" he asked. "Of course. And don't worry Linky, I promise I totes won't let anything bad happen to you at the mall and that you'll have a great time with us there," Leni said. Lincoln took a few more seconds to think about it and realized that Leni probably would keep her promise. After gathering his thoughts, he looked at Leni and came to his decision.
1512222123.title: A Shopping Mall Errand with Leni

choices: Stay at the table and eat lunch.
Lincoln stays with Jackie as they go shopping.
Lincoln stays with Mandee as they go shopping.
15122221231.content:
"You know what Leni. I think am gonna go with you to the mall," Lincoln said. "Eee!" Leni squealed with joy. "Yay! Thank you so much Linky!" Leni said with a great happiness in her voice as she affectionately nuzzled Lincoln against her cheek and then gave Lincoln a big kiss with her gigantic lips. Lincoln was glad he made his big sister happy, but still wanted her to ease after she subsequently hug him against her chest and made it hard for him to breathe. "Okay Leni, okay. You can let me go now, please." Leni did as he asked and blushed in embarrassment. "Sorry, Lincoln."

"So then Leni, let's get going shall we?" he asked. "Oh totes Linky. Here, you can ride in my purse," Leni replied opening the top of her pink purse for Lincoln to see. It was filled almost to the brim with a lot of typical, girly things that you'd expect a teenage girl like Leni to carry. Her bag contained her cell phone, her wallet, and some of her beauty supplies, such as nail polish, lipstick, a compact mirror, hair pins, and even a few breath mints. "Not only is it roomy, but it'll also be like you're a little toy poodle that I can carry around. So cute." Lincoln shuddered at Leni's remark and was hesitant at first to be smushed in between all that stuff, but he didn't mind it too much as long as he was safe from the other giant people in the mall. "Alright Leni," Lincoln said as Leni dropped him into her purse and closed it, while leaving it open a little so that Lincoln could still get some air in there.

Leni then walked out of Lincoln's room and down to the living room. As she walked, Lincoln could feel every one of her movements as he was thrown around in her bag and kept bumping into Leni's things. It wasn't so bad for a while, until he heard Leni's cell phone buzz and then covered his eyes as the light from the phone's screen blinded him once it turned on. Leni opened her purse to check her phone and Lincoln saw her big hand come down and pick it up when she noticed Lincoln rubbing his eyes as if they were irritated. "Lincoln, are you alright in there?" she asked in concern. "Yeah Leni, your phone just blinded me for a bit when it turned on but I'm okay. And Leni, can you maybe walk a little bit more steadily while I'm in here? It was beginning to feel like a roller coaster," Lincoln responded. "Oh sorry Lincoln, I'll try to walk more softly for you," Leni apologized and started walking down the stairs at more of an even pace.

Once she exited the house, Lori was waiting for her in the car to take her to the mall. Leni got in and laid her purse on the floor between their seats. "Thanks for the ride Lori," she said. "No problem Leni. So you're taking Lincoln with you right?" she asked. Leni nodded and opened her purse to show Lincoln inside it. "Don't worry Lori. I'll keep Lincoln safe while we're at the mall." Lori looked into her bag and saw Lincoln in it. She thought it might be dangerous for a person with his birth defect to be in the mall with all the big people around who might step on him. But then she remembered that Lincoln can easily survive being squished underfoot.

"Well okay Leni. But don't forget, Lincoln stays with you, understand?" Lori stated in a strict tone. "No problem Lori. Lincoln won't leave my sight, and don't worry, we're only going to hang out with some of my friends from school. They're gonna love him." Lori wasn't sure about introducing her tiny brother to other people since she didn't completely trust them with his safety, but she knew that Leni's friends were as nice as she was and Lincoln would definitely be safe in their hands. "Okay Leni if you say so. Well, let's go," Lori said as she started driving the car and they made their way to mall.

They arrived at the park and Leni exited the car with her purse over her shoulder. "Have fun you guys, I'll be back soon," Lori said before waving to them and driving off in the family van. Leni looked into her purse to see how Lincoln was okay. "Hey Linky, we're here. Ready to meet my friends?" she said. "You bet Leni," he replied. Leni closed her purse and walked into the mall looking for her friends. Lincoln was able to peak out from an opening on the side of her purse and see the mall. Seeing so many giant people around him scared him a little, but he knew he would be alright as long as he didn't leave Leni's side.

Leni walked around for a few minutes until she spotted her friends sitting at a table in the food court. "Over here, Leni," one of them called to her waving her hand so she could see her. Leni went over to them and they all greeted each other with their usual kiss from a distance greeting. "Hey Jackie, hey Mandee. Great to see you guys," Leni said taking a seat and putting her purse on the floor next to her chair. "Like, it's great to see you to Leni. How've you been?" Mandee asked. "Oh, you know," Leni answered back.

"So Leni, are you ready for a little fun? I've heard that Reininger's is having a great blowout sale on summer dresses," Jackie said. "Ooh that's sounds great Jackie! But before we go anywhere, I'd like you guys to know something," Leni replied and both girls stared in confusion. "What is it Leni?" Jackie asked. "Well, do you guys know about that birth defect going around that makes some boys born as tiny little people?" Leni asked while making a tiny size gesture with her fingers and saw her friends look at each other confused. "Oh totally Leni, and personally, I think it's actually totes amazing," Jackie said. "Yeah, I used to think that it was a little bit weird how some boys are born as tiny people but now I've noticed that it's so cute," Mandee said in agreement.

"I watched it on TV about how some boys are born small and I thought it was totes adorable. I even watched it with my little brother once and I asked him what it would be like if he was born tiny like that," Jackie said. "What did your brother think Jackie?" Leni asked. "Actually, he thought it was a little weird and seemed freaked out by the idea." Jackie's face grew an awkward smile after saying that. "Well you guys, I thought it would be okay if I brought an extra person to tag along with us," Leni said picking up her purse from the floor and opening it. "Okay Lincoln it's time." Leni's friends were a little confused when she talked into her bag and pulled something out. "Lincoln these are my best friends from school, Jackie and Mandee. Girls meet my little brother Lincoln." Leni showed her friends the bite-sized boy in her hands and the girls were speechless as they looked down at him.

"Um, hi girls," Lincoln said, waving awkwardly to the teenage girls towering above him. Jackie was the first one to break her silence as she gasped and smiled at the tiny boy in Leni's hand. Her cheeks turned red as she blushed from how cute he looked. "Oh. My. GOSH!" Jackie exclaimed as she took Lincoln from Leni's hand and hed the tiny boy up to her face. "How adorable! Hello there little guy!" Jackie said with the utmost joy as she started nuzzling Lincoln up against her cheek. Lincoln wasn't too surprised by her reaction as he was used to his sisters cuddling and nuzzling him all the time.

"Let me see him Jackie," Mandee said. "OMGosh Mandee! Look at this little cutie," Jackie showed Lincoln to Mandee. Her pupils expanded as she also blushed at how cute he was. "Aww. So cute!" Jackie handed Lincoln over to Mandee, who also swooned at his size. Lincoln was sitting in Mandee's hands and, as before, nuzzled against her cheek. "Oh you're so cute! I could just keep you in my bag and carry you everywhere with me," Mandee said. "Me too," Jackie said in agreement.

"Too late, Leni already took me for a ride girls," Lincoln said. Leni's friends giggled at his comment and couldn't help but find him more adorable. "Oh my Leni, your brother is such a little cutie pie. You are so lucky," Jackie said which made Leni smile as they handed Lincoln back to his sister. "Yeah, I know," Leni said. "So Lincoln, what's it like being tiny?" Mandee asked. "Well, it's really not so bad once you get used to it. All my sisters back home always dote on me like a toy or something but I really don't mind it too much," he said. "I wouldn't mind it either. I'd love having a little brother who was tiny like you. I could cuddle you and do your makeup, and play with you like a doll. It would be wonderful," Jackie said imagining doing all of that with her friends watching awkwardly.

"So anyway you guys, now that we're all here, what do you wanna do?" Leni asked. "How about if we go to Reininger's and get in on that sale?" Jackie suggested. "Or we could stay here and have lunch. I am totes starved right now," Mandee said. "You know Leni, if we go shopping do you think Lincoln could maybe hitch a ride with one of us?" Jackie asked and got Mandee excited as well. "I don't know you guys. I promised Lincoln I'd keep him safe while we were here and I don't think it would be okay if he left my purse. He could get hurt," Leni said.

The girls thought about it and knew Leni was right about worrying for Lincoln's safety. "She's right Jackie. We don't want the little to get hurt do we?" Mandee said in a cute baby tone while petting him Lincoln's head with her finger. Lincoln accepted this and let it happen which also made Mandee blush at how he acted when she pet him. "You're right, Leni. But still, do you think that maybe could have a little fun with him while we're here?" Jackie asked. "Well I guess, as long as you guys keep him with you as well. I don't want to lose Lincoln around here," Leni said and her friends nodded in agreement. "Well, now that that's settled, what'll it be? Should we have lunch or go shopping?" Mandee asked.
15122221231.title: Lincoln goes to the mall with Leni

choices: Entomology studies in the backyard forest
Fantastic voyages into the human body
Start a new storyline with another Loud sister
15122221233.content:
The door opened and Lincoln's second youngest and intellectually superior sister, Lisa, entered his room. "Greetings minuscule, elder male sibling," Lisa greeted Lincoln with her usual genius vocabulary. "Oh hey Lisa, what's up?" he replied. "Seeing that it is currently my allotted time to socially interact with you Lincoln, I have proposed a very intellectually-stimulating activity for the two of us to partake in," Lisa said, only for Lincoln to give her a confused look from hearing her use a lot big words.

Lisa sighed, and as usual, repeated herself with simpler words for her sibling to understand. "It's my turn to hang out with you and I found something fun for us to do together." Lincoln nodded his head in understanding. "Oh, okay. Catch me!" he shouted to her. While Lincoln was still pretty much a mouse compared to his sisters, with Lisa as no exception, sometimes their height would change things, this case being that Lisa was much shorter than the nightstand his dollhouse home was sitting on. Mustering his courage, Lincoln jumped off the edge of the nightstand and fell to the bottom, only to land safely in Lisa's outstretched hands.

"Gotcha!" she said in triumph. Lincoln sat in his genius sister's hand as she brought him up to her face. "So Lis, what do you wanna do?" he asked. "Well dear miniature brother, I was hoping that you could help me with some of my latest scientific studies," she answered, which made Lincoln nervous as he recalled the times Lisa would take advantage of his small size and use him as a guinea pig for her crazy experiments.

"No way Lisa. You know mom made you promise to never use me in any more of your twisted science experiments," Lincoln answered in an annoyed tone. Lisa's expression didn't change though as she had something else in mind. "Actually Lincoln, I wasn't going to test an invention on you this time," this made Lincoln sigh in relief. "On the contrary, I was hoping your diminished stature could help me with some of my field research," she clarified. "Field research?"

Lisa walked back to her and Lily's room with Lincoln in tow to explain her true intentions. "Yes male sibling," she said placing Lincoln on her work desk and sitting on her stool. "You see, I am intrigued by your size Lincoln, so I thought you could help me with my studies on the microscopic world around us." "Okay," he said in confusion. "One of my newest studies involves the exciting world of entomology, the study of insects," Lisa said pulling out a book on insects from her shelf.

"You want me to help you study bugs?" he questioned. "That's right Lincoln. From your lower perspective, every mundane and trivial that we normal-sized people deal with each day, such as the large dinner plates and table or traveling the hall to go to the bathroom, must look like a gigantic challenge right?" Lincoln nodded as he knew what Lisa was saying. "Yeah Lisa, you have no idea. At my size everything is you girls deal with is more like a death trap waiting to happen. That's why I use the toy car and a few other things to navigate the house when you girls aren't carrying me around."

Lincoln didn't mind it too much when his sisters carried him everywhere in the house. However, he also had his own methods of tiny transportation. He had the toy car upstairs to get to his sisters' rooms and the bathroom, the pulley system Lisa made to elevate him to the top of the dining room table, and even a mini helicopter to make it around the house quicker. "Well Lincoln, for me to study entomology, or any other field related to the microscopic world, I need your specimens. So I thought with your size, we could go out into the backyard and you could help me get those research specimens," she said. "Wait, you mean you want me to go out bug hunting with you?" Lincoln asked as he understood her plans.

"That's right Lincoln. You can help me to capture the bugs in these jars by chasing and pursuing them around the backyard." Lincoln thought about it and realized that Lisa had a point. His size could help her round up the bugs she needed but he wasn't so sure about going into the yard. "I don't know Lisa. You know that mom doesn't want me to go into the backyard. After all, at my size, the backyard is pretty much a gigantic jungle. There's the tall grass, the mud and dirt pits, the dangerous terrain, not to mention the fact that all of the bugs and anything else in there could be bigger than me. I could be a snack for them if I'm not careful," Lincoln said in a worried tone which Lisa could understand.

"While I can't disagree with your valid argument on how unsafe the backyard would be at your size Lincoln, I've accounted for that greatly." Lisa brought out from her desk a black body suit that looked like it was made for Lincoln's small size. "What's this?" he asked holding the suit. "It's a special suit that I made to protect you in the backyard. While mother did forbid you to go into the backyard without the supervision of one of our teenage sisters, I still took your safety into account."

"This suit will make so that you will always be safe in the wilds of our yard and not only that, I've outfitted it with the best defense and travel capabilities to make sure your excursions there are safe and even more enjoyable," she elaborated. "And by 'enjoyable,' you mean?" he asked. "It has a special energy field that protects you from any insects or other creatures that threaten your safety, and as an added benefit, it also has specially made jumping shoes that will allow you to make long-distance leaps across the terrain of the backyard. You can travel a lot faster across the yard and even make an adventure out of it."

"That does sound fun Lisa and it would be exciting to see what the world of the yard is like from my perspective. But still, what if we're caught by mom? Safety suit or not, she'd still get mad if I went into yard without Lori or any of our bigger sisters watching me." Lisa agreed and thought about the risks that could come sending Lincoln into a dangerous situation. While her love of scientific pursuit was powerful, her love for her tiny brother was even stronger than her need for academic success.

"Okay Lincoln, you're right. I don't want you getting hurt anyway." Lisa submitted. Lincoln thought of another way he could help Lisa with her scientific studies and though he would regret it, he didn't like to see his sisters unhappy. "Hey Lisa, you know exploring the backyard would be fun, but then again I know another way to explore the micro world at my size." Lisa looked at him raising an eyebrow.

Lincoln felt sickened and shuddered at what he was about to say. "Lana once made me do a fantastic voyage video of her digestive tract. I had a helmet with a camera on my head and everything, how about we do some studies involving human anatomy with me entering people's bodies, what do you think?" Lincoln suggested. Lisa thought about it and considering that Lincoln can survive when he goes inside someone's body, she thought it would also be a good idea, especially since their mom is okay with him being totally safe whenever he gets eaten.

"You know what elder brother, that actually sounds like a good idea. I could use some notes on the anatomy of the human body and it would be very fascinating to see them from a more 'detailed' perspective," Lisa said agreeing with Lincoln on the idea. "So Lisa, since it's your turn for Lincoln time, I'll let you decide. We can do either the bug studies in the backyard, as long as I wear the suit and we keep it a secret from mom, or we could explore the human body. What's it gonna be?" Lincoln asked.
15122221233.title: Studies of the Microscopic World with Lisa

choices: Someone outside of the Loud family
151222212332.content:
"Lincoln, I've decided to do the human anatomy experiments, how's that?" Lisa asked. "Sounds good to me Lis, let's do it!" he exclaimed. With the choice made, Lisa took out one of her other inventions and placed it on her desk next to Lincoln.

"What's that Lisa?" he asked pointing at it. "With your size dear brother, I've been preparing for a study like this. So I designed this, a specially made micro-sized vessel that can travel inside the human body." It was a ship that looked like it was made for Lincoln's exact size as he could easily fit in it once the cockpit opened. Lincoln was amazed at the details of the ship and how it could actually fit him inside. "Wow Lisa, it's amazing," he marveled.

However, Lincoln noticed that while the ship did fit his size, it looked a little bit too big for the actual travel that it was made for. "Lisa, I know this thing was made to travel inside of a living body, but it looks kind of big to fit. Someone might choke on it if they swallow it," Lincoln said and Lisa nodded in agreement. "Fear not Lincoln, for I have taken that possibility into account. Just like with Lana, when you had a camera helmet on while inside her, this thing is made with it's own video camera which I've linked to my computer here. And in addition to the camera, it's also made with its own shrinking module that allows it to shrink to a much smaller size to fit into someone's body." "Wow, that should make things easier," Lincoln replied.

"As for another attachment Lincoln, I've also added a teleportation device into the ship so that it can instantly teleport you back here after you exited the body of your host," Lisa added. "Wow, you've thought of everything," Lincoln said as Lisa began to turn on the ship's camera from her computer.

"So then Lincoln, shall we begin the study-er, I mean adventure?" Lisa said, wanting to make it sound more fun for him. "Ready Lisa." Lincoln hopped into the ship's cockpit and closed its door. He was sat in its chair when the controls turned on and Lisa appeared on the screen on his left side. "Okay then Lincoln. How does it look in there?" Lisa asked from the screen where she could see Lincoln on her end. "All systems go Lisa. So how am I supposed to get inside someone?" Lincoln asked. "Well the ship is only made for submersible travel, it doesn't actually fly or anything. So I'll just have to place you in the position for endoscopic travel myself," she said.

"Okay Lincoln, activate the shrinking process." Lincoln nodded and pressed the red button with the word shrink on it. Soon his computer screen turned on and told him to set the shrinking size. "Set the size setting for about the size of a pea," Lisa commanded. "Alright Lis, here goes," Lincoln said as he put the size commands in and hit the icon saying activate. The ship started glowing green as it slowly dwindled in size with Lincoln inside of it feeling even more tiny than he already was. The ship stopped shrinking once it reached the intended size of a little vegetable pea, about 1 cm in height. Lincoln saw Lisa tower above him even more than usual as she came up above him. "Wow Lisa, you looked big to me before but now you look like an entire planet from where I'm sitting." Lisa smirked at Lincoln's comment as she gently picked the ship up with a pair of tweezers.

"Okay Lincoln, now I'm going to put you into this projectile shooting apparatus," she said. "You mean that straw that you're gonna use as a pea shooter?" he corrected as Lisa bore a look of annoyance on her face. "Yes the straw that I'll use as a pea shooter," she responded with low enthusiasm. "Okay Lincoln, we're ready to start the procedure. Now the next step is deciding whose body we should send you into. Any ideas," she said. "Well, we could go for mom or one of our sisters. Or how about this, why don't we try someone else outside of our family? I could go into one of our friends like maybe Lori's friends Becky, or Carol, Dana. Or maybe one of your friends Lisa. Didn't you say that you made a new friend in your kindergarten class like that girl Darcy?" he listed.

Whose body will Lincoln explore? Will it be his mother or one of his sisters, or someone else?
151222212332.title: Fantastic voyages into the human body

1512322.content:
Steven Universe focuses on the titular main protagonist, Steven Universe, the half-Gem, half-human hybrid boy who lives with the Crystal Gems, a small faction of female polymorphic sentient gemstones who resists the oppressiveness of the Gems' Homeworld. The cast consists of predominantly female characters (such as Garnet, Amethyst, Pearl, Connie Maheswaran, etc.) and naturally and unnaturally giant women (such as the Diamonds, and the giant Gem Fusions).

(A/N: The routes can include AU routes where the Gems are humanized.)

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the young Steven Universe male cast?

Size-Alteration: There are many ways that the Crystal Gems can shrink or grow. In one scenario, Steven tries to shapeshift with his Gem, but he ends up permanently shrinking with every failed try. In another scenario, a young male character around the required age limit or lower gets ahold of Homeworld's technology, leaving them shrunken and at the mercy of the giant women from Earth or Homeworld. In another scenario, Yellow Diamond demonstrates her size-alteration ability and uses it against the young humans of the Earth or the Zoo.

Born Tiny: The male cast is only a tiny fraction of the billions of children born tiny due to the genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome, so with a cast of predominantly female characters, they are doted on by the giant girls in their lives, or they are seduced by them. The characters are aware of the dangers posed to their sizes, so basically, it’s like any other episode of Steven Universe, but with a cast of bigger female characters.

Normal-Size Among Giantesses: The male characters are born normal-sized, but the female characters in the series are more massive than him. In one scenario, the Gems are all gigantic thanks to Yellow Diamond's size-alteration abilities to use for conquest, but the Crystal Gems are big enough to stop the conquest. In another scenario, the Gem Fusions are natural Gem giants who don’t need to be formed by fusing their base Gems (i.e. Sugilite, Sardonyx, Opal, Obsidian, etc.). In another scenario, a young male character is raised by the Diamonds, and they all indulge on his tiny size.

-or-

Borrowers: The male characters are borrowers, a race of tiny people who hide within the walls of the bigfolk and "borrow" discarded or lost items. The borrower makes refuge in the home or a different location where a female character(s) from the series is prominently seen. (A/N: In this route, if Steven is born a borrower, then the Gems become humanized characters since Steven being born a half-Gem hybrid would tie in to the Born Tiny route.)
1512322.title: Steven Universe

15123221.content:
The characters from Steven Universe have their sizes altered.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the young male characters in the series?

Shapeshifting Gone Wrong: Steven tries to practice his shapeshifting abilities using his Gem, but he accidentally shrinks each time that he fails. The worst part is that the changes are permanent, and because Steven is a half-Gem, he doesn't have the power to restore himself back to normal size! Fortunately, he can still retain his ability to conjure up shields and his protective bubble.

Homeworld's Size-Alteration Technology: In Steven Universe, some of the spaceships from Homeworld feature sa spatial warping mechanism that alters the occupants' size. In this scenario, a young male character discovers one such spaceship and meddles around with it, accidentally activating the size-alteration mechanism that shrinks them down or makes a nearby female character grow into giant size!

-or-

Yellow Diamond's Conquest: Yellow Diamond is a giant, tyrannical commander with the ability to alter the sizes of Gems, including herself! To demonstrate this power, she either uses this power to grow herself or grow one of her loyal Gem underlings to giant size and rampage across the Earth or test it on the young humans in the Human Zoo! Yellow Diamond is also granted Homeworld's mind manipulation technology from White Diamond, so she'll be able to control the giant-sized Gems she so chooses, including the traitorous Crystal Gems.
15123221.title: Size-Alteration

15123222.content:
The boy is a character from Steven Universe who was born small.

The only question is, which one of these boys will you choose?

Steven Universe: Steven Universe is born to Greg Universe (who was also born small as well) and Rose Quartz, who was secretly Pink Diamond, the rebellious warrior defected from The Great Diamond Authority. After Pink Diamond/Rose Quartz gave her physical form to create Steven, the young half-human, half-Gem hybrid was raised by his guardians, the Crystal Gems. He is a breath of fresh air for the citizens of Beach City and often sees the positive side to being tiny, even though being small can be hazardous at times.

Lars Barriga: Lars Barriga is the teenaged employee of the Big Donut shop along with his female co-worker, Sadie. At some point, Steven and Lars are kidnapped and taken to Homeworld where Steven faces trial while Lars is held as evidence of human incompetency. During their escape, Lars is killed by a robinoid, but he is revived by Steven's tears. Lars explores the universe as the tiny, fearless leader of the Off Colors group, a small resistance of "defective" or "off-color" Gem Fusions.

Peedee Fryman: Peedee Fryman is the son of Mr. Fryman, the co-owner of Fried Pizza along with the Pizza family, and the younger brother of Ronaldo Fryman, a mysterious phenomena fanatic who disappeared trailing a story for his blog, "Keep Beach City Weird." Peedee is close friends with Kiki and Jenna Pizza despite their fathers' rivalry, and they often hang out with each other when business isn't too busy. Still, Peedee can't help but wonder what happened to his brother and would sneak out to find any trace of him left.

-or-

Onion: Onion is the son of the fisherman, Yellowtail, the painter, Vidalia, and the younger half-brother of Sour Cream. Onion is a strange, silent, and mischievous boy who weirds out Steven and often gets into dangerous, delinquent behavior. He is also friends a few other boys who indulges in these criminal behaviors, including theft and vandalism, which puts them in big trouble with the giant female cast members. (A/N: Since Onion is still practically a child during Steven Universe Future, he should still appear in this route.)

1512322251.content:
Jasper was frustrated she kept losing to those pathetic Crystal gems, and she failed to convince Lapis to fuse with her and launched her across the ocean.

“Those stupid gems think they are better than me, I’ll show them, I’ll show them all.” Jasper grumbled as she tredged through the woods she was currently lost in, it was where she landed after being blasted away by Lapis.

“Are you lost too?” The voice of a young boy said. Jasper was darting her head around trying to figure out where the voice was coming from. “Down here miss” Jasper looked down and was surprised to see a a three inch tall boy with green eyes and dirty blonde hair. Jasper remembered that a very small population of earth had tiny humans called minizora, this was the first time she had seen one.

“I’m Malakos, whats your name?” The boy said with a friendly tone. Jasper decided to humor the boy “Jasper”

“Wow thats a pretty name for a pretty person.” He said with a blush as he looked up at her, Jasper grinning always enjoying praise even if its from a pathetic earthling.

“Jasper can I stay with you? I live with my aunt and cousins and they’re really mean.” The boy said softly, while Jasper was going to say no and tell him to get lost but she realized that she could take advantage of having the tiny human around. “Alright human, you can stay with me but you have to obey me at all times.” Jasper said “Of course!” Malakos said with a grin.

Jasper was a bit surprised by how fast he agreed but decided it didn’t matter. The massive gem woman reached down to grab Malakos. “First we are going to leave these woods.” She said before storing Malakos….

1.) Between her breasts

2.) Inside her stomach, swallowing the boy.

3.) Between her butt cheeks

4,) Inside her boot, under her foot

151311.content:
The boy is a character from an anime television series adapted from the One Piece manga.

Wealth. Fame. Power.

Gold Roger, the King of the Pirates, attained this and everything else the world had to offer. And his dying words drove countless souls to the seas. "You want my treasure? You can have it! I left everything I gathered together in one place! Now you just have to find it!" These words lured men to the Grand Line in pursuit of dreams greater than they've ever dared to imagine! This is the time known as "The Great Pirate Era"!

The series focuses on a young pirate, Monkey D. Luffy, as he goes out to sea in pursuit of the legendary One Piece treasure! As a boy, Luffy ate the Gum-Gum Fruit, a Devil Fruit which took away his ability to swim, but also turned his body to rubber! After he is saved by his pirate friend, "Red-Haired" Shanks, Luffy vows to find the One Piece, surpass Shanks, and become the next King of the Pirates. The red-haired pirate leaves Luffy his treasured straw hat and asks him to return it to him once he becomes a great pirate.

Years later, Luffy sets out to sea, gathering up members of his crew, including "Pirate Hunter" Roronoa Zoro, "Cat Burglar" Nami, "Sniper King"/"God" Usopp, "Cotton Candy Lover" Tony Tony Chopper, "Devil's Child" Nico Robin, "Cyborg" Franky, "Humming Swordsman"/"Soul King" Brook, and "Knight of the Sea" Jinbe.

Together, the Straw Hat Pirates sail the Grand Line and into the New World, often tangling with stronger pirates and the Marines alike. More importantly, they are more than a ten-man pirate crew; they were friends and family. Through many dangers, perils, and comical situations, the Straw Hat Pirates always sailed straight, no matter how dire the situation was, no matter how deep the rifts within the crew ran, or how long they were separated from each other.

This series features many young male characters, including major characters depicted as children in many flashback episodes. The young male characters will be shrunken, born tiny, or every woman in these series is bigger than the normal-sized character.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the young One Piece cast?

Size-Alteration: There are many ways that a character can shrink or grow. In one scenario, a young male character eats a Devil Fruit which either shrinks him, or turns him into a tiny humanoid bug. In another scenario, the female character eats a Devil Fruit which turns her into a towering giantess. In another scenario, the discovery of an artifact will leave the boy shrunken or the female character gigantic.

Born Tiny: The male cast is only a tiny fraction of the billions of children born tiny due to the genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome, so with a cast of predominantly female characters, they are doted on by the giant girls in their lives, or they are seduced by them. The characters are aware of the dangers posed to their sizes, so basically, it’s like any other chapter/episode of One Piece, but with a cast of bigger female characters.

Normal-Size Among Giantesses: The male characters are born normal-sized, but the female characters in the series are more massive than him. In one scenario, the boy is born normal-sized and ends up on Amazon Lily, an island of women ruled over by the "Pirate Empress" Boa Hancock, and all of them are humongous. In another scenario, the boy ends up on a ship headed by a gigantic-born female character (i.e. Big Mom, Charlotte Smoothie, or Black Maria) or a giantess from the giant land of Elbaf. In another scenario, the boy is a young Dwarf from Dressrosa who takes refuge in the castle with Princess Viola and her niece, Rebecca. In another scenario, the boy is close friends with the gigantic mermaid princess Shirahoshi.

-or-

Space-Time Rift: The young male character(s) accidentally open or discover a rift in space of time that takes them to anywhere in the present, or in the different eras in time. The only problem is that the rift also has some nasty side-effects which makes the young male character(s) appear smaller than a Dwarf from Dressrosa on the other side of the rift and at the mercy of the gigantic female characters!

The boy is a character from the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise.

Before the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise became well-known for producing their cards, the story of the original Yu-Gi-Oh! manga revolves around timid middle schooler, Yugi Muto, who solves the mystical Millennium Puzzle, and becomes the host to the spirit of an unnamed Pharaoh. Whenever Yugi and/or his friends is caught up in any form of injustice, the spirit of the Pharaoh, alias Yami Yugi, takes over his host's body and engages in a Shadow Game where the loser will pay a heavy penalty.

When the Yu-Gi-Oh! manga began to revolve around storylines based on card games, the trend became so popular that the franchise spawned spin-off manga and anime series, including Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, 5D's, ZEXAL, etc., and continues to to this day. As the franchise progressed with further spinoffs, new game-playing mechanics were introduced to the game, including Synchro Summoning, Xyz Summoning, Pendulum Summoning, Link Summoning, and Rush Duels.

In this route, we'll be exploring the young male characters featured in the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise, either in the anime or the manga adaptations, including the manga-exclusive Yu-Gi-Oh! OCG Structures manga. For the sake of variety, each of the first few routes will feature three Yu-Gi-Oh! series with the option of having the story routes being based either their anime or manga storylines. The young male characters will be shrunken, born tiny, or every woman in the franchise is bigger than the normal-sized character.

The only question is, which of these Yu-Gi-Oh! story routes will you choose?
