15131531.content:
The boy is a character from the first three series in the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise.

In the original Yu-Gi-Oh! series, Yugi Muto solves the Millennium Puzzle and becomes the host to the spirit of an unnamed Pharaoh, who is given the alias Yami Yugi until he rediscovers the truth about his forgotten past. Before the manga revolved around card games, Yami Yugi engaged in Shadow Games with various rogues bringing injustice to Yugi and/or his friends, including Seto Kaiba, Mokuba Kaiba, and Yami Bakura.

When the storyline began to revolve around the Duel Monsters card game, Yugi took up his Duel Disk against other rogues, familiar and unfamiliar, including Seto Kaiba, Maximillion Pegasus, Yami Bakura, and Yami Marik, the rebellious gravekeepr to the Pharaoh's tomb who wanted to use the power of the Egyptian Gods and destroy the Pharaoh. Near the end of the storyline, Yami Yugi discovered the truth about his past as the Pharaoh and his battle against the dark forces before he engaged his ceremonial Duel with Yugi and was laid to rest.

In the aftermath of the storyline, as the main cast of characters were drawing closer to their graduation and the rest of their lives, Yugi was forced to take take up his Duel Disk once again against Diva/Aigami, a young teen who sought to destroy Ryo Bakura, Yami Bakura's unwilling host from the Millennium Ring for destroying his master, Shadi, wielder of the Millennium Key.

In Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, the storyline revolves around Jaden Yuki, a young slacker at Duel Academy, a prestige school that teaches young students to Duel, who was gifted with the ability to communicate with Duel Monsters spirits. He is accompanied by his companion, Winged Kuriboh, and is friends with other students, such as his best friend, Syrus Truesdale, rival Chazz Princeton, Alexis Rhodes, and others along the way.

In both the anime and the manga, evil forces established their base of operations in Duel Academy Island where Jaden and his friends must stand up against these forces from carrying out their schemes. In the manga, Jaden and his friends face off against Tragoedia, the vengeful Egyptian spirit of a bandit who possessed a series of Duel Monsters cards based around the planets of the Solar System to ensure his complete revival.

In the anime, Jaden faces off against the seven Shadow Riders who wants to unlock the Sacred Beast cards and use their powers for their own nefarious purposes; the Light of Destruction, who possessed a fortune teller, with the intent of brainwashing everyone on Earth (or destroy it in the Japanese version); Yubel, Jaden's previous card who sought vengeance for launching her into space, seemingly "discarding" her; and Nightshroud, the force of darkness who absorbed his victims and left them to wallow in the World of Darkness.

In Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's, the storyline revolves around Turbo Dueling (basically Duel Monsters on Turbo Runners) and the Synchro Summoning mechanic. Yusei Fudo, a resident of the industrial wasteland, the Satellite, uses his Turbo Dueling skills to change the world for the better, along with his friends, Jack Atlas, Crow Hogan, Akiza Izinski, Leo, and Luna. In both the anime and the manga, Yusei and his aforementioned friends must battle against the forces of evil who seek the destruction of the world, starting in New Domino City and the Satellite.

In the anime, Yusei and his aforementioned friends are all chosen by the Crimson Dragon as the Signers to battle the Dark Signers, a cult of dark Duelists who seek the revival of demons modeled after the Nazca Lines that they were sealed inside, and Illiaster, a secret society that steers the course of human history from the future armed with dangerous anti-Synchro machines. In the manga, Yusei and his friends must battle Rex Goodwin, who wants to resurrect the Ultimate God, an evil deity whose dark miasma takes the form of Duel Dragons, a series of dragon monsters gifted onto certain Duelists.

Each of these series features young male characters and well-known female characters. The young male characters will be shrunken, born tiny, or every woman in these series is bigger than the normal-sized character.

The only question is, which of these series will you choose?

Yu-Gi-Oh!

Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

A crossover between the anime series

-or

A crossover between the manga series
15131531.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Story Route 1

151315311.content:
The boy is a character from the original Yu-Gi-Oh! series.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the Yu-Gi-Oh! cast?

Size-Alteration: There are many ways that a character can shrink or grow. In one scenario, a young male character loses a Shadow Game against a female character and is shrunken down for their whims. In another scenario, a disgruntled female character steals a prototype from KaibaCorp and uses it to shrink down the male characters in the world. In another scenario, someone misuses the power of the Millennium Items, and their sizes are altered. In another scenario, a female character uses a size-changing card and either uses it to grow into giant-size or shrink down young male characters.

Born Tiny: The male cast is only a tiny fraction of the billions of children born tiny due to the genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome, so with a cast of predominantly female characters, they are doted on by the giant girls in their lives, or they are seduced by them. The characters are aware of the dangers posed to their sizes, so basically, it’s like any other episode of Yu-Gi-Oh!, but with a cast of bigger female characters.

Normal-Size Among Giantesses: The male characters are born normal-sized, but the female characters in the series are more massive than him. In one scenario, the boy is born normal-sized and is in the Duel Monsters Spirit World where the female Duel Monster spirits are giant-sized, with the children as big as an average-sized adult and the adults as big as "Black Tyranno". In another scenario, because of the many dimensional rifts in space, the female characters have grown into larger than normal size.

-or-

Space-Time Rift: The young male character(s) accidentally open or discover a rift in space of time that takes them to anywhere in the present, in the different eras in time, or in the Duel Monsters Spirit World. The only problem is that the rift also has some nasty side-effects which makes the young male character(s) appear as small as a Duston on the other side of the rift and at the mercy of the gigantic female characters!
151315311.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

1513153111.content:
The characters from Yu-Gi-Oh! had their sizes altered.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the characters in the series?

Shadow Games Shrinkage: One of the young male characters loses a Shadow Game against a female character while one of the characters wields a Millennium Item or the Seal of Orichalcos, and as a result, the boy's been shrunken down by their shadow magic. Now the boy is a toy for the villainess, and there is nothing he can do to reverse himself.

KaibaCorp's Compressor/Colossi: A disgruntled female character steals KaibaCorp's latest prototype, designed to make the Solid Vision holograms real, and reengineers it to work only on size manipulation-themed cards, such as "Shrink", "Micro Ray", or "Massivemorph." The female character activates one or more of these cards, and uses it to either shrink the male populace, expand the female populace, or both.

-or-

Millennium Mayhem: A character misuses the power of the Millennium Items, and as a result, the wielder is shrunken down (if it is a young male character) or grows into a giantess (if it is a female character). Somewhere along the line, the character invokes the wrath of the Egyptian Gods' creator, Holactie, the Creator of Light, an Egyptian goddess of light.
1513153111.title: Size-Alteration

1513153112.content:
The boy is a character from Yu-Gi-Oh! who was born tiny.

The only question is, which of these characters will you choose?

Yugi Muto/Yami Yugi: The main protagonist of Yu-Gi-Oh!, and the reincarnation of the unnamed Pharaoh. Yugi is a shy boy who lived with his mother at his late grandfather's game shop, and is close friends with Tea Gardner and her friend, Melody (originally Miho Nosaka from the original manga). After solving the Millennium Puzzle, Yugi's body became the vessel for the spirit of the unnamed Pharaoh, and the two became close friends in real life and Dueling.

Pharaoh Atem: The original incarnation of Yugi Muto who lived 5,000 years ago in Ancient Egypt. Cursed by the Egyptian Gods to punish his father, the Pharaoh for his involvement in the Kul Elna massacre which crafted the Millennium Items, Atem became the smallest ruler of Egypt, and was protected and raised by his mother, the Queen, and the female Sacred Guardians, including Isis, Mana, Kisara (the vessel for the Blue-Eyes White Dragon), and Teana.

The Young Kaiba Brothers: In the many flashbacks, Seto and Mokuba were orphaned at a young age and they were sent to an orphanage where no one adopted them. One night, after a particularly lonely day, Seto and Mokuba wish upon a star for a new family. The next day, they are taken in by a kindly woman, either an existing female character in Yu-Gi-Oh!, or a Duel Monsters spirit who took pity on them and approached them in human form.

-or-

Joey Wheeler and Friends: Joey Wheeler was born tiny and he and his sister were taken away by their mother during her divorce with her abusive ex-husband at a young age. Joey, and other fellow boys his age and small size including bad boy, Tristan, and skilled dice-thrower, Duke, were all taken in to Mrs. Wheeler's home. Tristan and Duke try to put the moves on Serenity, but Joey is always there to fight them off.
1513153112.title: Born Tiny

15131531121.content:
Yugi Muto, like so many boys at the time, was born tiny due to a genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome. He was shy, but that didn't mean he didn't have good company. He lived with his mom in his late grandfather, Solomon's game shop. He was best friends with one of the most popular girls in school, Tea Gardner, and her best friend, Melody.

Yugi depended on the kindness of those two girls because he was the runt of the already small litter of tiny-born boys. He was prone to being picked on by bad boys, Joey Wheeler and Tristan Taylor, but they thought twice about picking on Yugi when Tea threatened to pin Joey under her foot. Still, Yugi wished for more quality friends, and he hoped assembling the mysterious, mythical Millennium Puzzle would allow him to grant him that wish.

Not long afterwards, Yugi was granted this wish one day when Joey and Tristan were being beaten by a bully who liked to scam off the normal-sized girls with a protection racket. Joey, who had taken the final piece of the puzzle, entrusted it to Yugi. Yugi managed to survive the bully's brutal beating long enough for him to complete the puzzle, becoming the vessel for a darker alter-ego, Yami Yugi. He challenged the bully to a Shadow Game and won fairly, and punished the bully for cheating with a hallucination of being swimming in money in a schoolgirl's stomach.

From then on, Yami Yugi had appeared in Yugi's place during great crisis where he would resolve said crises with a Shadow Game. Eventually, after many perilous games against an opponent, Yugi would face off against his longtime rivals, the Kaiba brothers, and his archenemy, Yami Bakura, who revealed he and Yami Yugi were both reincarnations of great Egyptian figures on both sides of the coin.

Yugi would eventually Duel Kaiba and take his title as the world's greatest Duelist when he tore his grandfather's "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" card in half. With "Exodia's" assembly, Yami Yugi won the Duel and shattered Kaiba's mind. The news would spread to the devious and haughty Cecelia Pegasus, founder of Duel Monsters and wielder of the Millennium Eye. She stole Yugi's mother's soul to coerce Yugi into Dueling her at the Duelist Kingdom tournament. Yugi, along with Joey, Tristan, Tea, and Melody all went aboard the boat headed towards Duelist Kingdom where they faced off against many a foe, such as Rex Raptor, Weevil Underwood, Mai Valentine, Bonz, and Yami Bakura. Eventually, Yugi and his friends reached the castle where Yugi faced off against Cecelia Pegasus in the final battle and narrowly won the match, winning his mother's soul back.

After the Duelist Kingdom tournament, Yugi and his friends faced another threat from the Rare Hunters, led by the young, ambitious Marik Ishtar, who wished to gain control of the Egyptian God Cards. Marik's sister, Ishizu, manipulated Seto Kaiba into hosting the Battle City tournament which he did under the pretense of finally defeating his longtime rival. Yugi, Joey, and a handful of other Duelists including Bakura, Mai Valentine, Marik, and his retainer all competed for the finals on the KaibCorp airship to the island where the finals would be held. After a few battles, Yugi, Kaiba, Marik, and Joey all made it to the finals, but Marik's dark side, Yami Marik, was revealed after his retainer and good friend was rendered unconscious.

On their way to the island, the KaibaCorp airship was intercepted by Kaiba's long-lost stepbrother, Noah, who wanted revenge on the brothers by pulling them and Yugi's gang into the Virtual World. During a lengthy story surviving the Deck Master rules, Yugi and Kaiba discover that Kaiba's estrange stepfather, Gozaburo was behind the events, pushing Noah to reclaim his company that Kaiba bought out, but was defeated and destroyed.

With the airship functioning before they were caught in an explosion of the airstrip where they were held captive, the Battle City tournament resumed, with Yugi and Yami Marik eventually facing off against each other in the finals. After a lengthy battle, the real Marik reemerged and surrendered, causing his dark side to be destroyed. Yugi obtained all three Egyptian God Cards, and eerything went back to normal.

In the fourth season, Yugi and friends were under attack by the Great Leviathan, a primal serpent who devoured the souls Duel Monsters and humans for its great reawakening. Led by Iona, loyal acolyte of the serpent, the Paradius organization spread its Orichalcos, and targeted Yugi, Kaiba, and Joey for their souls, as all three were chosen to reawaken the dragons that defeated the Great Leviathan. Reuniting with Duke and brilliant prodigy, Rebecca Hawkins, Yugi and his friends faced off against Paradius, with members including Rafael, Valon, and Alister, along with recruits like Rex Raptor and Weevil, who desired the chance to defeat Yugi and Joey for their fall from grace. Eventually, the battle led them to the unearthed city of Atlantis, where Yugi, Kaiba, and Joey, with the help of the dragons, the souls of their comrades, and the God Cards, defeated the Great Leviathan and Iona.

Afterwards, Yugi and friends were invited to a tournament in the latest KaibaLand theme park opening in America, where the shifty Zigfried von Schroeder, CEO of rival company Schroder Corp, made his presence known by hacking into the database. Yugi became the center of infatuation between Tea, Rebecca, and Vivian Wong while the other Duelists rose to the finals, with Leon Wilson being the victor. It is late revealed that Leon Wilson was actually Leon von Schroeder, Zigfried's younger brother, and used the hacked version of the "Golden Castle of Stromberg" to wipe away KaibaCorp's database. Yugi found a loophole in the "Golden Castle" which allowed him to emerge victorious. Zigfried and Leon soon reconcile.

Not long after, Yugi and his friends help Yami Yugi unlock the secrets of his past as a Pharaoh, who contended with Bandit King Bakura who plotted to enshroud Egypt in shadow by resurrecting the ancient demon, Zorc. Yugi and friends help the Pharaoh regain his memories and his name, but Bakura was determined to not let it happen. During the climax of the battle, Yugi combined the Egyptian God Cards to form the ancient goddess, Holactie, the Creator of Light, and destroy the darkness.

Afterwards, Yugi and Yami Yugi participated in a ceremonial Duel to determine the fate of the Pharaoh. After a long and arduous Duel, Yugi emerged victorious, and Yami Yugi passed into the afterlife.

This story route focuses on Yugi's life as one of billions of tiny-born boys, but as the world's tiniest King of Games with the ability to switch with his alter-ego, Yami Yugi.

The only question, which part of the story do we follow?

Pre-Duel Monsters: After assembling the Millennium Puzzle, Yugi Muto becomes host to a darker alter-ego. This story route heavily features certain chapters and episodes from the original Yu-Gi-Oh! manga and anime adaptation to include the female characters featured (including Ms. Chono, Aileen Rao, and the Kageyama sisters).

Duelist Kingdom: Yugi is forced to Duel at the Duelist Kingdom tournament where he learns about Shadow Games. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the first season of Yu-Gi-Oh! altered to include certain female characters featured in the episodes (i.e. Yugi living with his mom, Cecelia Pegaus being the antagonist, etc.)

Battle City/Virutal World: Yugi and his friends Duel in Battle City, but they are under threat of the Rare Hunters and later Noah Kaiba. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the second and third season of Yu-Gi-Oh! altered to include certain female characters featured in the episodes (i.e. Tea and other female characters being possessed by Marik's Millennium Rod, etc.)

Awaking the Dragons/KC Grand Championship: Yugi and friends must defeat the great Leviathan. After the battle, they participate in the KC Grand Championship. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the fourth and final season of Yu-Gi-Oh! altered to include certain female characters featured in the episodes (i.e. Iola being the antagonist, etc.)

Dawn of the Duel: Yugi and friends go back in time to help the Pharaoh regain his memories. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the final season of Yu-Gi-Oh! altered to include certain female characters featured in the episodes (i.e. the Queen of Egypt, the Ancient Egyptian incarnations of Yugi's friends as Sacred Guardians, etc.)
15131531121.title: Yugi Muto/Yami Yugi

15131531125.content:
The boy is a character from Yu-Gi-Oh! who was born tiny.

The only question is, which of these characters will you choose?

Ryou Bakura: The white-haired boy who wielded the Millennium Ring, which contained the spirit of Yami Bakura, and the evil Zorc Necrophades. Bakura is a constant target of attack because of his alter-ego's misdeeds, and is hunted down by Ishizu Ishtar for his Millennium Ring, and Sera for the death of her master, Shadi. Every now and again, Ryou's consciousness is transferred to his original bandit life where he is persecuted by the female Sacred Guardians and the Queen of Egypt.

Rex Raptor and Weevil Underwood: The once renowned duo of Duelists who fell into infamy and notoriety early on in Yu-Gi-Oh! Weevil Underwood is an Insect Duelist who tried to cheat his way through while Rex Raptor is an ambitious Dinosaur Duelist, but not ambitious enough to cheat. The two tiny-born Duelists have lost their fame since Duelist Kingdom, but they are kidnapped by a female Duelist who has plans for the two young rogues.

Leon von Schroeder: Leon is the tiny younger brother of Schroeder Corp's CEO, Zigfried, but was often neglected by his family in favor for Zigfried's ascension to the top. Feeling lonely, Leon wishes on a shooting star that he didn't feel so isolated and alone. During that night, Leon wakes up at midnight and is surrounded by his female Fairy Tale cards, and his brother's Valkyrie cards and is taken to their home in the Duel Monsters Spirit World.

-or-

Noah Kaiba: The stepson of the late Gozaburo Kaiba who was killed in an accident. After transferring his mind into a computer, Noah learned to control his digitized world, but he pined for the real world. Noah either conjures up a harem of female characters and Duel Monsters spirits, or he attempts to transfer his body into an automaton, which backfires and he transfers his mind into a doll a female character picks up.
15131531125.title: Continuing with Born Tiny

151315312.content:
The boy is a character from Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, the second series of the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the Yu-Gi-Oh! GX cast?

Size-Alteration: There are many ways that a character can shrink or grow. In one scenario, a young male character loses a Shadow Game against a female character and is shrunken down for their whims. In another scenario, a young male character tries to sneak into the Obelisk Blue girls' dorm but is shrunk by their security system and apprehended by them. In another scenario, a female character uses a size-changing card and either uses it to grow into giant-size or shrink down young male characters.

Born Tiny: The male cast is only a tiny fraction of the billions of children born tiny due to the genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome, so with a cast of predominantly female characters, they are doted on by the giant girls in their lives, or they are seduced by them. The characters are aware of the dangers posed to their sizes, so basically, it’s like any other episode of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, but with a cast of bigger female characters.

Normal-Size Among Giantesses: The male characters are born normal-sized, but the female characters in the series are more massive than him. In one scenario, the boy is born normal-sized and is in the Duel Monsters Spirit World where the female Duel Monster spirits are giant-sized, with the children as big as an average-sized adult and the adults as big as "Black Tyranno". In another scenario, because of the many dimensional rifts in space, the female characters have grown into larger than normal size.

-or-

Space-Time Rift: The young male character(s) accidentally open or discover a rift in space of time that takes them to anywhere in the present, in the different eras in time, or in the Duel Monsters Spirit World. The only problem is that the rift also has some nasty side-effects which makes the young male character(s) appear as small as a Duston on the other side of the rift and at the mercy of the gigantic female characters!
151315312.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

1513153121.content:
The characters from Yu-Gi-Oh! GX had their sizes altered.

The only question is, which of these scenarios will you apply to the characters in the series?

Shadow Games Shrinkage: One of the young male characters loses a Shadow Game against one of the female Shadow Riders (or a female character possessed by Nightshroud), and as a result, they've been shrunken down by their shadow magic. Now the boy is a toy for the female Shadow Rider, and there is nothing he can do to reverse himself.

The Girls’ Tiny Intruder: One of the young male characters tries to sneak into the Obelisk Blue Girl's Dormitory and trips an alarm where the intruder is shrunken down and notified by the female students. (A/N: In Jaden and/or Syrus's case, they were lured there by a fake love letter written by Dr. Crowler in order to expel Jaden from Duel Academy.)

-or-

Size-Alteration Cards: One (or more) of the female characters of the series uses a discarded KaibaCorp prototype which allows the user to utilize cards that actually manipulates someone's sizes. The female character could use "Shrink" or "Micro Ray" to shrink the boy of their desire, or they'll use "Massivemorph" to increase their size into a giant.
1513153121.title: Size-Alteration

1513153122.content:
The boy is a character from Yu-Gi-Oh! GX who was born tiny.

The only question is, which of these characters will you choose.

Jaden Yuki: The main protagonist of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX, and the reincarnation of the Supreme King. As a boy, Jaden has been able to hear the voices of the Duel Monsters spirits, but he was also lonely because the spirit of his Duel Monsters card, Yubel sent anyone who defeated him in a Duel into a coma. Years later, Jaden enrolls in Duel Academy as a low-ranking Slifer Red student and becomes one of its finest Duelists in his class, despite his poor grades.

Chazz Princeton: The main rival of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX who, like Jaden, can communicate with the Duel Monsters spirits. A top Obelisk Blue Duelist, Chazz flaunts his power and has lower students at his beck and call, but has a romantic crush on the top Obelisk Blue female student, Alexis Rhodes. In order to secure his position as an elite Duelist, he tries to sabotage the younger Duelists from advancing, which puts him at odds with the female students associated with them.

Syrus Truesdale: The tritagonist of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX who lived in the shadow of his older brother, Zane. Throughout the series, after an incident with his brother rendered his confidence shaken, Syrus slowly came out of his shell with Jaden's help and support and eventually worked his way up from Slifer Red to Obelisk Blue. Syrus is easily susceptible to pretty female characters, including Duel Monsters spirits such as the Dark Magician Girl, Gamble Angel Bunny, and Thunder Nyan Nyan.

-or-

Jesse Anderson: One of the main characters of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX who, like Jaden and Chazz, can communicate with the Duel Monsters spirits. He possesses the mythical Crystal Beast cards, spearheaded by their boss monster, the legendary Rainbow Dragon. During the third season, Jesse aided in assisting Duel Academy's return from the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but he sacrifices himself to let the academy and his friends return to the real world, where he is stranded and possessed by a twisted Yubel.
1513153122.title: Born Tiny

15131531221.content:
Jaden Yuki, like so many boys at the time, was born tiny due to a genetic deficiency of the XY chromosome. He was also lonely, as every time he was defeated in a simple game of Duel Monsters, they were sent into a coma from sudden inexplainable nerve pains. What Jaden didn't realize at the time was that he possessed the power to communicate with Duel Monsters spirits, and the spirit of his Monster Card, "Yubel", was the spirit responsible for Jaden's opponents to be sent into comas.

Because of this, Jaden was often alone, tiny and helpless in a world where everything was giant, and he couldn't find anyone his size to play Duel Monsters with him. When Jaden realized his supernatural abilities, he had Yubel sent into space along with his winning "Neo-Spacian" cards where he hoped the exposure to the Gentle Darkness would soother her wild spirit. When it came into contact with the Light of Destruction, however, Yubel became mad and sought revenge for being "discarded" by her love.

Years later, Jaden enrolled into Duel Academy and was ranked a low-level Slifer Red. He becomes friends with Duelists from higher levels of Duel Academy's ranks, including the popular school queen, Alexis Rhodes, and the sneaky second-grader (later Duel Academy attendee) Blair Flannigan. While he excels at Dueling and fails at passing grades, Jaden is off saving the world from various threats who established their stronghold on Duel Academy Island.

In his first year, Jaden and six of his friends were forced to fight against the seven Shadow Riders over the possession of the Sacred Beast cards. In his second year, Jaden had to contend with a brainwashing psychic possessed by the Light of Destruction. In his third year, Jaden was forced to fight Yubel, who intended on fusing the Twelve Dimensions together and rule above all. Later that year, after Jaden and Yubel fused together, Jaden returned to defeat Nightshroud, who enveloped the entire world in darkness.

At the end, Jaden tested his skills against Yugi Muto, the King of Games who loaned him his "Winged Kuriboh" card, who became a faithful partner for Jaden, helping him get out of tight situations. The Duel ended between an inexplicable outcome between Jaden's signature card, "Elemental HERO Neos", and Yugi's "Slifer the Sky Dragon." Jaden was then last seen wandering the world.

This story route focuses on Jaden's life as one of billions of tiny-born boys, but only one of a small fraction born with the ability to communicate with Duel Monsters spirits.

The only question, which part of the story do we follow?

Young Jaden: Young Jaden is feeling lonely because no one wants to Duel with him for fear of a sudden affliction. The spirit of Yubel takes pity on him and takes him to the Duel Monsters Spirit World where it is revealed that Jaden is the reincarnation of her lover, the Supreme King. Yubel raises him to be the Supreme King to unite the Spirit Worlds and rule with Yubel as his bride-to-be at the coming age.

First Year at Duel Academy: Jaden is enrolled into Duel Academy and bunks with fellow Slifer Red roommates, Syrus and Chumley. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the first season of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX altered to include certain female characters taking on major antagonistic roles (i.e. Shadow Riders led by its female members including Camula, Tania, Meanae the Thorn, etc.)

Second Year at Duel Academy: Jaden starts his second year, but must fight the Light of Destruction. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the second season of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX altered to include certain female characters taking on major antagonistic roles (i.e. Sarina being possessed by the Light of Destruction, Princess Rose being Sarina's puppet, etc.)

Final Year at Duel Academy: Jaden's life becomes complicated during his final year at Duel Academy. This story route heavily features certain episodes from the third and fourth seasons of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX altered to include certain female characters taking on major antagonistic roles (i.e. a Nightshroud-possessed Alexis, Echo using the power of Exodia, etc.)
15131531221.title: Jaden Yuki

choices: The First Day as the Young King
151315312211.content:
Seven year-old Jaden sat on his windowsill, looking out into the neighborhood from his bedroom. The normal-sized girls and the tiny-born boys were busy playing on the streets, either Duel Monsters or with just toys. The young boy sighed dejectedly, melancholy threatening to swallow him up as he spent yet another day alone, isolated from the neighborhood because they were afraid of being around him, on account that other people who beat him in a Duel were sent into a coma.

"It's not fair..." Jaden whispered to himself, curling his knees up to himself. "Everyone else is having fun and they don't get hurt... but when I try to have fun, they get hurt. Now they're too scared to play with me, calling me a freak and a monster..." Jaden closed his eyes, a tear leaking out of his eye. "It's just not fair."

The tear dripped off and fell onto the windowsill.

What Jaden hadn't realized before was that he was born with the gift to communicate with the Duel Monsters spirits. He could hear and see the spirits of Duel Monsters cards when no one else did. This would first come to play as the spirit of his Monster Card, "Yubel" watched her young lover cry on the windowsill, taking pity on his poor soul. With a rainbow glow emanating from her card form, the feminine Fiend made herself known as the spirit was made into her ethereal form, spreading her dichotomic wings.

The dark fuchsia-skinned Duel Monster opened up her gentle, dichromatic eyes. She gently approached the boy and with her clawed hand, she wiped the tear away.

Jaden jumped at the sensation, and when he turned around, he screamed at the sight of a giant feminine figure standing over him, backing up against the glass window. "Don't be afraid, Jaden," she gently begged Jaden. "I am not here to hurt you."

"Who are you!? What are you in my room!?" Jaden screamed.

"How quickly you must forget, Jaden," Yubel said, bending over with her hands on her knees, face to face with the boy. "Don't you remember me, Jaden? I'm one of your favorite cards. I was the monster you wanted to summon, but you never got the chance to."

Jaden's young eyes widened as the appearance of the feminine giant snapped back into his mind. "I remember you! You're one of my cards! You're Yubel!" The tiny boy's body calmed down, and he shifted into a more comfortable position, but was still nervous in the giantess's presence. "But what are you doing here? And how did you get in my house?"

"I have always been with you all this time, Jaden, even before the day your father found me and gifted me to you," Yubel explained as she gently pressed her finger against Jaden's forehead. Suddenly, his head became flooded from the memories of a previous life. "In another life, you are the Supreme King who rules over the Duel Monsters Spirit World, and I was your loyal guardian. Before the time came when we were parted, you and I were lovers, and we vowed to reunited in another life and we would be together again.

Yubel retraced her finger and gave Jaden a moment to recover from his past memory recollection. "I have found my way to you again, my love, and I have stayed by your side in this spirit form. I have protected you from sadness and hurt by punishing those who have defeated you in many Duels, but because I have overstepped myself, you have been lonely, and it is my own fault for this."

The giant demonic spirit reached out her right clawed hand and offered it to Jaden. "Now as part of my penance, I will take you from the sadness and the hurt you feel. I will take you back to the castle where you once reigned as king of the Spirit World. You are not yet of age or strength to take on such a feat, but I will personally raise you to become the king that was once loved by the world's inhabitants..."

Yubel bent forwards and planted a loving, passionate kiss on Jaden's head. "...and to be the king who I will vow to marry and stand by his side. Will you allow me to help you, Jaden Yuki?"

Jaden didn't initially want to go with Yubel. He'd be leaving his own mother and father behind, and they'd have no idea where he'd go...but then again, he hadn't seen them in a week. Weighing the option with the loneliness he felt lately, Jaden felt like he had nothing to lose. He climbed aboard Yubel's palm, who lifted him up and planted another passionate kiss on him.

"You've made the right choice, beloved," Yubel said, gently stuffing Jaden in between her buxom breasts and smushing him in between the mounds. "Now you shall have the honor of joining me and my army of sisters as we will prepare for your ascension to the throne as the Supreme King!"

Yubel's body glowed, and in a split second, she and her passenger disappeared in a flash, leaving behind a single card which burnt completely into ashes.

In another flash of light, Yubel and Jaden were floating in midair, her flapping wings hovering above a grand castle surrounded by a large moat, overlooking a strange new world surrounding the castle. "Yubel, where are we?" Jaden curiously asked.

"This is the Duel Monsters Spirit World, Jaden, where Duel Monsters of all different Types and Attributes live and prosper," Yubel explained as they gently descended towards the castle. "The castle you see is the same castle your past life lived when he was the Supreme King, kept up by myself and the aid of other Duel Monsters who will suit your needs."

Yubel descended onto a tower, and waiting for her were a few other female Fiends, including Chaos Hunter, Luna the Dark Spirit, and the Ladies of Lament, Malice and Lilith. Jaden felt uneasy because of their appearance, especially when their eyes fell on him and the giantess whose breasts held him.

"Lady Yubel! You have returned to us at long last!" Lilith, Lady of Lament cheered.

"Have you found the Supreme King yet?" Malice, Lady of Lament asked.

"I have found him, my sisters," Yubel said, plucking Jaden from her cleavage and holding him out for the feminine Fiends to gawk at. "And he has returned to us at long last."

"My king," the Fiends greeted in unison, taking a knee in respect for the young king.

"Come, my sisters, we must celebrate his return to us. We will hold a grand feast along with our trusted generals. Chaos Hunter," Yubel called for the crimson-clad pale-haired demoness holding a thick whip. "You will gather the generals and ambassadors into the throne room immediately. We must make this announcement official."

"Yes, my Lady," Chaos Hunter said as she shot straight up and marched back into the castle.

"My sisters, you will also inform the staff of his return," Yubel addressed the other female Fiends, "and bring Jaden a friend for him. He has been lonely, and he will need at least one to accompany him."

"At once, my Lady," the female Fiends acknowledge. They too disappeared into the castle.

Yubel cupped both clawed hands and carried Jaden into the castle, the boy entranced and enamored by the sights of the castle from the inside. It was still hard to believe that he was a king in a past life. "You will be attended to by our staff," Yubel told the excited boy in her palms. "Whatever you need, they will provide you immediately, so do not hesitate to call onto them if you are in need of assistance."

"Don't worry, Yubel, I won't hesitate," Jaden assured the giant Fiend, who smiled at her young lover's enthusiasm.

"My Lady!" came the voice of Luna the Dark Spirit as she approached the two. "I have come to relay a message from Chaos Hunter. She says the generals have gathered and they await your arrival."

"Thank you, Luna. Rejoin with the rest of the staff and I will meet you there," Yubel ordered.

With a bow, Luna quickly retreated to the throne room. Yubel gently clasped Jaden in both hands, much to Winged Kuriboh's protest, and with a flash of light, Yubel and Winged Kuriboh teleported into the throne room, a grand hall line with smooth marble, a red carpet, and a grand throne etched with gold.

Standing near the throne were Yubel's personal attendants, the female Fiends earlier met. They were accompanied by the Amazoness Empress and her tribe, a large variety of female Warriors, Spellcasters, Fairies, and all other Types. The feminine clamor they created suddenly ceased with Yubel's appearance.

"My sisters, my friends, my comrades!" Yubel began with a loud and clear voice while WInged Kuriboh flew off to the side. "Many years ago, the Supreme King was lost to us, and we have given our strength to defend this castle until his return. Today, I have found him at last, and with our help, he will be king once again! Behold...!"

Yubel unfurled her hands, revealing Jaden in her palms. "...the Supreme King has returned!"

Then the hall went into a great cheer, fists pumped up and chanting in celebration of his return.

And Jaden? He didn't feel so alone anymore, since he found people who now loved him and respected him.

He was home at last.

What happens next?

1.) Jaden is the center of attention with his return; he is given a feast and is introduced to new friends and bodyguards.
2.) Skip to the next day, when Jaden begins his new life as the upcoming Supreme King, waited on by the female staff.
3.) Skip to years later when Jaden is a young teen, practicing to harness the power of the Gentle Darkness, engaged to Yubel.
151315312211.title: Return of the Supreme King

15211.content:
In the wake of science fiction films in the 1950's, many films were centered around theme of size-changing where the central character or antagonist is either enlarged or shrunken. The most prominent examples include the Incredible Shrinking Man, and Attack of the 50 Foot Woman. The subject of size-changing themes in live-action movies is rarely touched upon, but there are other films that are centered upon this theme, including Honey, I Shrunk the Kids, The Fantastic Voyage, and Village of the Giants.

In this route, we will be focusing on certain boy characters appearing in these shrinking/growing-themed live-action films, either as a canon character such as Genius (from Village of the Giants), or an original character of your choice within the canon or non-canon size-changing films. They will be shrunken, born tiny, or every woman in the following films is bigger than the normal-sized character. 15211.title: Size-Changing Films

choices: Honey, I Blew Up the Kid
152111.content:
Walt Disney Pictures' Honey, I Shrunk the Kids franchise is heavily centered around the theme of shrinking and growing. In Honey, I Shrunk the Kids, the focus kids are shrunken down by Wayne Szalinski's shrinking ray, and they must traverse a dangerous, giant world to return to normal size. In Honey, I Blew Up the Kid, the Szalinski's two year-old son, Adam is grown into giant size by the same shrinking ray and causes damage to Las Vegas. In Honey, We Shrunk Ourselves, the older family members of the Szalinski family is shrunk by the same ray and they must grab their children's attention while they have a house party.

For this route, we'll be exploring each movie in the Honey, I Shrunk the Kids film series individually and making significant alterations to the plot of each movie so the main boy characters are smaller than the giantesses appearing in each film. The only question is, which of the films will you choose?

Honey, I Shrunk the Kids

Honey, I Blew Up the Kid

-or-

Honey, We Shrunk Ourselves
152111.title: Honey, I Shrunk the Kids series

1521111.content:
In Honey, I Shrunk the Kids, the kids - Nick Szalinski, Amy Szalinski, Russ Thompson Jr., and Ron Thompson - are all shrunken down by Wayne Szalinski's shrinking ray where they are accidentally swept up by the unknowing inventor and thrown out into the outside trash can.

After escaping the trash can, the kids traverse the dangerous jungle of the Szalinski's front yard where they are nearly drowned by the automated sprinklers, befriend a scouting ant while eating a giant, discarded oatmeal cookie, attacked by a scorpion which was fatally stung defending the kids, and nearly killed by a lawnmower pushed by Nick's friend, Tommy. The Szalinski family dog, Quark, happens upon the shrunken kids and take them inside the house.

While Quark carried the kids inside the house, Nick falls into Wayne's bowl of Cheerios and is nearly unknowingly eaten by his father. Quark saves the boy by biting Wayne's ankle, making him aware of Nick's presence in his spoon and on the tabletop counter. Wayne successfully grows the children back to size and the families make up.

In this story route, Wayne Szalinski and Russ Thompson are absent, but the former's shrinking ray is still fully functional. The kids are still going to be shrunken down, but instead of Amy being shrunken, Nick's friend, Tommy is shrunken while Amy, Diane Szalinski, and Mae Thompson each provide the roles as the main giantesses in the story.

The only question is, which part of the movie do we focus on?

The Attic: Russ Jr. and Ron accidentally hit the baseball through the attic window which activates the shrinking ray, while Nick and Tommy are hanging out at the Szalinski house. When the boys are shrunken, one of the female Szalinski members enter the attic to investigate the noise, unaware that her young son and his friends are at her feet.

The Front Yard: While the boys are traversing the jungle of the Szalinski's front yard, one of the main female cast members happen to step out into the yard. It is either Diane, who returned from an errand, Amy, who is searching for Nick and Tommy, and/or Mae Thompson, who is searching for her two sons. They are unaware that the boys are hidden among the blades of grass at their feet, at least until Amy realizes what happens to the boys.

The Breakfast: After being carried by a pollen-collecting bee, the boys are flown inside the Szalinski house where Amy, Diane, and Mae are all having breakfast while they're discussing what happened to their boys. The boys fall after Mae swats the bee away, but they either land on the counter, or in one of the giant girls' breakfasts. Diane is drinking coffee, Mae is eating a bowl of Cheerios, and Amy is eating a Pop-Tart.
1521111.title: Honey, I Shrunk the Kids

1521112.content:
In Honey, I Blew Up the Kid, three years after the events of the first film, Adam Szalinski, the youngest child of the Szalinski family, is accidentally hit with a variation of his father, Wayne Szalinski's shrink ray, which enlarges the targeted objects during a visit at his workplace, Starling Labs.

During the course of the film, Adam continuously grows from exposure to electromagnetic waves while he is babysat by his brother, Nick, and his babysitter and Nick's crush, Mandy. Wayne's Szalinski's corrupt coworker, Dr. Charles Hendrickson, sought to use the growth ray which turned Adam into a giant and take over Starling Labs to do so. The climax of the film takes place in Las Vegas where the giant-sized Adam, along with Nick and Mandy, are cornered by Hendrickson before the giant-sized Diane intervenes. Wayne shrinks Diane and Adam back to normal size, and also accidentally Nick and Mandy in the process.

In this story route, Wayne is absent, Adam isn't a giant, and Wayne's shrinking/growing ray is still functional. Either Nick and Adam are going to be shrunken accidentally, or one or more of the female characters in the film, such as Diane, Mandy, and/or Amy, will be accidentally hit by the growth ray and they grow into 100 foot giantesses.

The only question is, which part of the movie will you choose?

The Shrinking Ray: While Wayne is away, Nick and Adam explore their father's lab and they get hit by his malfunctioning shrinking ray, causing them to shrink to a familiar tiny size while Diane and Amy are home before they move to college OR Mandy arrives to babysit Adam. Nick has to watch out for Adam's safety while they're tiny since he's a curious and wondrous two-year-old boy.

The Growing Ray: This route closely follows the main story in the film, focused solely on the primary female cast members being giant instead of Adam. While searching through Wayne's lab, Amy, Diane, and/or Mandy are hit by Wayne's malfunctioning growth ray. After getting continuously exposed to electromagnetic waves, the girl(s) grow into over 100 foot giantesses. Nick and Adam are roped into an adventure with their giant female relatives and/or love interest.
1521112.title: Honey, I Blew Up the Kid

1521113.content:
In Honey, We Shrunk Ourselves, eight years after the events of the previous film, the adults - Wayne Szalinski, Gordon Szalinski, and their respective wives, Diane and Patti of the film are shrunken by Wayne's shrinking ray while their kids host a party with their friends, not knowing they were tiny.

During the course of the film, the Szalinski brothers and their wives trek the dangerous territory of their house while the children party in the ground floor. The Szalinski brothers float in a bubble, which pops above a bowl of French onion dip where they were nearly devoured by the girls while avoiding their dipping chips. Their wives befriends a daddy long legs caught in a spider web and they use him to explore the rest of the house and grab the kids' attention.

While the adults explore the house, they notice their kids maturing and get a fresh new perspective on their needs, having disagreements prior to the shrinking event. Eventually, Wayne hot-wires the living room speakers and the adults finally grab the kids' attention. After a lengthy discussion, the kids change their parents back to normal size.

In this route, the Szalinski brothers are absent and their wives don't shrink, but the boys do. Adam and Mitch Szalinski are shrunken around the shrinking events and/or Ricky King and his two friends, Vince and Trey, are shrunken during the party. (A/N: This route will be interconnected at certain points to be canon with the film, but they'll still be separate categories. Also, you also add the female characters from the previous films in this route.)

The only question is, which part of the movie will you choose?

The Pre-Party Size-Alteration: Adam and Mitch explore Wayne's attic laboratory where they accidentally trigger the size-altering machine. Either the machine shrinks them to three quarters of an inch tall, leaving them at the unaware mercy of Jenny or their mothers in the house, or the machine grows the girls into 100 ft. giantesses.

The Little Bullies' Big Mistake: Ricky King and his two friends are bullies who crash Jenny's party. When Ricky is rejected by Jenny after an unwanted kiss, he and his friends go upstairs and trash the attic, accidentally activating the shrinking machine and shrinking them down to Adam and Mitch's current size. A little karma will spell big trouble for their futures.
1521113.title: Honey, We Shrunk Ourselves

The 1993 made-for TV remake of the original film stays close to the original, albeit somewhat altered storyline while retaining the themes of marital issues and emotional instability, as well as the additional themes of power being granted to femininity.

In this story route, we'll be exploring Nancy's adventures as a giantess where she interacts a young boy slightly bigger than her thumb. 15221331.title: Hiro Hamada

152213311.content:
14 year old Hiro Hamada was walking down the halls of one of the several buildings of the San Fransokyo Institute of Technology. The black haired boy had a long day of classes and was eager to get back to the Lucky Cat Café so he could relax and unwind. As Hiro made his way out of the building he turned his head seeing in another room that Gogo Tomago and Honey Lemon who were looking at a rainbow colored rectangular prism. The boy-genius deciding to pop in and say hello to the older students.

"Hey Honey Lemon, hi Gogo, what are you guys looking at?" Hiro asked curiously as he walked into the room as Honey Lemon and Gogo kept looking at the rainbow colored object. "Oh hey Hiro, Freddy's dad found this gem on one of his expeditions and gave it to him as a gift and Fred wanted us to take a look at it for him." Honey Lemon explained with her normal cheerful tone.

Gogo blew a bubble which popped before speaking "Fred asked us to 'do 'science on it' and see if there's anything special about it, which I doubt there is." Gogo said with a roll of her eyes, doing air quotes while saying the word science. "We aren't even geologists so what does Fred even expect us to do with it." Gogo says waving the prism around in her hand.

"It is not like something is going to wrong, I don't see any harm in humoring Freddy, besides maybe we will learn something about it. If it turns there is nothing special about it we just give it back to Freddy and let him know, if there is no harm, there is no foul." Honey Lemon said, always trying to see the positive in things.

"Fine, we'll run some more tests on it, but you owe me" Gogo sighed as she grabbed some materials from another table as she was considering some possible ideas regarding the rainbow colored rectangular prism.

"Do you guys mind if I watch you guys experiment on the gem?" Hiro asked with a small smile thinking that if he provided Gogo and Honey Lemon with company that it would the testing somewhat more bearable for the girls.

"Oh that would be no trouble at all Hiro, go right ahead and pull up a seat, more people is always fun, right Gogo?" Honey Lemon asked cheerfully, Hiro went ahead and set his things down before sitting on a plastic chair.

"No, but Hiro's alright so he is an exception so he can stay." The Korean woman stated monotonously, Honey Lemon sighs at Gogo's bluntness but doesn't let it bother her as the tall blonde started grabbing her own set of materials for experimenting on the rainbow object.

Hiro watched with a small smile as Gogo and Honey Lemon did a variety of tests on the semi-mysterious object. While Hiro would deny it if asked, he had a crush on both Honey Lemon and Gogo, finding both women to be extremely beautiful and amazing in their own ways.

Honey Lemon and Gogo first tried encasing the rectangular prism in a variety of different but safe chemicals, each time there was no reaction. Gogo not really caring about the prism or Fred's feelings tried to cut into the gem, it was at this point it was made known that the rainbow prism was much more durable than it appeared, no matter what Gogo used to try and cut the gem, nothing would work, in fact there weren't any scratches on the prism whatsoever.

"Well now we know it is super durable." Honey Lemon said with a smile as Gogo frustratingly slammed a laser cutter onto the table. Hiro trying to resist the urge to laugh at Gogo's frustration.

"Do you mind if I take a look at it?" Hiro asked standing up and slowly walking closer. "Sure go ahead, not like it would change anything." Gogo stated bitterly turning around so she was no longer facing the prism.

Hiro walked up to the table where the gem was resting before he picked it up and then there was a blinding flash of light that filled the entire room. When Hiro could see again he noticed with a gasp that he had shrunk to a mere inch in height. However when Hiro looked up at Gogo and Honey Lemon he realized he wasn't the only one affected by whatever the light was.

How were Honey Lemon and Gogo altered?
152213311.title: The Shrinking Hiro

153.content:
Since the early 1960's release of Spacewars!, the video game industry has grown into the one of the world's central form entertainment behind broadcast and cable TV. In the 1980's, the video game industry boomed with the release of arcade video games such as PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Super Mario Bros., and Street Fighter, to name a few.

In the 1990's, the industry expanded further not only with the release of video game consoles (such as the Nintendo hardware systems and the Sony PlayStation consoles), but with the release of video games with early 3-D graphics. Star Fox and Donkey Kong Country were among the earliest examples. The early 2000's saw the rise of revolutionary gameplay, such as double-screen handheld consoles, motion controls, mobile gaming, and a console switching from docking at the television to a handheld console.

During the expansion of the video game industry, many influential video game companies have made their mark in the industry, more prominently Nintendo, SEGA, Capcom, and Square Enix, each of them being well-known for their influential game franchises.

Nintendo has many iconic games featuring young male characters, but for the sake of the Video Games route, Nintendo will feature its own route. That being said, some of the more iconic games from different major game companies like SEGA, Capcom, and Square Enid appears on this route.

Which of these prominent video games will you explore?

Nintendo (featuring Super Mario, The Legend of Zelda, and Pokémon)

Sonic the Hedgehog series

Street Fighter series

-or-

Final Fantasy series

In this route, we will be focusing on certain boy characters appearing in Nintendo's famous franchises, either as a canon character such as Young Link (from The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time and Majora's Mask), or an original character of your choice within the canon or non-canon Nintendo game universes. 15311.content:
Super Mario Bros. is the most iconic video game series in video game history, with the series' star frontrunner, Mario being the most iconic video game character in history.

Since his debut in the original Donkey Kong arcade game in the early 1980's, Mario has grown exponentially from a fictitious plumber climbing up structures to save the damsel from a giant gorilla, to a fan favorite and Nintendo's commercial success, pumping out very well-known games such as Super Mario Bros., Super Mario World, and Super Mario 64 to name a few.

In the 1990's, Super Mario introduced a franchise of long-running spinoff games, from party games such as Super Mario Party, to racing kart games such as Super Mario Kart, to even later games focusing primarily on different main characters such as Luigi's Mansion, Super Princess Peach, and the different Wario games. Not only does the franchise publish well-received games, but it has also release popular characters such as Luigi, Peach, Bowser, Daisy, Bowser Jr. and many more.

In this route, since the number of young male characters in the Super Mario Bros. series is lax, the first few options will feature a couple of the male characters that does appear in the series, including the younger versions of the Mario characters appearing in the Yoshi series (i.e. Baby Mario, Baby Luigi, Baby Bowser, etc.), Bowser Jr. and a few of the Koopalings (i.e. Lemmy and Iggy), and the characters appearing the Paper Mario series (i.e. Twink, Goombario, Koops, etc.)

The fourth route will features Original Characters Slots open for anyone who wish to create their own original character to be placed in the Super Mario Bros. series.

The only question is, which route will you choose?

Baby Mario characters

Bowser Jr. and the Koopalings

Paper Mario characters

153114.content:
The character is an original character and non-canon to the Super Mario series.

Choose one of the slots you want to focus on...

The Tiny Relative of Princess Peach: The boy is a prince who is a blood relative to Princess Peach and often stays with her at her castle. Because of the young prince's cuteness, he is often toyed around and the mercy of the whims of Peach and her friends, Toadette, Princess Daisy, Rosalina, and Pauline. Similar to how Princess Peach is often kidnapped by Bowser, the young prince is often kidnapped by a female villain such as Wendy O. Koopa or Super Mario enemies wearing the Super Crown (i.e. Bowsette, Booette, Chompette, etc.).

The Tiny Toad: A young Toad is accidentally exposed to the Mini Mushroom, and as a result, he is shrunken down to tiny size. He is accidentally shipped with a container full of vegetables to the home of a major female character who plans on eating them for her meal. At his size, the boy must avoid being squashed under the giantesses' feet, or he must explore the inside of the giantesses' bodies should he gets eaten. The latter is similar to Bowser's Inside Story, except more feminine.

-or-

The Princess from a Giant Land: A princess from the Tiny-Huge Kingdom goes to the Mushroom Kingdom for vacation and befriends a young, lonely male character after an accidental encounter. The princess either establishes a new base in the Mushroom Kingdom to be closer to the boy, or she takes him back to her kingdom. (A/N: The young male character can either be canon or non-canon. You are also free to use any of the previous original characters in this route.)
153114.title: Original Character Slots

1531141.content:
Character Bios:

(Original character by ButterBazooka)

Name: Prince Lemon
Age: 7 years old
Eyes: Blue
Hair: Blonde
Height: 3"
Weight: 2.5 grams
Ethnicity: White/Caucasian
Backstory: Prince Lemon is the relative of Mushroom Kingdom's Princess Peach, born tiny and constantly under her constant supervision at the castle. Because of the young prince's innocence and cuteness, he is often toyed with by Peach and her friends, Toadette, Princess Daisy, Rosalina, and Pauline. Similar to how Princess Peach is often kidnapped by Bowser, the young prince is often kidnapped by a female villain such as Wendy O. Koopa or Super Mario enemies wearing the Super Crown (i.e. Bowsette, Booette, Chompette, etc.).

Main Story:

The sun shone over the green and vibrant Mushroom Kingdom. Its warm and bright radiance cast the elegant glow over Princess Peach's Castle, home to the eponymous crown princess who rules over the Mushroom Kingdom with grace and elegance. Though the windows were covered by curtains, the sunlight still shone through the fabric inside the royal bedroom, brightening up the entire room.

This slight shift in brightness allowed the occupant sleeping in the bedroom to flutter her eyes open, and slowly sit up with a yawn and a stretch. With a large, content sigh, she looked into her half-exposed bosom, gently reached two pinching fingers deep insider her cleavage, and pulled out a certain seven year-old human boy with short blonde hair.

"Wakey, wakey, Lemon. It's time to wake up," Peach cooed as she brought the tiny boy to her pursed lips and kissed him.

Despite being named after the sour fruit, Prince Lemon was a sweet and gentle boy made all the more sweeter from his upbringing courtesy of his relative, Peach. He was often curious, but he loved the people in his life, especially the women who loved him back and enjoyed playing with him. Unlike the boys his age, Prince Lemon enjoyed tea parties, shopping, and attempting to apply beauty makeup on the giantesses who babysat him. He was especially fond of being cuddled and held by the giant girls; it was easier on the nerves this way.

Lemon rubbed his eyes and yawned, waking up to the sight of his goddess of a guardian smiling down with her signature plush lips. "Good morning..."

1.) "...mama." (Prince Lemon was born from the lonely Princess Peach wishing to the Star Spirits for a child, so the Star Spirits infused a part of her hair into special glowing flower bud, and the flower bloomed to reveal her son. Today, she's meeting with the dignitaries from the other Kingdoms, so a female character will be babysitting him... or she will bring him along.)

2.) "...big sister." (Prince Lemon was born a tiny human lost in the Mushroom Kingdom, but he was found by Peach during a pleasant picnic and was adopted not long after. Peach often teases Lemon like any older sister teased their little brothers, but Lemon didn't mind the teasing at all. Today, she's invited her friends, Daisy, Rosalina, and Pauline for a get together, and Peach has something mischievous planned for Lemon.)

3.) "...auntie." (Prince Lemon is the son of the Princess from the Tiny-Huge Lands who was met with an unfortunate fate by being swallowed by a giant fish at sea. With no sign of her return, Prince Lemon was taken in by his mother's dear friend, Princess Peach, who dearly loved playing with her surrogate nephew. Today, anything can happen, including Peach and Lemon getting kidnapped by Bowsette or Wendy O. Koopa.)
1531141.title: Prince Lemon

15311412.content:
"Good morning, big sister."

Princess Peach couldn't help but gush over how adorable her adopted little brother was while waking up. She quickly planted two more kisses to his little body, and one more for good measure. "Sorry, but you were just so cute waking up that I just couldn't resist," Peach apologized. "Come on, let's get dressed and ready for breakfast."

Peach gently brought him over to her changing station where they got dressed in their attire and ready for the day. While Peach dressed up in her signature pink-colored ball gown and crown, Prince Lemon was dressed up in a yellow-colored uniform to compliment the fruit he was named after, and wore a small crown on top of his head. It wasn't embedded with a jewel, but it nevertheless showcased his royal status.

As Lemon was fully dressed for the day, a white-gloved hand suddenly pinched the back of his uniform. The tiny boy yelped as Peach lifted him up to her bosom and pressed him into her cleavage, squeezing him between her massive breasts. "Hey, big sis, what are you doing!?" Lemon yelled as he struggled against Peach's boobs.

"What? I'm just trying to make lemonade," Peach teased, jiggling her massive mammaries and burying the boy deeper inside her cleavage.
"After all, what's lemonade without a freshly-pressed Lemon?"

"Sis, stop! We're gonna be late for breakfast!" Lemon whined, muffled by Peach's breast flesh.

"Don't worry, Lemon, I'll carry you there this way," Peach assured with a little giggle, pulling up her white frilly shirt over her exposed cleavage and carrying him while she exited the bedroom and walked down the hallway. "Oh, and just so you know, we're not gonna eat breakfast alone. The girls are going to be joining us for breakfast shortly and then we're going out for a day on the town."

At the mention of those names, Peach felt a struggling tickle inside her breasts. She held in her urge to laugh out loud as Lemon's little hands tickled her boobs trying to crawl out. He popped out of the top of the white shirt with a gasp. "Daisy, Rosie, and Pauline's coming over too!? Why didn't you tell me this before!?"

"I just wanted it to be a surprise, so... surprise!"

Lemon whined while the giantess giggled at his reaction. "Why do you keep doing this to me, sis?"

"Because, isn't it a big sister's job to tease her little brother?" Peach asked rhetorically as an answer.

Lemon only sighed as an appropriate response.

The title of big sister was something Peach took both lightly and lovingly since the day Peach discovered Lemon when he was just a lost little human who wandered into the castle grounds, avoiding the Toad guards and scavenging for food from the bushes. It was around the early afternoon, and Peach and her friends having a delightful picnic in the castle's backyard area.

Peach, Daisy, Rosalina, and Pauline were all enjoying a lovely gathering and gossip over delectable food, tea, and coffee. Unbeknownst to them at the moment, the lost and hungry tiny boy of six years was scavenging for apples to eat from the bushes when he saw the delicious food laid out on the plaid picnic blanket. Out of all the food spread out, the one that got his attention was the cake Peach made herself. He snuck up to the cake while Peach's back was turned and tried to take a chunk of the delicious baked goods. As he went for a few big mouthfuls, Peach sliced off a parts of the cake and handed them to her friends, while she took the one with Lemon in it, burying him inside it.

As Peach scooped a portion of the cake slice with Lemon buried inside, the tiny boy popped out and screamed as he was headed into a giant mouth, a big pink maw outfitted with large, chomping, chopping teeth, and glistening with coats of saliva. Fortunately, that scream was all it took for Lemon to grab Peach's attention, as well as Daisy, Rosalina, and Pauline for all to see. He was understandably afraid at first, seeing he was almost eaten by the giant princess of the Mushroom Kingdom, but he was gently shushed and comforted by Peach. Lemon felt at ease under the blonde giantess's gentle touch and remained by her side throughout the rest of the day.

Since then, Peach adopted him and raised him as her little brother. She explained she loved her Toads as her own children, and Lemon was young enough to be her little brother. Despite using the Super Mushroom, Lemon's size didn't grow one bit. That was okay because Lemon was cuter this way. He was so cute, that Peach's sisterly instincts began to tease Lemon, constantly placing him in her breasts, pretending to eat him, and laying with him with her feet. She also enabled her friends to lovingly tease him too, eventually making the young prince a target for their affection and personal desire for their whims.

Thanks to Lemon's innocence, the young prince didn't catch on to their own brand of playfulness. He didn't mind being playing with them, it was a nice pace from being teased by Peach. Still, he couldn't help but develop a crush on Pauline while Rosalina developed her crush on the little prince.

The two siblings entered the patio where a large round table sat outside, set and ready for their arrival, plus their friends. The table featured a miniature table so that Lemon could eat alongside Peach. The table was loaded with a most delicious sight. There were plates of pancakes, berries, and syrup assembled on one portion of the dining table, plates full of protein breakfasts like bacon, sausages, and eggs cooked in all different kinds, and a few plates with slabs of meat. Whatever the siblings didn't eat, they donated to the servants and the rest to the local Toad orphanage.

"Oh, wow, this looks delicious!" Lemon practically squealed. "I wanna try them! Please, please, I wanna try them!"

"Oh, sounds like someone's getting hungry," Peach observed as she held up her breasts from the bottom, a teasing glint shining in her eye and a coy smirk at the corner of her mouth. "Are you hungry, little brother? Are you sure you're really hungry?"

"Yes, yes, I'm hungry!" Lemon shouted, bobbing in place in his guardian's cleavage. "Come on, big sis, let's sit down already! Please!? I'm hungry!"

"Now now, Lemon, you're gonna get your food," Peach said teasingly, making Lemon's eagerness fade away and replaced with uncertainty. The boy could only watch as Peach adjusted her breasts with one arm and reach for him with her other white-gloved hand.

What happens next?

1.) Peach takes Lemon out so he could join her and her friends for breakfast.
2.) Peach stuffs Lemon further into her cleavage, and the prince is held tightly as Peach goes on with her get together with her friends.
3.) Peach takes Lemon out, plants him in one of the breakfast items, and buries him in food so she or someone else will come along and possibly eat him.
4.) Peach takes Lemon out and places him on the floor where he has to dodge the giant feet of his giant sister and her friends.
5.) Peach takes Lemon out and puts him in one of the seats at the table so he could be squashed under his sister's or friends' behinds.
15311412.title: Big Sister Peach

choices: Pauline's Cup of Coffee with Lemon
